TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_010: <TelopSmall>There's always plenty of smiles and the sounds of buttons clacking</>
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_011:
<TelopSmall>Words become redundant when simply</>
<TelopSmall>playing a match together tells a thousand tales</>
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_012: <TelopSmall>And now, another player looks to make their mark on the scene</>
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_020: The dream we've been chasing all this time is finally coming true.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_030: I'm counting on you, buddy. Everything's riding on you now!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_031: Where's your pal at? They were supposed to be here ages ago.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_032: I'll go look for them. You guys head on in without me.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_033: Okay. See you in there, then!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_034: Cool. I'll be there when the tourney starts.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_040: I suppose it's easy to get turned around in a new place. I'll give 'em a call so we can find each other.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_050: Yo, where you at? This place is packed—it's gonna be a nightmare to find each other. Tell you what, let me know what you're wearing today, and I'll come look for you!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_050_01: Yo, where you at? This place is packed—it's gonna be a nightmare to find each other.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_050_02: Tell you what, let me know what you're wearing today, and I'll come look for you!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_060: Create an avatar to represent you in this world.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_062: I was starting to think you weren't gonna show.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_063: Man, my heart's beatin' like crazy.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_064: You can feel the electricity in the air.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_065: We've all been waiting for this game to drop for what feels like forever and a day.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_066: I'm shakin' with excitement just thinking about finally being able to play it!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_100:
Yo! There's one!
Oh man, this is it! TEKKEN 8, at last!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_110:
Oh, hold up—
Did you play any of the previous games?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_120:
Ah, don't sweat it.
They don't call me the "TEKKEN Prof" at my local arcade for nothing. I can show you the ropes, no problem!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_121: Oh, cool, you have? In that case, I'll just fill you in on the important stuff regarding the battle system.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_130: So, what do you think of the new TEKKEN?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_140:
In TEKKEN 8, “aggressive” is the name of the game.
You’re in for some spectacular fights!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_150:
Oh, I almost forgot!
There’s a tournament that only the most famous players are invited to. Let’s check it out!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_151: This special TEKKEN 8 tournament has reached its climax. Will Orochi or Blade walk away as the winner?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_152: The winner will receive a special invitation to compete in the TEKKEN WORLD TOUR Master Event!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_153: Hold on to your hats and get ready for the next battle!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_160: To countless fighting game fans around the world, the wait is finally over!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_170: This special tournament celebrating the launch of TEKKEN 8 is about to commence its final battle!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_180: Get ready for the next battle!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_190:
That was intense! What an incredible display of skill!
Our new champion is Orochi!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_200: Sheesh! They wiped the floor with their opponent!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_210: So, Orochi, any comment on your big win today?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_220:
I'm here for one thing—to become number one in the world.
I’ll crush everyone who stands in my way to the top.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_230: A fitting comment for a future world champion! Please give a huge hand to our winner!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_240:
That speech sent shivers down my spine!
Maybe one day we can be up there basking in the spotlight...
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_250: Hey, did you hear? They've got TEKKEN 8 at Gong now!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_260:
For real?!
Well, the tourney's over now, so we should go check it out.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_01_270: All right! Let's head back to Gong and give it a try!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_021: Man, I love the scramble after a new release to find out who the strongest characters are.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_030:
Everything feels so fresh and new.
Hm... Which character should I go for...
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_031: Let's hurry up and play already!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_032: Give me a holler when you wanna get started. I'll teach you what moves you'll want to use with your character. They don't call me Max the TEKKEN Prof for nothing, after all!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_033: Pick a character you want to fight with. Now, come and challenge me!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_034:
Activate Heat and unleash a Heat Smash!
It's a surefire way to earn yourself a victory. Give it a try in an actual battle!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_035: Oh yeah. I forgot to introduce you to the gang. This is the crew that makes Gong the place to be.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_036: You're a TEKKEN head like the rest of us now, after all.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_037: I'm Beat. Nice to meet ya. I'm pretty new to TEKKEN too, but I can't get enough of it.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_038: I'm all about using stylish moves—putting on a show, you know? Anyway, who do you main?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_039: Hey, I'm Prim. I love how you can show off your personality in TEKKEN with the character customization feature.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_040: With customization, you can show off how you're feeling to others! I call that a win!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_050: Good luck, newbie! I'll fight you anytime you want.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_060:
...Heh heh. Looks like another sucker's wandered in.
It'll be a nice chance to rack up my Rank Points with an easy win.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_070:
I'm a regular at Gong, which is the place to be if you're a TEKKEN fan!
Hit me up anytime you're around!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_080: Looks like you're really climbing the ranks! Speaking of which, I got something for you.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_090: I was thinking about trying my hand at the tournament!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_100:
You see, tournaments are way more fun than normal fights! A totally different kind of buzz.
I'd like to see you out there in the ring.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_110: Wait, you're gonna enter the tournament, too?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_120:
Just so you know, tournaments are a whole other beast. Loosen up your shoulders!
Take it from me—a bit of advice from a pro to a beginner.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_130:
I bet you're nervous about entering your first tournament, but this is just
a friendly competition. Focus on having fun!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_140:
Great! Looks like you're ready to go. Let's go ahead and get started!
Man, I'm so hyped right now!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_140_01: Great! Looks like you're all ready. Let's get started!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_140_02: Man, I'm gettin' so hyped up right now.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_150:
Welcome, everyone, to Gong's first tournament since the launch of TEKKEN 8!
Let me hear you make some noise!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_151: Let's get straight down to it. Players! To your machines!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_160: Feelin' on edge? Take those nerves and use them as fuel to have a good time!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_161: Hey. You're Max's friend, right? I'm Marie. Nice to meet you!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_162: This is your first tournament, right? It's exciting and nerve-racking at the same time, huh?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_170:
Wow, so you made it all the way to the finals!
(Victory is as good as mine!)
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_180: Finals really set your nerves on edge, don't they?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_190: I'm gonna show you how it's done, so get ready to take some notes!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_200:
Congrats on the win! And in your first tournament at that!
Are you some kind of natural-born TEKKEN prodigy?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_210: For real! It's super amazing that you came out on top in your first-ever tournament!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_220: I lost right off the bat, but I don't mind! I had a blast! Hahaha!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_230: I can't believe I stumbled at the finish line...
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_240:
Hey, you there! You're the one who took first place at that other tournament—
Orochi, was it?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_250: It's so cool that you'd come out to Gong!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_260: I was just leaving. Sorry for barging in on you all.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_270: I came hoping to find some competition, but it looks like I'm in the wrong place.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_280:
You couldn't have come to a better place! Besides, you won't know for sure until
you've actually tried fighting everyone, right?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_290:
It's like I've said before—I'm going to be the best in the world.
And in order to make that happen, I need to fight in serious matches.
But here, all I see is...
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_300:
...a bunch of people who only care about how cool their characters look
and never try to actually get stronger.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_310: Who prance around, showing off moves they like, and don't even care if they lose.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_311: Or cowards who shy away from matches they're afraid they'll lose.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_320:
There's no one who I can fight for real.
And I don't have any interest in wasting my time on fake matches.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_330:
You're wrong! TEKKEN is all about playing however you want!
There's no such thing as "real" and "fake"!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_335: I want to enjoy TEKKEN and for Gong to be a fun place to play it together with my friends!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_340: Looks like you're not getting it. You and me, we just don't see eye to eye.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_350:
What are you taking about?
We share the same passion and devotion for TEKKEN, don't we?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_360:
...If you're that serious about TEKKEN, then put your money where your mouth is.
See if you can actually make it to the TEKKEN WORLD TOUR stage.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_370:
I don't mind giving it a go if we battle there.
Although, I doubt that any of you will even rise far enough.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_380: ...Let me get this straight. By your definition, anything less than the most serious of matches is "fake," right? No. I don't buy it. If someone enjoys TEKKEN, then it's real, no matter how they like to play!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_400: We're gonna enter the TEKKEN WORLD TOUR, too!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_410: Let's show Orochi what we're made of!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_420: Now that's what I'm talkin' about!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_430: The TWT is TEKKEN's biggest event, you know. To even be allowed to enter, you've got to win a preliminary tournament.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_440: I know. That's exactly why we've got to fight as many skilled players as we can to up our game.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_450: If you're going to get better, you'll need to battle lots of different opponents to gain experience. Now c'mon, it's time to head out!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_460: We're gonna knock Orochi down a peg or two!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_470: After learning something new, you should put it into practice!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_480: Fight me. Right now. Try out the Heat system!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_490:
You really battled your way to that promotion. Congrats!
Your rank is an indicator of your skill. Keep it up, and you'll climb your way to the top in no time!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_500: Got a feel for using Heat Smash now?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_520: Let's practice an air combo that uses Heat Smash.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_530: TEKKEN just wouldn't be TEKKEN without air combos.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_02_540: Keep this training in mind while you make your rounds around the arcade!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_001: Haven't seen you lot around before.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_002: We're all friends here, so let me show you around. People here call me Turbo.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_003: Thanks, man! Oh, I'm Max, and these are my buddies from my local arcade. I heard there was some serious TEKKEN talent here, so we came to check it out.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_004: Oh, is that right? Hey everyone, these guys came to play some real TEKKEN!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_005: Feel free to challenge anyone here, and we'll show you how to play with style!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_006: Hey, you wanna put in some practice before you go up against your opponent?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_010:
I've got just the training course you'll need to get stronger.
Give me a shout when you're ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_020:
Just a warning—these guys here are pretty strong. It's probably time to use some more
air combos to stack up damage.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_030: Okay, here we go! I'm gonna teach you the key to really laying on the pain: Tornado!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_040: Got it. Just give me a shout whenever you want to practice.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_050:
Let's review the basic steps of air combos:
Launch Move > Tornado > Finishing Move
I want you to burn this into your brain!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_060: Mastering air combos will make TEKKEN even more enjoyable, so try it out in real fights!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_070: Not bad, not bad! Now it's time to move on to the main event.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_080: Show me your skills. Just let me know whenever you're ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_081: The guys here like to throw out powerful moves to fight with style. I'll teach you how to use a Power Crush so you can fight back!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_082: Okay. Let's get started. Learning when to use Power Crush moves will expand your options in battle!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_083: Got it! Just let me know whenever you want to practice.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_084: You can use Power Crushes to aggressively punish your opponent's attacks! Offense can be the best defense, you know!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_085: And now you should be ready to fight.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_086: Once you're ready, let's take the fight to them!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_090: That's some nice style you got going on there.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_100: I'm going all out, and I won't stop even if you cry for forgiveness, all right?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_120:
First, you're gonna go head-to-head with me. If you win, you'll move onto the final match
against Jet. Whaddya think? Sounds fun, right?!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_130:
Yes, let's get the crowd going.
You better "show-off" to the guests who came all the way here!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_140: Show off, have fun, and rise as victor! That's our playing style here at Phoenix.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_160: You beat Turbo? You can't be that shabby of a fighter, then.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_190:
Good game!
You know what, kid? You've got somethin' about you I like.
The name's Jet.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_200: A battle where even the spectators can enjoy themselves... "Show-Off," huh. I like it.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_210:
You're right on the money. A fight that's just as fun for everyone watching as it is
for those who are duking it out. There's nothing better!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_220: A player's playing style is a reflection of their personality and quirks. It's that and discovering your own unique style that make TEKKEN so great.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_230: You ever been to Wonder City, by the way? The players there have a pretty unique play style. You should visit there if you get the chance.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_240: Oh yeah, I know that place. I hear they're super serious about their character customization.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_250: I'd love to see what they go for over there. I think we should check it out!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_260: There's no time like the present. Next stop: Wonder City!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_03_270: You guys take it easy out there. Come back for a rematch anytime!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_001: So this is Wonder City! It's such a cute and delicious-looking place!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_003: This is Wonder City, a venue where you may hone both your beauty and your strength.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_004: I have heard talk about you all. The rookies who defeated the mightiest Phoenix had to offer. It is an honor to welcome you here.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_005: Huh?! You already know about us?! That's crazy!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_006: I hear there're people here who're super serious about their character customization. I'd love to meet them.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_007: Of course. First, we'd appreciate a demonstration of your ability. You'll find challengers here are as every bit skilled as they are elegant.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_008:
Urrrm...
Strength, I can understand, but beauty? What's he going on about?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_009: Your character's appearance, of course! It's wonderful to have your main be both snazzy and strong, isn't it?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_010: Thank you for such an impressive display. Upon notifying my mistress of your prowess, she stated her eagerness to make your acquaintance. Please, if you would follow me.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_010_01: Thank you for those impressive displays. Upon notifying my mistress of your prowess, she has stated her eagerness to make your acquaintance.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_010_02: Please, if you would follow me...
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_020: Welcome. It's truly a pleasure to meet you all. I have heard much about you already.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_030: My faithful butler tells me you do your rumors justice. And as such, I would like to extend to you my invitation to battle. Please approach Bartholomew when you are ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_030_01: My faithful butler tells me you do your rumors justice. And as such, I would like to extend to you my invitation to battle.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_030_02: Please approach Bartholomew when you are ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_040: My mistress is most eager to battle you herself. Are we all quite ready?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_050: Very well. Then let us begin.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_060: My mistress is awaiting your challenge. Please do not keep her waiting too long.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_070:
Allow me to formally introduce myself. My name is 
Bartholomew, the resident butler for Wonder City.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_080: If I may be so bold, I would like to perform a test of your mettle. You may challenge my mistress if I deem you a suitable opponent.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_080_01: Before you battle my mistress, show me your strength and beauty.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_090: Please excuse my unsightly performance, my lady.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_100: I sensed great potential in this player during our match. I believe them to be more than a suitable opponent for you.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_110: Very well. You have my thanks, Bartholomew.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_120: I trust you shall battle me with the elegance and pride that I have come to expect. Oh dear... Just thinking about how many strikes it will take to break you has got me quite excited!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_140: Oh, perfect! How absolutely perfect! I haven't had such a thrilling battle in oh so long. Ladies and gentlemen, please give our superb challenger a hand!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_140_01: Oh, perfect! How absolutely perfect! I haven't had such a thrilling battle in oh so long.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_140_02: Ladies and gentlemen, please give our superb challenger a hand!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_150:
My name is Rufleu. It was an honor to fight against you and witness 
such beautiful fighting skills.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_160: It would appear I require an even better outfit. Nothing quite compares to displaying the true beauty of one's character in battle.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_170: The way you fight so confidently and also your beautiful character outfits... I want to be just like you, but how can I improve?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_180: You must have love for your main. Dress them with your love and adorn them with the greatest garment of all—victory.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_180_01:
You must have love for your main.
 Dress them with your love and adorn them with the greatest garment of all—victory.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_180_02: I know you're capable of doing that, Prim.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_190: Do you happen to know of a delightful place called Neptune? If not, I shall contact them to let them know you're coming.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_200: For real? Sounds like an interesting place. That decides it, then. Next stop: Neptune!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_210:
We're heading out for Neptune next.
You ready?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_220: All right, let's get going then! Can't wait to see what this crowd is all about.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_230: You still got stuff to do here? Never hurts to be too prepared, I guess. Just give me a holler when you're ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_240: Making my character look good is just how I express myself. A way to impart my tastes to my opponent.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_250: I see. So we need to freshen up our outfits before going into battle. Nice catch, Prim. You're the queen of Gong fashion!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_260: After a little snooping, I found out they keep their defenses up here. I imagine they don't like getting their customized characters dirty.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_270: You should learn some low attacks and throws to get through their block! Just let me know when you're ready to go.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_280: From what I've seen, the guys here really do keep their block up. Some moves to break your opponent's defenses should prove useful. Want to give them a try?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_290: Roger that. The TEKKEN Prof is ready to take you to the next level!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_300: Huh, okay. Just hit me up any time you change your mind.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_310: So, think you're ready to break through the opponent's block?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_310_01: That's looking good. Okay, I'll change up the recommended moves.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_310_02: For a strong defensive opponent, use low attacks and throws!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_320: For a strong defensive opponent, you'll need low attacks and throws. Now get battling! Experience is the best teacher, you know!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_330: Their moves are just as elegant and varied as their looks.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_340: The more moves we can dish out, the better! Increase your technique repartee to take your main to new levels!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_04_350: I wrote down some recommended moves for you. Check them out any time.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_010:
Out of sight! Listen up, guys and gals!
Some real cool cats have just blessed
the Neptune scene with their good vibes.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_010_01: Out of sight! Listen up, guys and gals! An amazing guest just walked into Neptune!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_010_02: Some real cool cats have just blessed the Neptune scene with their good vibes.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_020: Whoa. Just how much did Rufleu hype us up to these guys?!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_030: We're all real happy you cats brought the party to our funky little arcade.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_040: Now, I don't need to be a mind reader to know why you're here. You came to battle—am I right, or am I right?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_050: I'm preparing a little shindig for you now. Why don't you boogie with the local cats while I put on the finishing touches. Once you get a groove started, we can get the party into full swing.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_050_01:
I'm preparing a little shindig for you now.
Why don't you boogie with the local cats while I put on the finishing touches.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_050_02: Once you get a groove started, we can get the party into full swing.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_060: With a welcome like this, it'd be rude to not give it our all. Your trusty TEKKEN Prof has got your back like always with some more special training. Give me a shout when you're ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_060_01: Th-this is one hell of a place... With a crazy welcome like this, it'd be rude to not give it our all.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_060_02: I've got just the training course you'll need to take this place on. Give me a shout when you're ready.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_070: The music and vibe in this place are fire! And we need to match that fire—using the Heat system! Ready for some practice?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_080:
All right!
Class is in session with the TEKKEN Prof. Time to heat things up!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_090: Got it. Just ask whenever you want to practice.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_100: Using a Heat Dash feels amazing, doesn't it! Even I've gotten all fired up and I was only showing you how it's done!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_110: Keep in mind that Heat Dashes can be used not only in offensive sequences, but also to increase your air combo damage.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_115: Aim to work in some Heat Dashes in your next fight!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_120: Out of sight! The dance floor's on fire, and it's all thanks to you!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_130: Battling's like a big party for us. Ain't nothing better than feelin' the excitement on the floor after a good battle.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_05_140: Right on. Battling is a way to communicate with one another. Love and peace, baby!

TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_09_010: So this is the place. They have TEKKEN, sure, but there's also something different about the vibe here.
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_09_020: I've heard that you can fight a slightly different kind of battle here. They call them Super Ghost Battles! Isn't it cool being able to fight your own Ghost?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_09_030:
Okay. Let me give you the lowdown.

TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_09_040: Give it a try. I'll be right here to explain everything!
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_09_050: So, what's it like fighting your own Ghost? Every time you get stronger, it'll get stronger too. Pretty sweet, right?
TEXT_000_AQ_STORY_09_060: Battling your Ghost will give you the chance to objectively review your gameplay. You should try to battle with it regularly! You'll be best friends with your Ghost before you know it, trust me!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TALK000_000: Seeing the passion that players at this arcade have for the game gets me so hyped up. Any one of them could be a future champion in the making.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TALK000_010: I'm something of an expert spectator. I travel to arcades far and wide to witness battles that get my pulse racing.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TALK001_000: I hear there's a player who's practically undefeated in the tournament scene. Rumor has it they go from arcade to arcade searching for worthy opponents.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TALK002_000: S'up. Oh, you wanna battle? Sure. I was literally just staring at the character select screen until you said something.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_000: So, let's say you've got a move that hits mid three times, okay?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_000_001:
Now say you stop on the second attack and follow up with a low.
It'll probably catch your opponent off guard, yes?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_001:
Some players always side ukemi. This makes their opponent's life easy because
they'll figure out pretty quickly when to go in for a mix up.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_002: Pretty much every character can perform an easy-to-use mid attack with . If it hits you can mix it up; if it gets blocked, be ready to react to what comes next.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_002_001: Advanced players are great at creating openings using this tactic.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_003:
How do you ace mix ups? First and foremost is low attacks—always go for the shins!

The math doesn't really add up when you think about it,
but I guess they just really wanted to emphasize how crucial it is to use low attacks aggressively.

So once you've finished a combo, you need to be thinking about your next move as they're getting up.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_082_001: The way your opponent starts a match can tell you a lot about them.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_082_002: One of the best ways to win is to watch your opponent closely.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_083_001: It's good to be aware of your distance from the wall while you're doing an air combo.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_083_002: That's not easy to do to start with, of course.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_084_001: If you can land your opponent on the wall, you can get in more follow-up attacks.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_084_002: That also means having your back to the wall puts you at a disadvantage. Try not to get put in that position.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_085_002: You want to get a pic of me too? Then we must fight!

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_235_001: Do you know about advance inputs? Before a move ends, there's a period of time when the next input is registered. This is handy while doing combos and the like!

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_304_001: I'm trying to remember all the moves in the Move List, but there's just so many it's making my head spin. What should I do?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_305_001: The Move List is handy for memorizing moves, but it's not easy committing them all to memory. Check out the Main Techniques tab and try to copy the moves in there.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_306_001: TEKKEN is played in a 3D space, so sidestepping is very important. Even when your back's against a wall, you can sidestep to escape. Yeah, just like how we're positioned now...
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_307_001: Just gunning straight for me isn't going to work. Why's that, you ask? Heh, it's because I can use sidestep to dodge linear attacks.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_307_002: Well now, you want to take me on? I'd be more than happy, of course! I shall sidestep so gracefully around you, that it will almost be like we are dancing.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_307_003: Heh... Looks like you had your dancing shoes on as well. How disappointing.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_307_004: Were my magnificent sidesteps to your liking? Were you enchanted by their grace? Heh, well, feel free to come and admire me anytime.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_308_001: I was able to win with just Homing Attacks. I almost feel sorry for the other guy.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_308_002: You wanna battle? Sure thing. Try to actually attack, though. Just don't sidestep all match!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_308_003: You can't win with Homing Attacks alone, huh... I knew that.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_308_004: It's important to know when to sidestep and use Homing Attacks. TEKKEN's got layers, you know. How about another match?

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_523_001: It is essential to study your opponent's character; if you know your enemy and yourself, you'll never be in danger.... The Practice Mode's "Punishment Training" in particular is unmatched when it comes to knowing your enemy.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_524_001:
Many people get fired up for a rematch after losing, but it's the matches you lose that
always offer hints on how to improve your game. So after a loss, slow down, and take
some time to reflect on it.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_524_002: My Replays & Tips show you hints during a match replay, and allows you practice sections where a hint shows up. So when you do lose, it's best to watch a replay of your loss ASAP!

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_700_002: I still can't get one over you, huh. Let's do this again, okay.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_700_003: I may have won, but I know you'll get stronger still. I'm down for a rematch any time.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_701_001: I love winning in style! I think part of the fun is finding a play style that works for you.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_701_004: There's something about the way you play that's captivating, you know.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_702_002: Damn, you really are good. You've also got style to boot.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_702_003: Have you warmed up a bit now? Let's fight again!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_703_001: Greetings. Is there something you need?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_703_002: Oh, my. You're inviting me to battle?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_703_004: Oh, my. Have you perhaps become just a little infatuated?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_704_002: Very well. I shan't hold back, then!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_704_003: H-How vexing. You truly are worthy of my mistress's recognition.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_704_004: You understand I could not allow you to just keep winning. Not with my mistress's reputation at stake.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_705_002: Man, do I love battling you or what!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_705_003: What's got you in a funk? Come on, I know you can boogie better than that!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_706_001: Let's heat this battle up! C'mon!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_707_001: Aww man, am I still not grooving hard enough?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_707_002: You got the whole dance floor bumping now. I can dig it.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_708_002: It's gonna take more than that to break me now! Let's fight again sometime.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_LOBBYTALK_708_003: Phew, that was a close one. Any time you want to fight, come find me!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SPOTTALK_03_000:
Finally on our way to a new arcade!
We gotta up our game to get on Orochi's level!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GRF_001: I might be a bit too strong for you... Is that okay with you?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GRF_002: Wake up, play TEKKEN, take a shower, sleep, repeat. I think that sounds like a good day.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GRF_003: TEKKEN is so deep and complex. That's why it's so fun!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_PIG_001: I think you and I would make for a heated match.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_PIG_002: Everyone's so strong... I don't have the money to play Tekken anymore...
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_ANT_001: I hone my skills in battle, that's my style.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_ANT_002: I'm sure it'll all work out in the end.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GRL_001: No words can describe how happy I get when I find a combo that no one's ever seen before.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GRL_002: Hey! Apparently, it's an all-you-can-heat! Such a good deal.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_PGN_001:
I'm in disguise so that my mentor won't recognize me, but it's making it difficult
to see the screen...
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_PGN_002: Today's my day! Doesn't feel like I'm gonna lose!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_PGN_003:
When the opponent sends you into the air, repeatedly tap to shift to ukemi.
You can punch to move to the background and kick to roll to the foreground.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_PGN_004: Don't get any stronger than that! Don't open the gates to Hell!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_RAT_001: I'm gonna go on a 20-game win streak!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_RAT_002: Pinky promise you'll take it easy on me!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_DER_001: The fastest way to improve your skills is to reflect on the matches you've lost.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_DER_003: You should time an attack reversal with your opponent's attack.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_HMS_001:
The thorns of this individual, as beautiful as a rose, just pierce through my heart.
(Lili is so cute!)
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_HMS_002: Who cares about techniques. It's all about having fun playing your favorite character.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_HMS_003: I'm always looking for new ideas. Having a flexible mind is the path to growth and victory.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_AML_001:
The thing about TEKKEN is, you get a rush when you win.
And when you lose...you just spend hours contemplating what you did wrong.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_AML_002: I could spend all day customizing.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_KAL_002: I'm planning to ask my girlfriend to marry me when I get skilled enough to become a pro-gamer!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_SNK_001: I can take you down with just one leg.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_SNK_002: I think the deciding factor when choosing a character should be their appearance.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_SNK_004: Hi, I'm Nakatsu, the game director. What is my favorite food? The answer is after the battle!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CHT_001:
It's important to understand the situation, consider risks and benefits,
and to be mindful of the right timing.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CHT_002: It's super convenient having an ATM nearby!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CHT_003: I mean, I can have fun just pressing the buttons. I'm being serious.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CHT_004: It's time to put it to the test... So what's stronger, your human strength or my TEKKEN Prowess?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_BSN_001:
Don't worry if you lose rank, you can always come back.
Trust me when I say you'll be stronger than you were before.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_BSN_002: Don't be afraid of failure. It's proof that you challenged yourself.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_BBN_001: Who do you think you're talking to? You are talking to my illusion.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_BBN_002:
I think as long as you have fun, it's still a win even if you lose.
Right? Yeah, I'm right.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CRW_001: Sorry, but I see a future where you lose.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CRW_002: It's so fun when your opponent catches you off-guard with unexpected moves!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_MNT_003: TEKKEN isn't all about winning. It's also about having fun with your favorite characters.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_JLY_002: So I do that after this, and after this, I do that...and after that... Wait, huh?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_JLY_003: If you get knocked down near a wall, don't get up backwards. You'll be sure to regret it.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CTR_003: Strong characters with easy moves are great!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CML_002: I cannot see you, and I could care less. I am concentrating on myself.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CML_003:
And these rules, they aren't all-inclusive. When someone gets disqualified,
just know that it will be my victory.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_CML_004: I am the creator of Ghosts.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_WLF_002: Mr. Lee has become a star in the night sky.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_KLW_001: It will be my pleasure to fight you.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_KLW_002:
Even if you lose, even if you're weak... Never give up!
There is surely a path waiting for you! Let's keep it positive and do our best!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_KLW_003: Don't ask me for xxxx! Shut up and sit the hell down!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_KMD_002: My feet have minds of their own, so you better be careful.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_KMD_003: Oh, so you would like to join the Martial Arts Club for Seniors, too?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GHP_001: I prefer playing with the arcade stick.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_GHP_002: I can't see the lower section.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_HRS_001: I can see the lower section.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_RBT_002: I'll shift to Hunting and wait for you.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_LON_001: I see, so you wanna test out the new characters.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_LON_002: So you're my opponent? Lookin' forward to it.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_ZBR_001: Heh heh heh... It seems you've noticed me. Are you also one of "us"?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_ZBR_002: I hope my passion has reached you!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_GHOST_TALK_ZBR_003: Still on seven, motion on eight. That's the ultimate attack!
TEXT_000_CVAA_Section_Info_001: Turn text to speech on or off.
