TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_010: Lars Alexandersson had risen in revolt against the Mishima Zaibatsu, forming the rebel army Yggdrasil.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_020: He bolstered his forces to oppose the Mishima Zaibatsu and G Corporation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_030:
The immense power struggle that unfolded between these two massive conglomerates
had brought the world and its people to the very brink of annihilation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_040: Soon thereafter, he heard the announcement of The King of Iron Fist Tournament to select the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_050: Lars resolved to join the tournament, and gain the authority he needed to put an end to the global pandemonium.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_010: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, we can't let it pass us by.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_060: G Corporation forces are trying to take over the world.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_070: But we of the rebel army refuse to let that happen on our watch!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_080: We've gathered state-of-the-art flying boats in good number.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_090: So, too, do we have the latest weaponry.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_120: There's plenty of fun to be had as well.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_130: You're certain to have the time of your life!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_140: Come! We want YOU to join the rebel army!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_150: Join now, and we will provide a high-performance battlesuit when you enlist.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_160: There's no need to worry about raids from G Corp.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_170: We have reliable allies on our side:
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_MNT_010: Count on me to watch your back, guys!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_SYS_190: Join us in our fight for freedom.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_020: Our victory is assured. I'll be waiting for you!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_WLF_020: Wow, it's like you were made for the camera, Lars.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_030: You did pretty well yourself, Alisa.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_050: I hope many of our comrades answer the call.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_MNT_050: I'm sure we'll get a whole bunch of applications!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_060: With more personnel, we won't have to put so much on your shoulders.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_MNT_060: Oh, Lars. You don't need to worry about me.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_070: I can't help but worry about you.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LZD_LZD_080: We've got plenty of work ahead of us.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_010: Violet Systems, the company run by Lee Chaolan, had reached a turning point with its next-gen battlesuits.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_020:
Despite their excellent performance and myriad features, they would require the use of live field tests
to advertise their appeal before they could begin a global rollout.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_030: Around this time, news reached the company president's ears:
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_040: the announcement of the next The King of Iron Fist Tournament, organized by the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_050: Lee had been looking for a way to make an effective PR push, and decided to enter the tournament to do just that.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_WLF_010: Well, it looks like I'll have to show the public what these marvels can do.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_060: Now the head of the Mishima Zaibatsu, he began mass-producing the next-gen battle suit he used in the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_SYS_070: These suits were used to put an end to the war, boosting his influence even further.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_WLF_030: Here I stand, at the top of the world!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_WLF_050: Some good news would be the icing on this proverbial cake.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_S04_020: The Violet Systems peacekeeping unit has just been ambushed,
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_S04_030: and they are taking heavy losses across the board.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_WLF_090: Hey, Hachi! Bring up the live footage.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_WLF_100: I can see they won't make this easy. Very well, I suppose it's time for me to shine.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_WLF_WLF_110: Watch the place while I'm gone, Hachi.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_SYS_010: Nina Williams led the Tekken Force raid on the rebel army hideout to capture Jin Kazama, former head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_SYS_020:
The raid was cut short due to the tactics of Lee Chaolan,
causing her to quit the Mishima Zaibatsu and return to her assassin-for-hire roots.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_SYS_030: One day, she heard the announcement of a new The King of Iron Fist Tournament to select the new head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_SYS_040:
She stood on the sidelines at first, but a certain client asked her to join the tournament
and handle all those who would side with G Corporation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_KAL_010: The client is Lee Chaolan... That man has some nerve.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_S00_010:
TOMORROW, 1:00 PM
SMITH'S COFFEE, URBAN SQUARE
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_WLF_010: And for precisely what purpose have you called me all the way out here?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KAL_KAL_060: That was for blowing up the whole building.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_010: Hoping to focus on repaying his debts, Marshall Law sought an assistant instructor for his dojo and chose the martial artist Feng Wei.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_020: His offer was refused, and he had nothing to show for his efforts.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_040: When Law stopped by his dojo, he found that it had been seized as collateral for his debts while he was gone.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_015: The struggling dojo owner, Marshall Law, was up to his neck in debt.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_025: He searched far and wide for a skilled instructor to help him restore the dojo, but all of his efforts were in vain.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_035: Then, upon returning home, he found that his precious dojo had been seized as collateral for his debts.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_050: He then heard of the latest The King of Iron Fist Tournament, and learned that control of the Mishima Zaibatsu was on the line.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_SYS_060: Left with no other options, Law prepared to unleash his fighting spirit and get his hands on the Mishima Zaibatsu's deep coffers.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_GRF_010: You've been contacted by the UN.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PIG_GRF_020: In regards to the wars caused by Mishima Zaibatsu... They've sent you a bill for damages.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRF_SYS_010: Aiming to be the greatest fighter in the universe, the passionate Paul Phoenix sought out any opportunity to test his might.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRF_SYS_020:
Hearing rumors of an upcoming tournament that would definitely fit the bill,
he journeyed high into the mountains to train with his good buddy, Marshall Law.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRF_SYS_030: Just then, The King of Iron Fist Tournament was officially announced in order to determine the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRF_SYS_040: Parting with Law, Paul finished up his training, and set out for the tournament with a crisp new edge to his punches.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRF_GRF_010: Victory is mine! Time to go pick up Law.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRF_GRF_030: We're on our way to win the Iron Fist Tournament!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_SYS_010: The last time The King of Iron Fist Tournament was held, Lili lost to her eternal rival, Asuka Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_SYS_020:
The Rochefort heiress devoted herself to training, 
waiting for a chance at a rematch to regain her lost honor.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_SYS_030: One day, news of the tournament to decide the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu reached Lili's ears.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_SYS_040:
Seeing her rival's name on the roster, she went behind her father's back to enter the tournament
and put her Asuka countermeasures to good use.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_010: Just you wait, Asuka. You will get what's coming to you.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_020: I shall make a promise to you all.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_030: As the head of the Mishima Zaibatsu,
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_JLY_020: You're the head of Mishima Zaibatsu now. It's expected of you.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_100: I have no interest in sitting at the head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_PIG_020: What are you two rich people talking about?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_PIG_030: If you're talking about ways to earn money, I want in!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_110: By the way, about Smith's Coffee...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_120: I heard that you are not in charge of it, Sir Leroy.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_JLY_040: I have them let me check-
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_160: That was an enjoyable dance, indeed.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_170: It would seem my personality is well-suited to combat after all.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HMS_HMS_180: I shall take my leave, sir.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_SYS_010: While investigating the death of mother Emma, Leo miraculously managed to reunite with long-lost father, Niklas Kliesen.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_SYS_020:
A world-renowned archaeologist, Niklas had narrowly escaped from one of the Mishima Zaibatsu's excavation sites,
and had been on the run from them ever since.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_SYS_030:
Fortunately, Leo heard the news of The King of Iron Fist Tournament 
that would decide the new head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_SYS_040:
As the head of the organization, Leo's father's safety could be secured
and they could remain together; so Leo decided to join the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_GHP_010: Wait for me, Father. I'll win it all, I swear to you!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_GHP_020: You found these incredible ruins, Father?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_NIK_060: No, there's nothing wrong. It's just so...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_NIK_080: Run! It's just like the stone spheres of Costa Rica!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_GHP_080: ...Oh no! The whole place's about to collapse!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_NIK_090: Goodness, an unfortunate accident indeed. This'll be our secret, yes?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GHP_NIK_100: Come, Leo, we'll escape through there!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_010: Upon discovering that his biological mother was Nina Williams, Steve Fox solved the mystery surrounding his origins.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_020: Having lost his purpose, a visit from sparring partners Paul Phoenix and Marshall Law spurred the boxer toward a new goal.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_030: Fortunately, he heard news of The King of Iron Fist Tournament that would decide the new head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_040: Steve decided to join the tournament with plans to use the Mishima Zaibatsu coffers in service of his new goal.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_BSN_010: I can't change the past, but I can forge my own future!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_GRF_010: So this is his new gym.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_GRF_020: He is the organizer of the biggest boxing tournament in the world now after all.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_PIG_020: Man. Must be nice to be rich.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_050: With the Mishima Zaibatsu's assets at his disposal, Steve hosts a boxing tournament on a scale the likes of which had never been seen.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_060: First, he easily claimed the title of middleweight champion.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_070: Followed by the super middleweight title...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_SYS_100: One after another, the championship belts fell into his hands.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_GRF_030: That belt means he's won four different weight divisions.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_PIG_050: He's finally ready for the heavyweight champion next.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_GRF_060: Hey, Steve. We're here to bother you!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BSN_BSN_030: Yo, you two, long time no see.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_SYS_010: In his quest to become all-powerful, Feng Wei followed the teachings of the Shinken scrolls, overcoming masters of various styles.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_SYS_020: Despite his intensive studies, he lost to the Wing Chun master Leroy Smith in the previous The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_SYS_030: There would be no progress until he managed to defeat Leroy. Thus, Feng entered the new tournament when it was announced.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_SYS_040:
"Defeat all other masters and conquer their styles; the perfect warrior transcends all to become the Dragon God."
So say the Shinken scrolls.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_KLW_010: I shall not face the same disgrace again. Just you wait, Leroy Smith.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_SYS_050: Feng Wei defeated Leroy Smith and claimed victory at the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_SYS_060: Yet the Kenpo master felt no conceit, devoting himself to reaching even greater heights.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KLW_KLW_060: (At last, I have conquered the very heavens!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_SYS_010: One day, Asuka Kazama returned to the Kazama-Style Traditional Martial Arts dojo to find it completely changed.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_SYS_020: Lili had purchased the property and decided to renovate the entire building with the rose ornamentation that she loved so much.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_SYS_030: However, Lili was willing to restore the dojo to its former appearance if Asuka could defeat her at The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_SYS_050: Upon seeing the message, Asuka decided to join the upcoming tournament, swearing to take back her dojo.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_DER_010: No kidding! You better believe I'll win this!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_DER_020: The dojo's right as rain again.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_DER_030: I hope our disciples come back soon.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_DER_040: (Now that I think about it, I haven't seen Lili since all that went down...)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_HMS_020: I went all around Japan crushing dojos...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_HMS_030: I'd say it went quite well!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_HMS_060: My intention to buy up your dojo was a mistake.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_HMS_070: It is something that needs to be won through a fair fight.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_HMS_100: I'll pay you back for the tournament!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_DER_120: Seems you've been doing more than just lifting weights, huh?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_HMS_120: The essence of the Kazama Style...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_DER_DER_150: You have no right to talk about the Kazama Style!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_SYS_010:
Personal security specialist Shaheen received a request from a Monaco oil magnate
to secretly protect his daughter from assassins sent by G Corporation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_SYS_020: The organization was well-known by him; he suspected their involvement in the death of the friend who bequeathed him his sword.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_SYS_030: Just then, his client said she was joining The King of Iron Fist Tournament, held by G Corp's adversary, the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_SYS_040: Shaheen decided that he too would join the tournament and headed to the arena with the sword of his late friend.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HRS_010: Your designs end here, G Corporation scum!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SYS_S07_060: And now we'll witness history in the making!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SYS_S07_070: After countless heated battles and incredible match-ups...a winner has emerged to claim control of the Mishima Zaibatsu!
DER_TW_014: Boy, you're a tough one. You're not gonna let us down!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HMS_040: You gave me quite the fright, jumping in out of nowhere.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HMS_050: I can hardly believe they targeted me from such a distance.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_DER_020: You risked your life to protect her, right? Doesn't get much cooler than that.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_DER_030: Like this, right? Or maybe more like this...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HMS_060: The G Corporation cadre have been apprehended as well.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HMS_070: Surely the comrade who gave you that sword can rest in peace.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HRS_060: I think you may be right.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HMS_080: You know, I would be amenable to extending your bodyguard contract indefinitely...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_DER_040: I wouldn't recommend it. You'd need more lives than a cat to keep this one safe.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HRS_070: You girls offer no end of amusement.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_HMS_090: Indeed. Lunkheads like Asuka need to be pretty stout if they're to make for a worthy opponent.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_HRS_DER_050: Hey! You making fun of me?!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CHT_SYS_010: A replicant containing a perpetual motion machine, Bryan Fury is a berserker who stops at nothing to get what he wants.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CHT_SYS_020:
Having rampaged across the world's battlefields,
the recent dearth of large-scale combat left the replicant yearning for such savage thrills.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CHT_SYS_030: While searching for a new challenge, Bryan heard of The King of Iron Fist Tournament to select the new head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CHT_SYS_040: Bryan rushed to join the fray, seeing the tournament as the perfect opportunity to realize his goal: a world dominated by violence.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CHT_SYS_050:
DISTANCE TO BRYAN FURY'S PRIVATE FIRING RANGE:
3 KILOMETERS
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_SYS_010: Victor Chevalier is the legendary founder of the UN's independent forces unit and is known by his codename: Phantom Raven.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_SYS_020:
The admiral worked tirelessly for world peace,
and to end the ever-expanding conflict between the Mishima Zaibatsu and G Corporation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_SYS_030: Amidst his efforts, The King of Iron Fist Tournament was announced in order to choose the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_SYS_040:
Believing a UN-controlled conglomerate could bring an end to the war,
Victor took up his beloved Takemikazuchi blade and joined the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_LON_010: When it comes to the global balance of power, we'd best be the ones calling the shots.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_S15_010: It was good that Admiral Victor won and brought Mishima Zaibatsu under the UN's control, but...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_S15_020: The G Corporation hasn't stopped causing violence.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_S16_010: Yeah. We're almost at the port. I hope nothing happens.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_LON_020: Who told you to shoot here, you imbecile!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_LON_030: Stand down! I'll take care of this.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_LON_090: You guys can take care of the cleanup.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_LON_100: I've got a lady I can't bear to keep waiting.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_S15_040: Don't tell me he deployed a submarine to impress a woman.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_LON_S15_050: (So that's why he didn't have his sword...)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_010: Azucena Milagros Ortiz Castillo manages Ortiz Farm, a producer of quality coffee beans in Peru.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_020:
Believing a PR campaign would revive her flagging business,
the young proprietor slammed into the American MMA scene like a comet falling to Earth.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_030: After her debut, Azucena saw The King of Iron Fist Tournament as a means to maintain her trajectory of success.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_040:
Given the countless products she'd come up with during her bouts,
she decided to join the tournament and further Ortiz Farm's global expansion.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_010: Nothing like a few rounds in the ring to help me think up new products.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_050: During the tournament, Azucena met the tea-loving socialite, Lili.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_060: Even after the tournament concluded, the pair would continue to clash in heated debate, a feud between coffee and tea.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_HMS_010: Nothing like a spot of tea after a meal.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_HMS_020: And the Rochefort Rose tea cultivated by my family is in a league of its own.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_020: You for real?! It's gotta be coffee!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_030: And the Azucena Blend from my farm is the cream of the crop!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_040: Say, which would YOU rather drink?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_050: It's like talking to a brick wall... Oh, I know!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_060: Why not try a blend of both?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_HMS_030: I've heard such beverages are common throughout Asia.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_HMS_040: That, I fear, is a clear case of cultural appropriation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_070: No need to be such a buzzkill.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_100: It's sure to be a hit!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_110: My flashes of inspiration never fail!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_CAT_130: See? Four out of five alpacas agree.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CAT_SYS_070: Azucena would go on to sell this drink to global acclaim.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_SYS_010:
An agent and ninjutsu master tasked with special ops missions
for the UN's independent force established by Victor Chevalier. Codename: Raven.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_SYS_020:
In order to deal with the worsening chaos of current world affairs,
Raven trained diligently under the master who taught Eastern martial arts to Victor.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_SYS_030: As he honed his fighting skills, the now-headless Mishima Zaibatsu announced The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_SYS_040: With his training complete, Raven decided to join the tournament in hopes of placing the Mishima Zaibatsu under UN control.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_BBN_040: I am sorry to interrupt, sir.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_LON_010: There you are. That was quite a fight you put up out there.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_LON_020: I have to admit, I haven't felt my blood boil like that for a tour or two.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_BBN_070: Raven is dead? What does this mean?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_BBN_080: Huh?! How did that get there?!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_LON_040: Listen up, Raven. From now on, you'll be commanding the squad under a new codename: Great Raven.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_LON_050: I got a lady waiting for me down at the port. Keep up the good work now, you hear?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_BBN_LON_060: I leave things in your capable hands.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_AML_SYS_010:
Several years ago, Jun Kazama faced the mighty Ogre in Yakushima,
where she narrowly escaped death by fleeing to the Kazama Sanctum.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_AML_SYS_020:
As she drifted in and out of consciousness, she was overcome with scenes of a deadly struggle
between her beloved, Kazuya Mishima, and son, Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_AML_SYS_030: Upon waking from her long nightmare, Jun realized her visions were a reflection of how the pair stood in the real world.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_AML_SYS_040: She set off for Italy to put an end to this quarrel between father and son.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_AML_AML_010: Kazuya, Jin... I'll save the both of you, I swear it.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_AML_AML_060: So that was all a dream...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_SYS_010: Jin Kazama, driven by the devil's blood in his veins, plunged the world into chaos and conflict as head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_SYS_020: In order to control the devil within him, Jin headed home to Yakushima, where an unbelievable reunion awaited him.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_SYS_030: It was the woman who went missing due to Ogre's assault several years prior: his mother, Jun Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_SYS_040: Reunited with his mother once more, Jin began a journey of spiritual training to face his inner psyche and prepare for the battles ahead.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_ANT_010: I'll make the devil's blood my own, if it's the last thing I do!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_ANT_040: (Don't just mindlessly throw out a counter...)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_ANT_060: (When he sends out a tsunami kick...)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_AML_040: Make sure you clean your plate, you hear?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ANT_ANT_130: I bet I'll win next time.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_SYS_010: Ling Xiaoyu searched all around the world in order to find the missing Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_SYS_020:
Despite multiple reported sightings throughout the Middle East, his trail suddenly went cold,
thereby preventing their reunion from happening.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_SYS_030:
Around this time, she caught word of the latest The King of Iron Fist Tournament,
and its goal of determining the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_SYS_040:
Thinking her victory and access to the conglomerate's resources would help her track down Jin,
Xiaoyu decided to enter the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_RAT_010: Wait for me, Jin. I'll find you, no matter what it takes.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_RAT_020: I've become head of the Mishima Zaibatsu, and settled our feud with G Corporation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_RAT_030: I swear I'll do everything in my power to maintain world peace.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_RAT_050: Where have you run off to again, Jin...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_RAT_160: I can't believe you were so close all this time.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_RAT_170: Hey Jin... The thing is, I...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_TTR_010: (You finally got to meet him, Xiaoyu.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RAT_CTR_020: May the light of Sirius extinguish the shadows!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SYS_010: The Taekwondo master Hwoarang remained determined to settle the score with his longtime rival, the missing Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SYS_020:
He went to the Middle East in search of Jin, where he found and fought him in his devil form.
But UN interference caused Hwoarang to lose sight of him.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SYS_030:
He returned home and resumed training, only to hear of the Mishima Zaibatsu announcing
the next entry in The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SYS_040: Jin was still nowhere to be found, but Hwoarang joined the tournament without a hint of hesitation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SNK_010: Come on out, Jin Kazama. You can't keep running forever...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SNK_030: (There's no point in winning if I don't beat him!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SNK_040: Where the hell you at, Jin?!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SNK_SNK_070: Well, shit... Took you long enough.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SWL_SYS_010: Jin Kazama, once consumed by devil's blood, declared war on the world as head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SWL_SYS_020:
Deeming Jin to be a high-risk target, the UN forces moved to annihilate Lars Alexandersson's
rebel army that was providing him with shelter.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SWL_SYS_030: An orbital strike launched from a satellite annihilated the rebel army hideout, and his protectors fell one after another.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SWL_SYS_040: The UN's actions enraged Jin, causing him to lose control and set the devil loose in pursuit of vengeance.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SWL_SWL_010: I'll kill every last one of you!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_SYS_010: Kazuya Mishima defeated Heihachi Mishima, the head of the Mishima Zaibatsu, and put an end to their protracted rivalry.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_SYS_020: Heihachi disappeared after losing the match against Kazuya and, without a head, the Mishima Zaibatsu spiraled into crisis.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_SYS_030: To elect a new head of the organization, the group announced it was holding a new entry in The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_SYS_040: This was the chance that Kazuya had been waiting for: the chance to achieve total world domination.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_GRL_010: I'll carve my name into history as the overlord of this world.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_S00_010: KAZUYA MISHIMA: A Life Of Conflict
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_S00_020: His Thoughts on Conquering the World
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_GRL_040: The path I've tread is one consumed by conflict.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_GRL_050: And our first encounter was on the field of battle.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_GRL_060: Conflict and combat are a regular part of my life.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_GRL_070: I have no use for weaklings.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_GRL_GRL_130: Anything and everything shall be mine!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_SYS_010: Reina, the secret daughter of Heihachi Mishima, attended Mishima Polytechnical School.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_SYS_020: She loved and respected her father, whom she saw as a role model. But Heihachi vanished after his defeat by Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_SYS_030: The now-headless Mishima Zaibatsu put on a new The King of Iron Fist Tournament in order to choose a new head of the organization.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_SYS_040: Reina entered the tournament to take over the Mishima Zaibatsu, and carry on her father's legacy.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_ZBR_010: I promise you, Father. I'll make the Mishima Zaibatsu mine.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_ZBR_040: So that's the answer the world's shoved down our throats.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_ZBR_080: You think you're all high and mighty!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_ZBR_110: I'll be the one to build the world anew.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_ZBR_120: Heihachi, my father... Your legacy shall endure through the ages!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_ZBR_ZBR_140: You better put up a fight.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_SYS_010: Claudio Serafino is the most powerful practitioner of an ancient exorcist group known as the Sirius Marksmen.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_SYS_020: One day, he was visited by Zafina, a mysterious woman with an evil aura emanating from her left hand.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_SYS_030: The young warrior beseeched Claudio to help her destroy the creature sealed within her arm: Azazel, the original devil.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_SYS_040: Hearing that the devil gene's progenitor would soon resurrect, the exorcist vowed to defeat Azazel and the rest of his ilk.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_CTR_010: Hear me, demons... The light of Sirius shall end your reign of terror!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_CTR_030: O ancient evil... Your malevolence shall threaten the world no longer.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_CTR_070: The seed of calamity has been vanquished.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_CTR_080: As long as the Sirius Marksmen exist...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_CTR_090: Demons have no place in this world...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CTR_CTR_110: Consign yourselves to the darkness, now and forevermore.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_SYS_010: Azazel, the resurrected original devil, had been sealed in Zafina's left arm several months prior.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_SYS_020: And yet, the pulsation of his evil had grown stronger by the day.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_SYS_030: Zafina sought out Claudio Serafino, the most powerful practitioner of the Sirius Marksmen.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_SYS_040: The exorcist revealed that Azazel must materialize if he is to be destroyed completely.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_SYS_050: And so, Zafina embarked on a journey to bestow a temporary measure of strength to the demon.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_CRW_010: When you dared show your face again, Azazel... That was your demise.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_CRW_030: Power of the Devil! Return to my left arm!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_CRW_080: (The devil's power has now been sealed inside this crystal!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_CTR_010: Prepare to be destroyed, original devil!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_CRW_120: With this, millennia of fighting comes to an end.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CRW_CRW_140: I will embark on a new journey.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_SYS_010: After excelling in its performance tests, Jack-7 was officially adopted as the main humanoid weapon of G Corporation.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_SYS_020:
Amidst the mass-production of Jack-7s, Jane threw herself into the development of a new model,
featuring revolutionary specs befitting a next-gen machine.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_SYS_030: Just as her work was to come to fruition, the Mishima Zaibatsu announced the next entry in The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_SYS_040: Jane completed Jack-8's combat data collection and made the final adjustments for the new machine to enter the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S01_010: Go get 'em, my sweet Jack! Collect data on their battle movements and power up!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S08_010: The tournament ends with Jack-8 as the victor.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S08_020: Mishima Zaibatsu's King of Iron Fist Tournament was held in an arena the other day.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S08_030: Martial artists from around the world gathered and fought fierce battles to see who would take over as head of Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S08_040: G Corporation's newest cyborg weapon, Jack-8, took down one powerful fighter after another to become the champion.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S08_050: Jack-8 improved with every iteration and a large-scale redesign. His new functions were a hot topic before the tournament even started.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S08_060: After winning the tournament, G Corporation decided to make him their next primary weapon and said they would begin making adjustments to suit his design for mass production.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S01_040: Okay, let's check the data you collected!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CCN_S01_090: You didn't have to learn THAT!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CML_SYS_010: Yoshimitsu, the head of the Manji Clan, recently sensed an unknown voice calling out to him for reasons he did not quite understand.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CML_SYS_020: The voice grew louder by the day, until he finally realized it to be the voice of his sword, the cursed blade sharing his name.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CML_SYS_030: Yoshimitsu came to the conclusion that his blade must be resonating with some sort of sinister power.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_CML_SYS_040: And so the chivalrous thief set out on a journey guided by his blade, in order to halt this evil at its source.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_SYS_010: Ling Xiaoyu and Panda searched all around the world in order to find the missing Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_SYS_020: But Jin's trail went cold in the Middle East, and Panda did her best to console the heartbroken Xiaoyu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_SYS_030: Just then, they learned of the latest The King of Iron Fist Tournament, and its goal to determine the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_SYS_040: Upon hearing the news, Panda decided to enter the tournament as well in the hopes of helping Xiaoyu, who'd joined to look for Jin.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_010: (Fine, I see how it is. Guess I'll help you out.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_S00_020: Q1: How does it feel to be head of the Mishima Zaibatsu?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_020: (I never intended to lead the Mishima Zaibatsu. But now that I'm here, I'm devoting all of its resources to world peace.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_S00_030: Q2: What's your first order of business?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_030: (I plan on building PANDALAND, an amusement park for my dear friend, Xiaoyu.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_S00_060: Q3: Is there anything you'd like to say to our viewers?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_060: (Yes, we're looking for a certain individual.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_070: (We've posted images of him in cities around the globe.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_080: (If you've seen him, please contact the Mishima Zaibatsu immediately.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_TTR_TTR_090: (We await any news you can provide.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_SYS_010: Known as the White Angel of Death, Sergei Dragunov is feared around the world for his prowess in battle.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_SYS_020: As the conflict between G Corporation and the Mishima Zaibatsu enveloped the planet in chaos, he received new orders.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_SYS_030: Enter The King of Iron Fist Tournament, and seize control of the Mishima Zaibatsu for himself.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_SYS_040: Dragunov assented with his usual cold and detached demeanor, and set out to join the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_SYS_060: The Mishima Zaibatsu, as well as its myriad assets, were placed under the supervision of Dragunov's homeland.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_SYS_070: And thus, the White Angel of Death was finally given a brief, yet well-deserved respite.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_S09_010: And now, time for the news.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_S09_020: The global recession induced by G Corporation has claimed a new victim.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_S09_030: A world-famous manufacturer has been driven to bankruptcy.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_KMD_041: (All set once the turrets are attached...)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_KMD_S00_020: TANK KIT 99 TO BE FINAL KIT
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_SYS_010: Alisa Bosconovitch operates as a member of Yggdrasil, the rebel army led by Lars Alexandersson.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_SYS_020: Recently, the frequency with which Lars graced her thought processes seemed rather illogical to the android.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_SYS_030: Amidst her ruminations, The King of Iron Fist Tournament was announced to choose the next head of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_SYS_040: Once Lars decided to join, Alisa was adamant about participating in the tournament herself.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_MNT_010: If I defeat the strong ones, Lars is sure to win. For Lars... This is all for Lars...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_MNT_030: I'm so sorry, Lars! Forgive me!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_MNT_040: All I wanted was to help you. That's why I joined the tournament...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_LZD_030: You won, that's all that matters.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_MNT_MNT_120: I'm so sorry! Really, really I am!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_SYS_010: Leroy Smith was extolled as a hero for freeing New York from the clutches of gangs backed by the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_SYS_020:
The Wing Chun master moved to crush the Mishima Zaibatsu himself,
but the news of Heihachi Mishima's disappearance circulated throughout the world.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_SYS_030: Afterward, the Mishima Zaibatsu announced The King of Iron Fist Tournament to select a new head of the organization.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_SYS_040: Sensing another chance to dismantle the conglomerate once and for all, Leroy pledged to win the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_JLY_010: Man, what a stubborn bunch. Now's the time for a good clean-up.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_JLY_050: You were about this tall back then.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_RAT_060: And now look, I've grown big and strong!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_JLY_070: I was surprised to see you at the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_RAT_080: Yeah, I was a wisp of a thing back then.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_JLY_080: The last time I saw you was on the streets of Hong Kong...
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_JLY_090: What do you say we spar again?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_JLY_RAT_100: I'm not gonna lose this time!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_SYS_010:
King, the undisputed pro wrestling champion, 
ran an orphanage that rescues children from all over the world.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_SYS_020: However, due to the war between G Corporation and the Mishima Zaibatsu, the orphanage was already well beyond capacity.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_SYS_030: The troubled wrestler then remembered the recently announced The King of Iron Fist Tournament and came up with a plan.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_SYS_040: In order to find collaborators for his project, King put his name forward for the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_PGN_010: (Just you wait. I'll save the children, I swear it!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_SYS_050:
After The King of Iron Fist Tournament Final
Steve Fox's Changing Room
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_BSN_010: What, did you come to rub it in?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_BSN_020: Or do you still want to fight?
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_PGN_030: (Come at me again with all you've got.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_010: The mixed martial arts special charity match is about to begin!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_020: There's the bell to start the match.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_030: Oh, Steve rushes in right off the bat.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_050: But here comes the Snake Charmer!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_060: This feels more like a real fight than a charity match!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_070: A flurry of combos from Steve!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_080: King shows off some clever rope work, though!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_090: And...it's a Round Out Body Press!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_100: A roar from King! Have the tables turned?!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_120: Ooh! He intercepts it with an Arm Whip!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_130: King is about to finish it!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_BSN_050: (It's just a charity match, guv... You don't have to go so hard...)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_PGN_S06_160: Whaaat?! Steve is back on his feet!
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_SYS_010: Kuma was Heihachi Mishima's pet, and an enthusiastic member of the Mishima Zaibatsu's prized Tekken Force.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_SYS_020: But his master, Heihachi, fell in battle against his son, Kazuya Mishima, and his fate remained a mystery.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_SYS_030: The now-headless Mishima Zaibatsu announced a new The King of Iron Fist Tournament to select a new head of the organization.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_SYS_040: Kuma vowed to win the tournament to keep Heihachi's ambition alive and to fulfill his own dream.
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_010:
(If I become head of the Mishima Zaibatsu,
my Pandy-poo's sure to accept my proposal. We can even honeymoon on the actual moon!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_060: (I want to get to know you better!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_070: (I love you more than I love salmon!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_080: (I'm sure Old Man Heihachi will be delighted.)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_090: (It feels wrong to be so happy!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_100: (Okay, I've gotten to know you better now!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_RBT_RBT_110: (May our love last forever and ever!)
TEXT_000_VO_CE_SYS_S07_000: Welcome to...the King of Iron Fist Tournament!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_MNT_S1: In order to help out Lars, Alisa resolved to eliminate any enemies who would stand in his way.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_MNT_S2: In the second round, Alisa faced off against the sheer terror of the cybernetically enhanced Bryan Fury.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_MNT_S3: Her third round opponent was Sergei Dragunov, known far and wide as the White Angel of Death.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_MNT_S4: Thinking of Lars caused the abnormalities in Alisa's thought processes to start appearing at a remarkable rate...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_MNT_S5: Though she made it to the finals for the sake of Lars, Alisa's thought processes had already run completely amok...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_DER_S1: Asuka joined the tournament to settle her long-standing rivalry with Lili, but to do so, she would have to make it to the finals first.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_DER_S2: Asuka's second opponent was Azucena Milagros Ortiz Castillo, a rising MMA star that loved to espouse the wonders of coffee.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_DER_S3: Asuka's third opponent was Bryan Fury, a clear lover of a good scrap. His contentious aura made the peacemaker's blood boil.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_DER_S4: The semifinals saw Asuka face a Chinese martial artist about her own age, Ling Xiaoyu. If she was to fight Lili, she couldn't lose here!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_DER_S5: Asuka finally made it to the finals. It was time to take down her rival, and reclaim her much-needed happiness!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CAT_S1: In order to gain inspiration for her new product, Azucena went around asking her opponents about their favorite drinks.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CAT_S2: Tea and coffee seemed about as compatible as oil and water. In order to rally from the failure, Azucena tried again with her next opponent.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CAT_S3: Regrettably, Azucena failed to learn her opponent's post-match drink. She resolved to glean insight from her next match...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CAT_S4: Unfortunately, Azucena's third round opponent refused to speak a word. She headed into the semifinals with renewed determination...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CAT_S5: Azucena failed to gain any info in the semifinals either. Even so, she sensed an encounter with a special beverage just around the corner!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CHT_S1: Bryan's first opponent was the exuberant and bombastic Marshall Law. In the face of such vigor, he couldn't help but grin.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CHT_S2: Bryan's second opponent was the staunch Paul Phoenix. He could hardly wait to test the might of the fighter's one-hit, one-kill policy.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CHT_S3: Bryan's third opponent was the gutsy Hwoarang. He found himself more than ready to give the mouthy brat a thorough beating.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CHT_S4: Bryan's opponent for the semifinals was the brusque Sergei Dragunov. His instincts immediately told him this was no ordinary man.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CHT_S5: By some twist of fate, Bryan's long-time rival stood before him once again. This time, their battle would take place in the finals.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CTR_S1: Impure beings converged upon the negative emotions brimming within the Colosseum, almost as if they were waiting to be cleansed...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CTR_S2: After Devil Jin's defeat, Kazuya Mishima appeared from out of nowhere. It was imperative to exorcise the fiend responsible for so much evil!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CTR_S3: Kazuya finally unleashed his devil power, along with his true form. As long as he went unchecked, defeating Azazel was naught but a dream.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CTR_S4: Although Claudio succeeded in exorcising Devil Kazuya, the surrounding miasma was drawn into Zafina's left arm...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CTR_S5: At last, Azazel was resurrected. The world would never again see peace unless this demon was annihilated once and for all!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SWL_S1: The UN forces agent Raven assailed Jin, in hopes of terminating the man who had succumbed to rage, and the rampaging devil within him.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SWL_S2: The moment Devil Jin drove off Raven, he faced the blade of Victor Chevalier, the founder of the UN's independent forces unit.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SWL_S3: Jin's father, Kazuya Mishima, watched on indifferently, as Devil Jin failed to quell his frenzy.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SWL_S4: As Devil Jin tried to end Kazuya, his surroundings suddenly turned into a strange, other-dimensional space as a lone figure appeared...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SWL_S5: The place was Jin's spirit world. It was there that Devil Jin would try to kill Jin and claim Jin's vessel as his own.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KMD_S1: Dragunov's first opponent was Alisa Bosconovitch, a formidable android created by Dr. Bosconovitch that featured powerful weaponry.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KMD_S2: Dragunov's second opponent was Shaheen, a Close Quarters Combat expert. It was nigh time to show the might of Commando Sambo!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KMD_S3: Dragunov's third opponent was Marshall Law, a tournament regular. The breathtaking speed of his strikes would be a true threat indeed.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KMD_S4: His longstanding rival awaited Dragunov in the semifinals. Finally, it was a chance to get rid of him, once and for all!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KMD_S5: Who awaited Dragunov in the finals but Victor Chevalier, founder of the UN's independent forces unit. Failure was not an option!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KLW_S1: Feng Wei's first opponent was Asuka Kazama, who had been absent when he invaded the Kazama-Style Traditional Martial Arts dojo.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KLW_S2: Feng Wei's second opponent was no man, but a humanoid weapon, created by G Corp. Even so, he challenged the behemoth without hesitation.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KLW_S3: Feng Wei's third opponent was also not human, but the ferocious Kuma. However, the God Fist user was eager to face any and all comers.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KLW_S4: In the semifinals, Feng Wei faced Devil Jin, horns, wings, and all. It mattered not, however, as all manner of foes must fall before him.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KLW_S5: At last, Feng Wei had reached the finals. There awaited his bitter enemy, Leroy Smith. The time for sweet revenge was upon him!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SNK_S1: The tournament had finally begun. And yet, Hwoarang failed to find Jin Kazama's name among the participants...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SNK_S2: Hwoarang would focus his rage at Jin's absence from the tournament toward his next opponent.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SNK_S3: Hwoarang's third opponent was Feng Wei, the Chinese martial artist many considered a lock-in for this year's champion.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SNK_S4: In the semifinals, Hwoarang would face one of Jin's relatives, Asuka Kazama. Perhaps she would know something about Jin's whereabouts?
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_SNK_S5: Hwoarang prepared to face the world boxing champion Steve Fox in the finals. The fastest fists and feet around were ready to collide!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CCN_S1: Jack-8 began collecting battle data from his opponents in order to master even more advanced movements.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CCN_S2: Jack-8 faced boxing champion Steve Fox in his second match, where he hoped to learn the secret of his opponent's lightning-fast fists.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CCN_S3: In his third match, Jack-8 faced the striking figure of Yoshimitsu. However, not even he could predict the ninja's movements.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CCN_S4: Unfortunately, the third match didn't yield the expected data. Jack-8 headed to the semifinals with renewed vigor, where he would face...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CCN_S5: Once again, Jack-8 failed to secure the desired data in his semifinals bout. He was determined to learn something from the finals, and yet...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ANT_S1: The first opponent Jin chose for his visualization training was the android built to protect him: Alisa Bosconovitch.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ANT_S2: Next, Jin chose to go up against Lars Alexandersson, a former Tekken Force officer of stout heart and honest mind.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ANT_S3: As he searched his thoughts, Jin recalled the man he wished to fight again in honorable battle: a rival with a passion for fighting.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ANT_S4: The last thing to come to Jin's mind was the face of the one who had believed in him, and continued to think of him over the years.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ANT_S5: The moment Jin completed his training, the darkness lurking within him swelled and took shape in the form of his next opponent.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_AML_S1: Jin stood in the center of the Colosseum amidst a whirlpool of miasma.　Meanwhile, Jun attempted to halt the feud between father and son...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_AML_S2: The devil blood made Jin go berserk during the fight. Jun called out to her child, in the desperate hope of sealing away the devil power.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_AML_S3: Jun was able to curb Jin's mad rampage. It was then that Kazuya appeared—a reunion 22 years in the making...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_AML_S4: She crossed fists with Kazuya in hopes of saving him. But Kazuya, as if to crush Jun's spirit, unleashed his devil power upon her!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_AML_S5: Jun succeeded in stopping Kazuya, but the miasma enveloping the Colosseum coalesced in the skies, revealing a gargantuan abomination!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRL_S1: The first to fall prey to Kazuya would be an unpleasant man who dared to consider himself to be the Mishima clan's rival.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRL_S2: Kazuya's second opponent was Claudio Serafino, leader of the Sirius Marksmen, a group of exorcists who sought to defeat the devil.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRL_S3: Kazuya's third opponent was Victor Chevalier, founder of the loathsome UN independent army that constantly interfered with G Corp forces.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRL_S4: In the semifinals, Kazuya faced his former adopted brother and current president of Violet Systems, Lee Chaolan.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRL_S5: Having reached the finals, the last opponent standing in Kazuya's way was Lars Alexandersson, the illegitimate child of Heihachi Mishima.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PGN_S1: King aimed for nothing less than the championship. His first opponent toward that goal was a tournament regular, Marshall Law.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PGN_S2: King's second opponent was the muscular Feng Wei, a ruthless Chinese martial arts master.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PGN_S3: King's third opponent was also a tournament staple: the hot-blooded martial artist Paul Phoenix.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PGN_S4: In the semifinals, King faced the fiend who had committed atrocities across the world's battlefields. This was one battle he had to win!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PGN_S5: At last, King had made his way to the finals. His opponent: the world boxing champion. He would be a worthy opponent indeed!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RBT_S1: Kuma joined the tournament to give his beloved Panda a honeymoon to remember. Of course, his first foe had to be that man, of all people.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RBT_S2: Kuma succeeded in felling his ultimate nemesis. All that remained was to aim for the championship!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RBT_S3: Kuma's third opponent was some pro wrestler in a jaguar mask. It was time to show him who the real king of the beasts was!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RBT_S4: In the semifinals, Kuma faced the Baji Quan user Leo. No matter the fighting style, nothing can stand up to Kuma Shinken!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RBT_S5: The finals had arrived at last! Kuma would be sure to win, and put on one heck of a show for his darling Panda!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LZD_S1: Lars joined the tournament in order to seize control of the Mishima Zaibatsu. Unfortunately, so did his first foe, his fellow rebel Lee.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LZD_S2: Lars's second opponent was Jack-8, the newest humanoid weapon developed by G Corp.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LZD_S3: Lars's third opponent was the leader of the UN's independent forces unit, and a man once known as a legendary soldier.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LZD_S4: The semifinals saw Lars face the rising star of the mixed martial arts world, a young woman who espoused the wonders of coffee.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LZD_S5: Meeting Jin Kazama in the finals all but secured the Mishima Zaibatsu for the rebels. Even so, neither had any intention of standing down.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PIG_S1: Law joined the tournament in a last-ditch effort to escape a life of destitution. His road to riches began by battling a spoiled socialite.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PIG_S2: Law's second opponent was Leroy Smith, the famed hero of New York. This succession of wealthy opponents had him boiling with rage.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PIG_S3: Law's third opponent was Lee Chaolan, president of Violet Systems. The flames of Law's envy-fueled rage reached to the heavens.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PIG_S4: The G Corp leader, Kazuya Mishima, stood before Law in the semifinals. Law's hatred reached its peak due to their clear gap in social status.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_PIG_S5: The finals would see a battle between Law and his friend-turned-rival, Paul. Which of these paupers would suddenly find their pockets full?
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_WLF_S1: Lee's first opponent was Bryan Fury, who had fought on battlefields around the world. It would be a good test of the Violet Suit's power.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_WLF_S2: Lee's second opponent was a ninja wielding a sword, making it an ideal opportunity to prove the blade resistance of his company's suit.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_WLF_S3: Lee's third opponent was G Corp's latest humanoid weapon. This was clearly a perfect opportunity for some free PR, if there ever was one.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_WLF_S4: In the semifinals, Lee faced the excellent rebel army commander who helped developed his suits, Lars Alexandersson.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_WLF_S5: Lee made it to the finals at last. The man standing in his way was his heated rival and source of his long-standing hatred, Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GHP_S1: Leo's first opponent was the sword-wielding ninja master, Yoshimitsu. The King of Iron Fist Tournament is a strange tournament indeed...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GHP_S2: Leo's second opponent was the assassin Nina Williams. Was she packing a firearm to a martial arts competition?
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GHP_S3: Finally, Leo's third opponent was a normal combatant. Though the world boxing champion's lethal fists were anything but "normal"...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GHP_S4: In the semifinals, Leo faced a ninja once again. However, by this point, such unusual circumstances no longer fazed the young fighter...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GHP_S5: Just one more match, and then father and child could live in peace. However, the final opponent Leo had to face was none other than...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_JLY_S1: Leroy's first opponent was Leo, the Baji Quan user. It was the perfect chance to show the youth that one can't rely on brute force alone.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_JLY_S2: Leroy's second opponent was a former soldier. Although a warrior of honor, a vague hint of sadness emanated from his eyes.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_JLY_S3: Leroy's third match was against Marshall Law, a tournament regular. The pure breadth of Law's techniques reminded him of days long past.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_JLY_S4: In the semifinals, Leroy faced a man he beat in the last tournament. Hopefully, Feng Wei learned what awaits those who seek only power.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_JLY_S5: At last, Leroy had reached the finals. His opponent was an individual that the Wing Chun grandmaster had seen somewhere before...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HMS_S1: Lili burned with a desire to defeat Asuka Kazama. Her first opponent would be Leroy Smith, a businessman with whom she shared a friendship.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HMS_S2: Lili's second opponent was King, the undisputed pro wrestling champion who was known throughout the world.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HMS_S3: Lili's third opponent was Leo, a user of the Chinese martial art known as Baji Quan.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HMS_S4: In the semifinals, Lili met the former head of the Mishima Zaibatsu and Asuka's distant relative, Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HMS_S5: Lili's heart soared at the prospect of a rematch against Asuka taking place on the ultimate stage: the tournament finals.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KAL_S1: Nina's first opponent was Jack-8. She hardly expected to face G Corp's new humanoid weapon so soon.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KAL_S2: Nina's second opponent was Ling Xiaoyu. She may not be connected to G Corp, but children should know when it's time to go to bed.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KAL_S3: Nina's third opponent was an agent of the UN forces. While he was also unrelated to G Corp, she would need him gone to complete her mission.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KAL_S4: In the semifinals was the young head of the Sirius Marksmen, whom she had worked alongside during her employ with the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_KAL_S5: In the finals, she prepared for a showdown against the most fearsome of foes: the G Corporation leader, Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_TTR_S1: Panda joined the tournament in order to help Xiaoyu. All she had to do was advance as far as she was able.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_TTR_S2: Panda's second opponent was none other than the reigning world boxing champion, Steve Fox.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_TTR_S3: Panda's third opponent was Raven, an agent belonging to the UN forces.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_TTR_S4: In the semifinals, Panda faced Nina Williams, known far and wide as the Silent Assassin.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_TTR_S5: Somehow, Panda made it all the way to the finals. As if by some twist of fate, her opponent was none other than Kuma.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRF_S1: Paul hurried to join up with Law, so the two of them could head to the tournament. Yet on the way, he ran into Kuma, his eternal rival.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRF_S2: Paul somehow managed to repel Kuma, only for the animal-loving Jun Kazama to witness the deed.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRF_S3: Paul was able to break away from Jun, only to run into what seemed to be a unit from the Jack series.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRF_S4: The moment Paul thought he'd earned some breathing room, the wandering battle fanatic Bryan Fury came at him full-force.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_GRF_S5: After great effort, Paul finally managed to meet up with Law, but his good buddy was enraged at having been forced to wait for so long.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BBN_S1: Raven's first opponent was Feng Wei. However, even the Chinese martial arts master was powerless before his ninjutsu.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BBN_S2: The secret agent next faced Hwoarang, but the Taekwondo master put up little resistance against his ninjutsu.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BBN_S3: Raven's third opponent was Shaheen, the Close Quarters Combat expert, but even he was unable to muster a challenge against Raven's ninjutsu.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BBN_S4: His opponent in the semifinals was Yoshimitsu. Raven would use true ninjutsu to expose this "Advanced Manji Ninjutsu" for the farce it is.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BBN_S5: Raven's longstanding rival awaited him in the finals. The ninja was determined to employ the full extent of his training in this mission.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ZBR_S1: The first opponent on Reina's ambitious path was Kuma, the pet once kept by Heihachi Mishima.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ZBR_S2: Reina's second opponent was Lars Alexandersson, a man whose distinct mane resembled that of Heihachi himself.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ZBR_S3: Reina's third opponent was Victor Chevalier, the shrewd founder of the UN's independent forces unit.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ZBR_S4: In the semifinals, Reina faced a Mishima Polytechnical School alumnus, a marked man with the devil's blood running through his veins.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_ZBR_S5: Reina's final opponent was the ultimate enemy of her and her father: Kazuya Mishima. However, she could already see defeat in his future.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HRS_S1: Shaheen's first opponent was Bryan Fury. He had marked the madman as a person of interest capable of coming after Lili.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HRS_S2: Shaheen's second opponent was Sergei Dragunov. Though not connected to G Corp directly, it was worth keeping an eye on the Spetsnaz member.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HRS_S3: Shaheen's third opponent was Jack-8, G Corp's newest humanoid weapon. The unit was much more powerful than Jack-7, and warranted caution.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HRS_S4: Despite Shaheen's endless attempts to stop her, Lili joined the tournament, making it time to put an end to the socialite's escapades!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_HRS_S5: In the finals, Shaheen faced Nina Williams, known far and wide as the Silent Assassin, easily making her the deadliest name on his list.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BSN_S1: Steve took the first steps toward his new goal. His first obstacle was the one who had crashed into the world of MMA like a comet.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BSN_S2: The champion's next opponent was the ex-soldier Shaheen. Steve knew little of his Close Quarters Combat, but had no intention of losing.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BSN_S3: Steve's third opponent was Asuka, the Kazama-Style Traditional Martial Arts user. He took care that his attacks weren't turned against him.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BSN_S4: Steve faced the Wing Chun master Leroy Smith in the semifinals. It would take all he had to overcome the veteran fighter's experience.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_BSN_S5: The Taekwondo master Hwoarang awaited Steve in the finals. The path to a new life hinged upon the outcome of this battle.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LON_S1: Victor himself had learned how to wield various arms from his Eastern master. His heart sang at the chance to face Yoshimitsu's twin blades.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LON_S2: Victor's second opponent was Marshall Law. It would seem the fighter had a bone to pick with people of affluence.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LON_S3: Victor's third opponent was his own subordinate, Raven, who had just returned from his ninjutsu training.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LON_S4: In the semifinals, Victor faced Claudio Serafino, the young leader of the exorcist group known as the Sirius Marksmen.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_LON_S5: Victor's fated foe stood before him once again. This time, they would clash not on a battlefield, but the lavish stage of the finals.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RAT_S1: The tournament had finally begun. And yet, Xiaoyu failed to find Jin Kazama's name among the participants...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RAT_S2: Even though Jin wasn't in the tournament, Xiaoyu believed that winning would bring her closer to him. Thus, she steeled her resolve anew.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RAT_S3: Xiaoyu's third opponent was King, the undisputed champion of the pro wrestling circuit.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RAT_S4: In the semifinals, Xiaoyu faced another individual who also sought Jin's whereabouts: Hwoarang.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_RAT_S5: At last, Xiaoyu had reached the finals. Yet even as the match started, her opponent was nowhere to be found, until who should appear but...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CML_S1: Guided by his faithful blade, Yoshimitsu arrived at a gigantic cedar tree, where he found a warrior training for unbridled vengeance.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CML_S2: The next location was a building with a lavish interior. There awaited a warrior possessing a quiet, seething bloodlust.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CML_S3: His next stop was the battleground that was once New York. Upon his arrival, he saw an expressionless warrior of still palpable savagery.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CML_S4: Yoshimitsu finally arrived at a nexus of negative emotion: the great Colosseum. There awaited the devil incarnate himself—Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CML_S5: Even with Kazuya's defeat, the rumblings of Yoshimitsu's cursed blade grew even stronger; the ultimate abomination would soon be reborn.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CRW_S1: In a New York ravaged by war, Zafina could sense the surge of negative emotions festering among the populace...
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CRW_S2: Zafina could no longer abide those spreading fear across the world's battlefields to sate their own selfish greed!
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CRW_S3: The negative emotions welling up across the world coalesced in the Colosseum. There, a sinister being appeared, drawn to its stench.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CRW_S4: After Devil Jin's defeat, Kazuya Mishima appeared from out of nowhere. Though human in appearance, his malice surpassed even Devil Jin.
TEXT_000_UI_CHAREPISODE_CRW_S5: Kazuya finally unleashed his devil power, along with his true form. As long as his machinations go unchecked, the world is doomed to ruin!

TEXT_000_UI_PP_000:
BANDAI NAMCO ENTERTAINMENT INC.
PRIVACY POLICY
Last Updated: February  27, 2020 
This Privacy Policy explains how information about you is collected, used and disclosed by BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment Inc., (“BNEI”, “us”, “we” or “our”) when you use our games and related online services that contain this policy (collectively, the “Game”). BNEI is the data controller of your personal information for purposes of the EU General Data Protection Regulation.
We may change this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make changes, we will notify you by revising the date at the top of the Privacy Policy and, in some cases, we may provide you with additional notice (such as by adding a statement to the homepage of our Game or sending you a notification). If you do not agree to the changes, please do not use our Game or otherwise provide us with your personal information.  We encourage you to review the Privacy Policy whenever you access the Game to stay informed about our information practices and the ways you can help protect your privacy.
I.	Collection of Information
Information We Collect Automatically When You Use the Game
When you access or use any online features associated with our Game, we automatically collect information about you, including:
•	Usage Information: We collect information about your use of the Game, including gaming account ID, levels completed, game scores, time spent playing the Game, and other gameplay information.
•	Log Information: We log information about your use of our Games, including your access times, time spent playing, and your IP address.
•	Hardware Information: We collect information about the computer or device you use to access our Game, including the hardware model, operating system and version, browser  network information, MAC address, IP address and other unique device identifiers made available by the operating system of your hardware.
 Information You Provide to Us
We collect information you provide directly to us. For example, we collect information when you create an account, interact with other users, request customer support, sign up to receive newsletters, participate in surveys or otherwise communicate with us. The types of information we may collect include your username, password, email address and any other information you choose to provide. 
Information We Collect From Other Sources
We may also obtain information from other sources as far as it is necessary to perform our Game, and combine that with information we collect through our Game. For instance, we may obtain information regarding your account from your gaming platform, or may collect game ranking and achievement status from your console game center application. In all other cases we will ask you to authorize us to collect, store, and use personal information from third parties.
II.	Use of Information
We only collect, store and use your information if you have consented to it, or to the extent that it is necessary (i) for the performance of your agreement with us; (ii) to comply with our legal obligations; or (iii) for the purpose of our legitimate interests, including operating, evaluating and improving our global business. We have carefully balanced our legitimate business interests against your data protection rights. Please contact us using the contact details provided below if you have questions on this balancing of interests.
We (or a third party data processor on our behalf) may collect, store and use information about you for the following purposes for the periods necessary to achieve such purposes:
•	Provide, maintain and improve our Game;
•	Provide and deliver the products and services you request, process transactions and send you related information;
•	Register you for an account on our Game and assist in the management of your account;
•	Respond to your comments, questions and requests and provide customer service;
•	Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts and support and administrative messages;
•	Communicate with you about products, services, offers, promotions, rewards, and events offered by BNEI and others, and provide news, information and other marketing materials that we think will be of interest to you; 
•	Monitor and analyze trends, usage and activities in connection with our Game; 
•	Link or combine with information we get from others to help understand your needs and provide you with better service; 
•	Detect, investigate and/or prevent fraudulent, unauthorized or illegal activity;
•	For any other purpose required or authorized for us to comply with our legal and regulatory obligations; and 
•	For any other purpose for which you provided the information.
III.	Sharing of Information
We do not share, transfer or otherwise exchange your personal information with third parties, unless required for the provision of our products or services, otherwise in accordance with this Privacy Policy, as permitted by law, or if you have given us express consent. We do not sell your personal information to third parties. In compliance with the aforementioned, we may share information about you as follows or as otherwise described in this Privacy Policy:
•	With other users if you choose to participate in the interactive areas of our Game, such as chat or multiplayer features (the use of personally identifiable data (such as your full name) as a username in our services is strictly prohibited);
•	With our employees, affiliates, related companies, vendors, consultants and other third party service providers who need access to such information to carry out work on our behalf (including, for example, developers, website hosting services, or information storage and processing service providers);
•	In response to legal process or a request for information if disclosure is in accordance with, or as otherwise required by, any applicable law, rule, or regulation (including, for example government or regulatory bodies, law enforcement, or courts of law);
•	If we have reasonable grounds to believe your actions are inconsistent with our user agreements or policies, or to protect the rights, property and safety of BNEI, our users or others;
•	In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing or acquisition of all or a portion of our business to another company; and
•	With your consent or at your direction.
IV.	Game Analytics
Some of our Games will, with your prior consent, combine game play and analytic information with information collected from other BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment games, games from our group companies, and other third party sources. We will use that information to analyze game and monetization trends, create profiles of categories of players, create new games and services, and perform other analytics. You can opt-out of this use through the options menu in the Game.
V.	Security
We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration and destruction. However, no transmission over the internet can ever be guaranteed secure so we cannot guarantee the security of any personal information that you transfer over the internet to us.
VI.	Storing and deleting data
Personal information collected through the Game is being stored and deleted in compliance with privacy requirements. All data will be de-identified or deleted if no longer required for the purposes mentioned above, unless further retention is required by law.
VII.	International Transfers
Personal information that we collect from you is usually transferred, stored and processed in Japan. Please be aware that we may transfer your personal information to locations outside of your country which may not offer the same level of data protection as your country’s laws. However, our collection, storage and use of your personal information will continue to be governed by this Privacy Policy, and where we do disclose your personal information to third parties located overseas, we take such steps as are reasonable in the circumstances to ensure it is used in accordance with this Privacy Policy. 
VIII.	Third Party Sites
Our Games may contain links to other websites  or services operated by third parties.  Please note that this Privacy Policy applies only to our Game and we cannot be responsible for personal information that third parties may collect, store and use through their website.  You should always read the privacy policy of each website you visit carefully.
IX.	Data Protection Rights
You, and your legal guardian if you are a minor, have certain data protection rights under applicable law. Your rights under applicable law may include:
•	Access to the personal information we process about you as well as the right to data portability. 
•	The right to have personal information corrected or erased. 
•	The right to restrict the processing of your personal information.
•	The right to withdraw your consent at any time for consent we have obtained from you, although this will not affect the lawfulness of the processing prior to the withdrawal. 
•	You also have the right to object, at any time, to the processing of your personal information which is based on BNEI’s legitimate interests. 
•	Where we process your personal information for direct marketing purposes, you have the right to object at any time to such processing, including for profiling purposes to the extent that it is related to direct marketing. If you object to processing for direct marketing purposes, we will no longer process your personal information for such purposes. In that case we may still send you transactional or relationship messages, but only about our ongoing business relations.
If you have such a request, you may address your requests to ppolicy@bandainamcoent.co.jp. 
We do not provide different levels of service if you exercise these rights. However, if you request we delete or cease collecting information which is necessary to ensure adequate functioning of the Services, you may not be able to use all or some parts of our Services.
X.	Contact
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our practices, please contact us at: 
BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment Inc.
Attn: Contact for Personal Information Matter
5-37-8 Shiba
Minato-ku, Tokyo 108-0014
Japan
+81-3-6744-6112 (phone)
ppolicy@bandainamcoent.co.jp 
If you are located in the European Union, you can also contact us at:
BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment Europe S.A.S.
49, 51 Rue des Docks CS
90618 69258 LYON Cedex 09 FRANCE
privacy@bandainamcoent.eu

In addition, we would like your permission to share and combine that information with information collected from other Bandai Namco Entertainment games, services and products of our group companies, and other third party sources.

libjpeg-turbo Licenses
libjpeg-turbo is covered by three compatible BSD-style open source licenses:

The IJG (Independent JPEG Group) License, which is listed in README.ijg

This license applies to the libjpeg API library and associated programs (any code inherited from libjpeg, and any modifications to that code.)

The Modified (3-clause) BSD License, which is listed below

This license covers the TurboJPEG API library and associated programs, as well as the build system.

The zlib License

This license is a subset of the other two, and it covers the libjpeg-turbo SIMD extensions.

Complying with the libjpeg-turbo Licenses
This section provides a roll-up of the libjpeg-turbo licensing terms, to the best of our understanding.

If you are distributing a modified version of the libjpeg-turbo source, then:

You cannot alter or remove any existing copyright or license notices from the source.

You must add your own copyright notice to the header of each source file you modified, so others can tell that you modified that file (if there is not an existing copyright header in that file, then you can simply add a notice stating that you modified the file.)

Origin

Clause 1 of the IJG License
Clause 2 of the zlib License
You must include the IJG README file, and you must not alter any of the copyright or license text in that file.

Origin

Clause 1 of the IJG License
If you are distributing only libjpeg-turbo binaries without the source, or if you are distributing an application that statically links with libjpeg-turbo, then:

Your product documentation must include a message stating:

This software is based in part on the work of the Independent JPEG Group.

Origin

Origin

Origin

Origin

zlib License

Redistributions of source code must retain the above copyright notice, this list of conditions and the following disclaimer.

Why Three Licenses?
The zlib License could have been used instead of the Modified (3-clause) BSD License, and since the IJG License effectively subsumes the distribution conditions of the zlib License, this would have effectively placed libjpeg-turbo binary distributions under the IJG License. However, the IJG License specifically refers to the Independent JPEG Group and does not extend attribution and endorsement protections to other entities. Thus, it was desirable to choose a license that granted us the same protections for new code that were granted to the IJG for code derived from their software.
