If you are a resident of the United States of America, by accepting the terms of this Agreement, you and BNEA: (i) agree to resolve certain disputes through mandatory binding arbitration, as set forth in Section 19(a), and each subpart thereof (collectively, the “Arbitration Agreement”); and (ii) expressly waive the right to a trial by jury or to participate in any class action brought against the other party, pursuant to Section 19(b) (the “Class Action Waiver”); unless (iii) you exercise your right to opt out of the Arbitration Agreement and/or the Class Action Waiver, as set forth in Section 19(c).
a) 	MANDATORY, BINDING ARBITRATION. TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, YOU AND BNEA: (i) ACKNOWLEDGE AND AGREE TO RESOLVE ALL DISPUTES AND CLAIMS BETWEEN YOU AND BNEA THROUGH BINDING ARBITRATION, PURSUANT TO THE FEDERAL ARBITRATION ACT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION (EXCEPT AS EXPRESSLY SET FORTH IN SECTION 19.a.iii) ANY DISPUTES OR CLAIMS BASED ON LEGAL THEORIES OF BREACH OF CONTRACT, TORTIOUS INJURY, STATUTORY VIOLATIONS, FRAUD, UNFAIR COMPETITION, RIGHTS OF PRIVACY, MISREPRESENTATION, OR ANY OTHER LEGAL THEORY, THAT MAY ARISE OUT OF OR RELATE TO ANY ASPECT OF THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN YOU AND BNEA, ANY TERM OR PROVISION OF THIS AGREEMENT, OR YOUR ACCESS TO OR USE OF THE GAME (EACH, A “CLAIM”); (ii) EXPRESSLY AND IRREVOCABLY WAIVE ANY RIGHT TO PURSUE ANY CLAIMS IN COURT OR TO HAVE ANY CLAIMS HEARD OR TRIED BEFORE A JUDGE OR JURY; (iii) SHALL NOT BRING OR PARTICIPATE IN A CLASS OR REPRESENTATIVE ARBITRATION AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY, EVEN IF OTHERWISE PERMITTED BY THE FEDERAL ARBITRATION ACT; AND (iv) SHALL NOT SEEK TO CONSOLIDATE OR COMBINE ANY ARBITRATION OF ANY CLAIM BY YOU OR BNEA WITH ANY ACTION OR ARBITRATION BROUGHT BY OR AGAINST ANY THIRD PARTY, WITHOUT THE EXPRESS WRITTEN CONSENT OF EACH SUCH THIRD PARTY AND BOTH PARTIES TO THIS AGREEMENT. UNLESS YOU SUBMIT A PROPER OPT OUT NOTICE (IN STRICT COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 19(c)), YOU AND BNEA AGREE THAT ANY CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY WILL ONLY BE CONDUCTED THROUGH MANDATORY, BINDING ARBITRATION.
i)	Pre-Arbitration Informal Dispute Resolution. Prior to initiating arbitration of any Claim subject to this Arbitration Agreement, you and BNEA agree to make reasonable, good faith efforts to informally resolve any dispute or Claim between you and BNEA. The party seeking to raise such dispute or Claim shall send to the other party a written notice describing the nature and basis of such dispute or Claim and identifying the relief sought. All such written notices to BNEA must be sent via first class mail to: Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc., Attn: Legal & Business Affairs Department, 23 Odyssey, Irvine, California 92618, USA. If you and BNEA do not agree to resolve such dispute or Claim within 30 days after such written notice is received, the party seeking to raise such dispute or Claim may initiate an arbitration action against the other, as permitted by the Arbitration Agreement, above.
ii)	Arbitration Procedure. Arbitration is a legally-binding process, through which a party may seek legal remedies from or against another party, similar to a legal action brought before a court, but that generally imposes fewer strict procedural formalities, is held before a third party, neutral arbitrator (instead of before a judge or jury), provides for more limited discovery and potentially reduced legal fees for each party, and is subject to limited review by courts. The procedure for arbitration of any Claim under this Arbitration Agreement will be governed by the Commercial Arbitration Rules of the American Arbitration Association (“AAA”) and, where applicable, the AAA’s Supplementary Procedures for Consumer Related Disputes, both of which are available at: http://www.adr.org. Notwithstanding the foregoing, you and BNEA agree that any such arbitration will be conducted in English, and permit the electronic submission of documents and allow participation by phone or by teleconference, or in person, at a mutually agreed location.
iii)	Excluded Claims. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the terms of this Arbitration Agreement will not prevent you or BNEA from bringing any Claim: (i) to the attention of any federal, state, or local government agencies with the governmental authority and competent jurisdiction to seek relief on your or BNEA’s behalf, from the other party; or (ii) before a small claims court, subject to the jurisdictional limitations and requirements of such small claims court.
iv)	Severability of Arbitration Agreement. You and BNEA agree that, no provision of this Arbitration Agreement shall be enforceable against you or BNEA and all Claims shall be governed by Sections 20(a) and 21(a), below, in the event either: (i) a court of competent jurisdiction conclusively determines that any term or provision of this Arbitration Agreement is unenforceable, prohibited by applicable law, or inapplicable to any Claim; or (ii) you submit a proper Opt Out Notice (in compliance with Section 19(c)), wherein you have expressed your election to opt out of this Arbitration Agreement.
b) 	CLASS ACTION WAIVER. IF YOU ARE A RESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, BY ACCEPTING THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT, YOU AND BNEA HEREBY AGREE: (i) THAT EACH CLAIM IS PERSONAL TO YOU AND BNEA, AND SHALL ONLY BE CONDUCTED AS AN INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION (OR AN INDIVIDUAL COURT PROCEEDING, WITH RESPECT TO CLAIMS EXCLUDED FROM THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, PURSUANT TO SECTION 19.a.iii) AND NOT AS A CLASS ACTION OR OTHER FORM OF REPRESENTATIVE ACTION; (ii) EXPRESSLY WAIVE ANY RIGHT TO FILE OR PARTICIPATE IN A CLASS ACTION OR SEEK RELIEF ON A CLASS OR REPRESENTATIVE BASIS; AND (iii) THE ARBITRATOR (OR COURT, WITH RESPECT TO CLAIMS EXCLUDED FROM THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, PURSUANT TO SECTION 19.a.iii) MAY ONLY CONDUCT AN INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION (OR COURT ACTION, WITH RESPECT TO CLAIMS EXCLUDED FROM THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, PURSUANT TO SECTION 19.a.iii), MAY NOT CONSOLIDATE MORE THAN ONE INDIVIDUAL’S CLAIMS, AND MAY NOT PRESIDE OVER ANY FORM OF REPRESENTATIVE OR CLASS PROCEEDING RELATING TO SUCH CLAIMS. i)	Severability of Class Action Waiver. You and BNEA agree that, no provision of this Class Action Waiver shall be enforceable against you or BNEA and all Claims shall be governed by Sections 20(a) and 21(a), below, in the event either: (i) a court of competent jurisdiction conclusively determines that any term or provision of this Class Action Waiver is unenforceable, prohibited by applicable law, or inapplicable to any Claim; or (ii) you submit a proper Opt Out Notice (in compliance with Section 19(c)), wherein you have elected to opt out of this Class Action Waiver. In no event may the severance of the Class Action Waiver be interpreted or deemed to constitute consent by you or BNEA to participate in a class action or class arbitration.
c) 	OPT OUT PROCEDURE. You have the right to opt out and not be bound by the foregoing Arbitration Agreement and Class Action Waiver, by sending a written notice of your election to opt out from such Arbitration Agreement and/or Class Action Waiver (the “Opt Out Notice”), in strict compliance with the following requirements of Sections 19.c.i – 19.c.iii:
i)	Form & Address. Your Opt Out Notice must be sent to the following address: Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc., ATTN: Legal & Business Affairs, 23 Odyssey, Irvine, California 92618, USA, and either by: (i) first class mail, postage prepaid, certified and return receipt requested; or (ii) overnight courier service (such as Federal Express).
ii)	Time Limitations. Unless a longer period is required by applicable law, your Opt Out Notice must be postmarked (if sent by first class mail) or deposited (if sent by overnight courier service) within: (i) 30 days of your purchase of your copy of the Game; or (ii) if no purchase was made, then within 30 days of the date on which you first accessed or used your copy of the Game.
iii)	Required Information. Your Opt Out Notice must include: (i) the title of the specific Game to which your Opt Out Notice is intended to apply; (ii) your first and last name; (iii) your address; (iv) your phone number; (v) your email address; (vi) if you are a registered user of the Game or any other BNEA product or service, each of your usernames for the Game and such other BNEA products and services; and (vii) a statement that you do not agree to the Arbitration Agreement and/or to the Class Action Waiver. BNEA may use the foregoing information included in the Opt Out Notice to record, process, maintain, and administer your opting out of the Arbitration Agreement and/or Class Action Waiver, as applicable, but not for marketing purposes.
iv)	Effects of Proper Opt Out Notice. If your Opt Out Notice meets all of the above requirements, you and BNEA will be deemed to have opted out of the Arbitration Agreement and/or Class Action Waiver, subject to your statement in such Opt Out Notice, with respect to this Agreement. Submission of a valid Opt Out Notice applies only to Claims arising from or relating to the Game and Agreement identified therein, as between BNEA and the individual identified in such Opt Out Notice.
v)	Effects of Improper Opt Out Notice. If you submit an Opt Out Notice that fails to meet any of the requirements set forth in Sections 19.c.i – 19.c.iii, you and BNEA will be bound by the Arbitration Agreement and Class Action Waiver set forth in this Agreement.
20. 	GOVERNING LAW.
To the extent required by applicable law, all terms and provisions of this Agreement shall be governed and construed in accordance with all applicable mandatory laws, even if inconsistent with the governing law set forth in this Section 20 and in no event shall the application, interpretation, or enforcement of the terms of this Agreement, under any jurisdictional law contemplated by this Section 20 exclude, limit, or otherwise restrict any rights vested with you, as a consumer, under any applicable consumer protection laws. Please note that your conduct may also be subject to other local, state, national, and international laws. The parties agree that the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods shall not apply to any dispute or transaction arising out of this Agreement.
a)	If you reside in North, Central, or South America:
The laws of the State of California, excluding its conflicts-of-law rules, govern the application, interpretation, or enforcement of the terms of this Agreement and your use of the Game.
b)	If you reside in Asia:
Any dispute between the parties arising from or relating to this Agreement will be governed by this Agreement and the laws of Japan, without giving effect to any conflict of laws principles that may provide for the application of the law of another jurisdiction.
c)	If you reside in any other location:
Any dispute between the parties arising from or relating to this Agreement, will be governed by this Agreement and the laws of France, without giving effect to any conflict of laws principles that may provide for the application of the law of another jurisdiction.
21. 	VENUE.
a)	If you reside in North, Central, or South America:
You and BNEA expressly agree that, for all claims and disputes arising out of or relating to this Agreement and/or your use of the Game that are not subject to the Arbitration Agreement in Section 19, above, exclusive jurisdiction for any such claim or action shall be the federal or state courts that govern Los Angeles County, California, and you expressly consent to the exercise of personal jurisdiction of such courts.
b)	If you reside in Asia:
Any dispute between the parties arising from or relating to this Agreement shall be decided by the Tokyo District Court, and you and BNEI agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of that court.
c)	If you reside in any other location:
Any dispute between the parties arising from or relating to this Agreement shall be decided by the Commercial Court of Lyon, and you and BNEU agree to submit to the personal jurisdiction of that court.
22. 	THIRD-PARTY BENEFICIARIES. Any person or entity who is not a party to this Agreement shall have no rights under any law to enforce any terms of this Agreement, regardless of whether such person or entity has been identified by name. Nothing in this section shall affect the rights of any permitted assignee or transferee of this Agreement.
23. 	MISCELLANEOUS. This Agreement contains the entire agreement between you and Bandai Namco regarding the use of the Game. If any provision of this Agreement is held invalid or unenforceable, the remainder of this Agreement shall continue in full force and effect for the remainder of the term, or as otherwise set forth in Section 6(d), except if such provision deprives the Agreement from its essential obligations. You may not assign this Agreement or any of its rights under this Agreement without the prior written consent of Bandai Namco, and any attempted assignment without such consent shall be void. Subject to the foregoing restriction, this Agreement will be fully binding upon, inure to the benefit of, and be enforceable by us and our respective successors and assigns. The failure of Bandai Namco to exercise or enforce any right or provision of this Agreement shall not operate as a waiver of such right or provision. The section titles in this Agreement are for convenience only and have no legal or contractual effect.
To contact BNEI, please follow the process described on our support page located at http://bandainamcoent.co.jp/cs_support/.
To contact BNEA, please contact BNEA’s customer support line at https://www.bandainamcoent.com/support or by writing to BNEA at: Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc., 23 Odyssey, Irvine, California 92618, USA.
To contact BNEU, please contact BNEU through BNEU customer service at http://www.bandainamcoent.eu/support or Bandai Namco Europe S.A.S., 15 rue Félix Mangini – 69009 LYON France.

TEXT_VO_000_fate_bsn_bsnvspgn_00_000: That wall of muscle can't stop me!
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_sta_02_000: Witness the results of my training.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_sta_00_vr00_000: So, you finally revealed your true self.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_sta_00_vr01_000: Senior officer or not, I'm not pulling any punches!
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_sta_02_vr01_000: Let's see what this rebel army can do.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_sta_02_vr02_000: Devils disrupt the world order. It's time for you to disappear.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_sta_00_vr02_000: I cannot call you a ninja.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_02_000: My ninjutsu has evolved to a new level.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_01_vr00_000: The White Angel of Death has been eliminated... Farewell.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_02_vr03_000: This is the result of my training.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_02_vr01_000: Did you think that was enough to protect the world?
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_02_vr02_000: There is no place for you in this world.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_02_vr00_000: As I thought... You are no ninja.
TEXT_VO_000_bbn_win_02_vr00b_000: You must learn what a true ninja is.
TEXT_VO_000_fate_bbn_lonvsbbn_00_000: You have improved as well, Admiral.
TEXT_VO_000_fate_hms_hmsvsder_00_vr00_00: I've come with a plan to take you down.
TEXT_VO_000_fate_der_hmsvsder_10_vr00_00: Heh, this'll be fun. Let's settle things!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_grl_amlvsgrl_00_000: So you were alive all along.
TEXT_VO_000_fate_aml_amlvsgrl_10_000: Kazuya... I promise I’ll save you.
TEXT_VO_000_fate_aml_amlvsswl_00_000: Don't be consumed by the power, Jin!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_hrs_grlvshrs_00_000: You will tell me everything you know about my friend's death.
TEXT_VO_000_fate_grl_zbrvsgrl_00_000: There's nowhere left to run. You're going to regret this!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_zbr_zbrvsgrl_10_000: Turns out this way works better for me!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_ghp_ghpvscat_10_vr00_00: What?! I'm the bad guy here?!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_der_klwvsder_00_000: We finally meet. Get ready for a whoopin', moron!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_der_klwvsder_00a_000: We finally meet. Get ready for a whoopin'!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_mnt_mntvsccn_00_000: I'm Alisa. Pleased to meet y—
TEXT_VO_000_fate_mnt_mntvsccn_10_vr00_00: I'll turn you into scrap metal!
TEXT_VO_000_fate_pgn_bsnvspgn_10_000: (Wrestlers’ muscles are made of steel...impossible to penetrate.)
TEXT_VO_000_fate_rat_antvsrat_00_vr00_00: Jin... I never thought I'd see you again...
TEXT_VO_000_ANT_Ragearts_Fin_001: This is the power of the Devil himself.
TEXT_VO_000_RAT_Ragearts_Fin_002: I know what I need to do!
TEXT_VO_000_LZD_Ragearts_Fin_002: Your machinations will go no further!
TEXT_VO_000_AML_Ragearts_Pre_001: You leave me no other choice…
TEXT_VO_000_AML_Ragearts_Atk_001: We will cleanse this world of its evil and corruption.
TEXT_VO_000_AML_Ragearts_Atk_002: A Kazama's power fosters life, and cleanses evil.
TEXT_VO_000_AML_Ragearts_Fin_002: Let's settle this once and for all.
TEXT_VO_000_JLY_Ragearts_Pre_002: Witness the essence of Wing Chun.
TEXT_VO_000_JLY_Ragearts_Other_025: Your fists are a mirror reflecting your heart.
TEXT_VO_000_JLY_Ragearts_Other_026: You can't follow the path ahead of you with fear in your heart!
TEXT_VO_000_CTR_Ragearts_Atk_002: Nothing can prevail over the light of Sirius...
TEXT_VO_000_CTR_Ragearts_Line_018: May you purify the star of destruction!
TEXT_VO_000_KLW_Ragearts_Fin_002: There are none stronger than me!
TEXT_VO_000_DER_Ragearts_Line_019_2: Guess what's on the menu today...
TEXT_VO_000_DER_Ragearts_Line_020: That's right, a real ass whoopin'!
TEXT_VO_000_MNT_Ragearts_Pre_001: Are you ready for a world of pain?
TEXT_VO_000_BSN_Ragearts_Pre_001: Now this is what I call fun!
TEXT_VO_000_CAT_Ragearts_Pre_001: I could do this all day!
TEXT_VO_000_CAT_Ragearts_Fin_001: How do you take your coffee?
TEXT_VO_000_CAT_Ragearts_Fin_002: Not had your morning coffee yet?
TEXT_VO_000_CML_Ragearts_Fin_001: You shall be laid to rest!
TEXT_VO_000_HRS_Ragearts_Atk_001: Your skills are worthy of my respect.
TEXT_VO_000_HRS_Ragearts_Fin_001: However, the one standing victorious shall be me!
TEXT_VO_000_HRS_Ragearts_Pre_002: I will show you no mercy!
TEXT_VO_000_HRS_Ragearts_Atk_002: Kazuya Mishima, today I will teach you true pain.
TEXT_VO_000_SWL_Ragearts_Atk_002: I'll put an end to this.
TEXT_VO_000_SWL_Ragearts_Pre_Act12: Now is the time to break these chains and move forward.
TEXT_VO_000_SWL_Ragearts_Pre_Act13: This time, we finish it for good!
TEXT_VO_000_SWL_Ragearts_Atk_Act13: Devil within me! Lend me strength!
TEXT_VO_000_ZBR_Ragearts_Pre_002: Now it's time to destroy you.
TEXT_VO_000_ZBR_Ragearts_Atk_002: You think you're all high and mighty!
TEXT_VO_000_ZBR_Ragearts_Fin_002: Let the pain tear you apart!
TEXT_VO_000_ZBR_Ragearts_KO_001: I'm way out of your league.
TEXT_VO_000_ZBR_Ragearts_Pre_003: Oh, is that all you can do?
TEXT_VO_000_XXA_Ragearts_Atk_001: This is all the power I have.
TEXT_VO_000_XXA_Ragearts_Atk2_001: Together with your Devil and Azazel's power...
TEXT_VO_000_XXA_Ragearts_Fin_001: I will crush your delusions of grandeur!
TEXT_VO_000_XXB_Ragearts_Atk_001: No matter how much power you gain, it won't help.
TEXT_VO_000_XXB_Ragearts_Fin_001: Disappear into the void! And take your wretched power with you!
TEXT_VO_000_GRL_Ragearts_Fin_002: Is that the entirety of your pathetic power?
TEXT_VO_000_RAT_Ragearts_Pre_003: Sorry to keep doing this to you, Panda!
TEXT_VO_000_RAT_Ragearts_Fin_003: I know what I need to do!

TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_S00_010:
Rebel Army Yggdrasil
Flying Boat Víðópnir
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_S17_010: Commander Lars. Operation Lightning will commence momentarily.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_WLF_010: It has been six months since the disappearance of Heihachi Mishima...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_WLF_020: An opportunity has finally presented itself.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_LZD_020: Today, we take down evil incarnate!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_LZD_040: You can do this, Jin Kazama!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_020: So, he was alive all along.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_030: The monster who fanned the flames of war across the world.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_040: What do you want with me?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_ANT_040: Your very existence brings turmoil to the world!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_050: What a bunch of bull. You're the one who started this war.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_ANT_050: This is all to expunge the devil's blood.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_090: How ludicrous. Come now, bring out your devil.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_ANT_060: I'll kill you and put an end to all of this!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_120: That's all you can muster from the blood I gave you?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_130: As long as I live, the body count will only continue to grow.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_SWL_110: Mother... I still can't protect anybody!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_S00_020:
Union of Nations Forces Autonomous Unit
Guardian-class Submarine Aircraft Carrier
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_BBN_010: Admiral, a few city blocks have been lost.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_BBN_020: The top brass has given us attack orders.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_LON_010: A waste of time. Belay that action.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_LON_020: Assisting survivors is your top priority, Raven.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_LON_030: Damn that devil... Finally showing his true colors.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_190: I speak now to all of humanity.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_200: For too long have you humans relied on weapons and ordnance, transforming into a race of spineless weaklings.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_210: The rulers of this world are too frail and have forgotten what it means to fight.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_220: Why should we blindly abide by the rules and social conventions invented by such cowards?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_240: I shall rewrite the rules of this irrational world.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_S18_010: We've lost contact with the other squads!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_S18_020: Our satellites are being shot down one after another!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_260: Only those who show the depths of their mettle
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_270: have any place in the new world I shall rule!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_280: Toward that end, I announce the opening of The King of Iron Fist Tournament!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_290: Come to the tournament, if you count yourself among the strong!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_300: Seize glory in your own hands—achieve it with your fists!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_310: But be warned: those who fail to prove their might shall be wiped from the earth, along with their country.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_GRL_320: Come, humanity! Unleash the dogs of war!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT01_AML_020: Listen up, Jin. The Kazama Style is...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_S08_010: It's been one week since Kazuya Mishima, head of G Corporation, shot down the key military satellites.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_S08_020: While the militaries of the world are unable to function,
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_S08_030: the qualifiers for G Corporation's tournament have begun.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_S08_040: The whole world is watching this tournament that
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_S08_050: gives power to the victorious country, and levies penalties on the loser.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_010: Sick of the bed rest after a week?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_010: How long do you plan on daydreaming?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_020: Let's see how stiff you got during your recovery.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_020: Come at me with the intent to kill.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_WLF_010: I fear I bring poor tidings, you two.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_WLF_020: Jin, I'm afraid you've shown diminished aptitude in all areas: strength, reaction time, you name it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_WLF_030: It's almost like I'm looking at a completely different person.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_050: Come on, Jin! Show me that devil power of yours.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_110: You saved me...when I was buried in that rubble.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_MNT_030: I simply made the obvious decision. You, Jin, are the hope of mankind.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_MNT_031: I simply made the obvious decision.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_MNT_032: You, Jin, are the hope of mankind.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_MNT_040: Your will and resolve are stronger than any other... Everyone knows this, Jin.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_MNT_050: Try not to take too much upon your shoulders.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_140: (These hands are too tainted to grasp hope...)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_WLF_040:
I intend to convene with the experts
who are investigating the Devil Gene.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_060: And then there's the interference with the tournament...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_WLF_050: I suppose we have no choice but to send in our sweet Alisa.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_170: My devil power appeared when I faced death in the heat of battle.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_180: If I am to resurrect that power, I must walk the path of carnage once again.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_070:
The tournament hosted by Kazuya.
It could be a G Corp trap.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_190: I'll get my power back. And when I do...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_ANT_200: I'll kill that bastard. Even if I have to go down with him.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_100: Still, the preliminary tournament's in three days.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT02_LZD_110: Best get yourself in proper fighting shape before then.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S00_010:
America
North America A Block Preliminaries, Final Match
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S06_020: Paul has defeated Law to represent North America Block A!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_PIG_030: Paul, I expect you to keep your promise now that you beat me!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_GRF_040: Hm? Yeah. I won't let him go unchecked.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_GRF_050: I'll give Kazuya a nice smack in the face!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_010: Here are the fighters that will move to the main tournament
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_020: after winning the qualifiers for each region.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_030: First up is the European B Block.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_035: All eyes are on this next fighter
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_050: The final tournament will certainly be one to watch.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_060: Next, the South American Block winner is...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_065: An MMA star who has jumped into the spotlight
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_080: Last is the North America B Block winner.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_085: The hero who saved New York rises to the challenge again.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_087: It's an impressive lineup of fighters. We'll be looking forward to seeing them in action!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S08_090: These exciting Block qualifiers will definitely keep us all watching!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_GRL_010: People of the world, lose yourselves to the maelstrom of chaos.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_GRL_020: Make a bloodbath of this decrepit rock.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_010: Congrats on advancing to the semifinals.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_020: The name's Reina. Always happy to meet a Mishima Polytech grad!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_030: I go there myself, you see. Heard all sorts of rumors about you, Jin Senpai!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_040: Aw man, you ignoring me or something?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_050: Well, guess what? If I win the next match, it'll be you and me, bucko!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_060: And I don't plan on losing, so you better keep your dance card open for yours truly!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_MNT_010: Verifying... As of now, I do not detect G Corp intervention.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_WLF_010: Now then, get me up to speed on his current condition.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_MNT_020: We seem to be making ground, but...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_WLF_020: I see... His devil power has shown no signs of returning.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_010: The unknown rookie, Reina, has claimed the last spot in the Top 4!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_MNT_030: Reina is currently enrolled at Mishima Polytechnical School.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_020: Now then, it's time for the first match of the semifinals.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_MNT_040: No suspicious data found prior to her enrollment.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_WLF_030: So then, the assassin from G Corp...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_040: I don't believe it... An instant K.O.!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_050: Hwoarang of South Korea has advanced to the finals with an overwhelming victory!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_MNT_060: A fearsome foe indeed, by my calculations.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_WLF_040:
Even if he's passed the semifinals,
there's no telling if Jin can win in his current state.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_060: The second match of the semifinals is about to begin.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_090: And don't let this face fool you... When I get in the ring, I can get pretty rough.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_110: What's the deal? You look like you’ve seen a ghost.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_120: (Get a taste of the technique that caused your awakening!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_160: (It would seem the threat of death is the key to the devil's power.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_180: Ouchie-wowchie... I give, I give already!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_080: And the winner is: Jin Kazama!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ANT_090: (I lost myself to that power again...)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_090: What's this? Contestant Hwoarang has made an appearance, in defiance of the tournament brackets!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_010: Lucky me, looks like you're rarin' to go.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_020: Let's throw down while that fire's burning hot!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ANT_130: (This heat... When did I forget it?)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_040: This isn't all you've got, is it?!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_S05_130: And the winner is: Jin Kazama! He will advance to the finals tournament in Italy!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ANT_150: (This is definitely the devil's power, but I haven't lost myself.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_060: You got a lucky hit in, that's all...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_070:
Looks like you've been saddled with a weird-ass power,
Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_080: Still, that's just another part of you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_SNK_090: Man, this sucks. Can't believe I lost to such a weakling.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_190: Boy, Jin Senpai, you're a reaaal stud when you get serious.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT03_ZBR_200: The truth is, I have a favor to ask you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_KAL_010: The woman you were looking for was with the Sirius Marksmen.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GRL_020: Keep an eye on them. Make sure they don't leave Italy.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_CTR_010: Azazel, the evil of a bygone age, was defeated by Jin Kazama,
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_CTR_020: and is now sealed within your left arm.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_CRW_010: However, we are still in danger of annihilation.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_CRW_020: Jin Kazama has lost his light, and Kazuya Mishima's ominous glow grows ever stronger.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_CTR_030: Are we sure Kazuya Mishima is the one who will bring this world to ruin?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_CRW_030: To prevent this fate, we must seek Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_ZBR_010: I wanna help you take down the big, bad Kazuya Mishima!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_ANT_010: Does that have anything to do with the technique you used?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_ZBR_030: Oh, just copied something I saw on the internet, that's all.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_ZBR_040: (I don’t buy it. Which is all the more reason to keep an eye on it...)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_NIK_020: You honor us with your presence, Mr. Chaolan!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_WLF_010: Welcome, Professor Niklas Kliesen. I appreciate you making the trek to get here.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_WLF_020: Oh? If memory serves, you were in the last tournament...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_NIK_030: Oh, this is Leo, my acting assistant.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_010: Hey there. You've been good to me and my father.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_020: Jin Kazama: the man who once spread chaos across the world.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_040: What would you say to a quick sparring session?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_WLF_030: Jin is no longer the man he once was. Come, I shall explain in detail on the way to Italy.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_NIK_050: Allow me to offer the results of my research into the devil.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_NIK_060: We've learned a bevy of new information.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_WLF_040: Now then, to summarize the professor's hypothesis,
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_WLF_050:
devils are exceptional members of humanity
bequeathed with a fraction of Azazel's power.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_NIK_080: Azazel appeared before ancient man, creating devils to act as its servants.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_NIK_090:
The devils are able to access superhuman powers by using
a certain emotion.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LZD_010: So, the depths of Kazuya's avarice settled the entire affair.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_050:
The desire to rule, to steal, and destroy...
I didn't sense anything like that from your fists, Jin.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_MNT_010:
But without such desire,
we have no hope of defeating Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_060: I did feel something though. Kind of hard to put into words...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_070: A warmth? Like a hearth that's only just been lit.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_080: I see no reason to lump you in with Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_GHP_090: I hope you can hold onto your true desires, Jin.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_ZBR_060: (You better believe I'm going to observe how you plan on getting your power back, Jin Kazama.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_BBN_010:
As declared, Kazuya Mishima is sanctioning nations that were
defeated during the preliminaries.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_BBN_020: If the tournament completes at this rate, the nations' hierarchy will become solidified.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LON_010:
Once the new pecking order's in place,
humanity'll have a field day warmongering.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LON_020: So Heihachi Mishima fought the devil to avert this outcome.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_BBN_040:
However, a man carrying on his bloodline and ambitions is 
trying to face off against the devil as a human.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LON_030: Lars Alexandersson... The lion of the rebellion.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LON_040: Fine by me. Get in contact with Yggdrasil.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LON_050: We'll make it a joint operation.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT04_LON_060: (When it comes to the global balance of power, we'd best be the ones calling the shots.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_HMS_010: I can sense your displeasure. And after I brought you all the way to Rome to observe my majesty in the flesh.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_DER_010: Forcing me to come in that big ole Rochefort tin can, you bet your ass I'm displeased!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_SNK_010: Huh? Hold up... Were you, like, Jin's sister or something?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_DER_020: Thanks for taking care of my big bro... Not!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_DER_030: So... You're on Jin's side, then?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_SNK_020: Say what? No way, not a chance.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_SNK_030: I came here to make mincemeat of Kazuya Mishima.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_020: The fighters will battle for personal glory and the fate of their countries!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_030: The battle to decide the ranks of the new world begins now!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_040: The first match of the first round is about to begin!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_010: The middleweight boxing champion of the world!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_020: The genius of the ring descends to the colosseum!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_040: A tenacious will and a body of iron!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_050: This powerful pro wrestler takes his opponents' attacks and returns them...with interest!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_080: Now, it's time for the second match of the first round!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_100: The self-proclaimed best fighter in the universe!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_110: His Phoenix Smasher crushes everything in his way!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_140: This carnivorous beast invaded the Southeast Asia
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_150: Oceania qualifiers and clawed its way to victory!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_210: Next is the third match of the first round!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_220: The fighters who made it through the qualifier blocks will move on to round two!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_230: His chameleon-like style of martial arts
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_270: He captures his prey with cool-headed combat sambo techniques
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_280: and squeezes the life from it!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_150: That's half of the first round finished!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_160: These have all been incredible bouts!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_170: This tournament will be one for the history books!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_180: Now, before the excitement dies down, let's head right into the second half of round one!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_190: Round one, match four! The winner here will move on to round two!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_CML_010: (Here and now, have our showdown, we shall.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_330: Is a sword against the rules? Obviously!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_340: But ninjas don't abide by the rules!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_370: He runs wild and leaves destruction in his wake!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_430: Now it's time for the fifth match of the first round!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_440: Her hometown is kept secret at her request,
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_450: but everyone knows who she is!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_480: She hails from the Ortiz farm, known for its Peruvian coffee!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_490: Who knows what this rising star of MMA will accomplish?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_LON_010: We'd better get our ducks in a row ourselves.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S06_260: Next is the sixth match, the final bout of round one!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_540: The man who once held the world in his hands as the head of the Mishima Zaibatsu...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_560: The man who lost control of the Zaibatsu,
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_S07_600: The grandmaster of Wing Chun, from the wasteland of New York...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_010: I knew I'd meet you someday.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_020: I, uh, wanted to thank you for standing up to Kazuya Mishima in New York.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_ANT_010: I lacked the power back then. And now, I'm even less than what I was.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_040: Show it to me. Show me your heart.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_050: Do you see now? You beat me with your heart...not your strength.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_GRL_010: In my world to come, all hierarchies shall be determined by strength alone!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_GRL_020: As I proclaimed, the winning country of this tournament shall receive due compensation for their achievements.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_GRL_030: The victors may do as they please with the defeated, without reprisal!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_GRL_040: Rejoice in the freedom wrought by power!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_ANT_030: (So he plans to make humanity fight among itself! Even so...)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_060: Do you see your past sins in Kazuya Mishima?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_070: Now answer me... Who are you?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_080: If you know your enemy and yourself, you'll never be in danger...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_090: Looking back on the past is the job of old men.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_JLY_100: Believe in yourself and look to the future.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_CTR_010: According to your premonition, the Colosseum will soon be met by a tremendous wave.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT05_CRW_010: If we don't act now, Jin Kazama, the light of the red star may never return.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_LZD_010:
Never thought I'd fight alongside
the legendary soldier known as Phantom Raven.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_LON_020: Just call me Victor. Codenames are for kids.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_LON_030: Come on, let's get going. Someone's gotta safeguard our self-respect as a species.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_LON_040: I can't let this dog and pony show go on any longer. Evacuate everyone here.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GRL_010: Now, all of the pieces are in place.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GRL_020: You've come of your own volition? A fool to the end.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_LON_050: Claudio... So even the Italian's come to play.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_MNT_010: Lars! An incredible amount of energy is accumulating in the skies overhead!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GRL_030: Come, Azazel! Awaken from your slumber!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_LZD_030: Kazuya was looking to resurrect Azazel this whole time?!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_ZBR_010: (Well, well... So that's the original devil, huh? This is going to be fun.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_CRW_080: To stop Kazuya Mishima, you will have to confront yourself first.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_CRW_090: Return to the point of origin....
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_CRW_100: In the place this all began, you must overcome great difficulty.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_CRW_110: That will show you a way... A path to finally purge you of evil.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_ANT_050: This is where it all began for me...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_CRW_120: You will be a shining star of hope for everyone...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_HMS_020: If we are to go, I shall have my private jet prepare for takeoff at once.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_CTR_030: For this world, and for those whom I treasure.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GOT_030: (Allow me to reward your labors. You shall have the honor of becoming a part of me.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GRL_050: It is you who shall become part of me!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GOT_040: (Such foolish aspirations... You shall know your place!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GRL_060: I'll make you choke on the entirety of my power!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GOT_050: (You indeed have power befitting your ambitions.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GOT_060: (Yet such power is a mere trifle before my own!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT06_GOT_070: (Inconceivable! A mere servant like you could not possibly—!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_010: Jin Kazama... Any attempt to combat that devil shall only end in your defeat.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_020: Do as Zafina bids of you. Seek out your roots.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_LZD_010: Jin, there is something only you can accomplish.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_WLF_020: You can pass the baton to us from time to time, you know.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_ANT_010: ...Got it. I leave the rest to you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_HMS_010: Come, let us head to the airport!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_ANT_020: (This hope you've entrusted to me... I'll make it mean something, I swear!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_010: It would seem you have a death wish.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_030: I have a secret stratagem in play. I ask that you grant me the time to enact it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_LON_010: You're gonna live up to the hype, ain'tcha, boy?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_040: Behold, the technique of the exorcist...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_SNK_010: Pain in my ass... Fine, I'll come with!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_060: There's nowhere left to run. You're going to regret this!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_ZBR_050: Turns out this way works better for me!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_ZBR_080: Still not enough, from the looks of it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_ZBR_100: Yessir! I'm resilient! But more importantly...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_060: The elderly need not be so impatient.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_070: The restriction field is already in place.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_080: Sink into the eternal darkness, joined only by the stain of your sins!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_140: Pretty clever for a mere human!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_100: I fear I attempted to use you. Now I merely mean to atone for that misdeed.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_110: I have long since steeled my resolve, my dear.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_120: And yet, I have no intention of attaining my goals through sacrifice.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_CTR_160: The rest is up to you, Jin Kazama.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_170: Looks like you got your wish.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_180: I'll make sure the rest of you join him.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_ZBR_120: This was what you were after, wasn't it, Claudio?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_200: Enough of your futile resistance, Azazel!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_XXB_210: This will require a bit more time.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_WLF_090: Looks like we endured it, one way or another.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT07_LON_090: Claudio... Can't say I saw you pulling my ass out of the fire.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_KAL_010: All available troops have been dispatched...and are moving to Yakushima.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_KAL_020: We'll slow down Jin Kazama and draw out the rebel army...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_KAL_030: Then take them all out at Yakushima. I assume that's the plan.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_GRL_010: Don't kill him. I'll finish Jin with my own hands.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_KAL_040: I've scouted a few fighters from the tournament who could prove useful.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_GRL_030: All that was yours is soon to be mine.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_GRL_040: And all that you were shall disappear within me.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_NIK_010: The amplified power of Kazuya Mishima succeeded even in absorbing his creator, Azazel.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_NIK_020: His strength exceeds even that of Azazel's by an incredible margin at this point.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_WLF_010: We can hardly expect Jin to restore his strength through ordinary means, now can we?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_MNT_010: The "guidepost to exorcise evil" Zafina spoke of...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_MNT_020: It would seem our fate depends on it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ZBR_010: Speaking of powers... Couldn't Claudio cleanse evil, too?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_NIK_030: Perhaps it is a way to control the devil's blood.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_NIK_040: Or even a way to wrest said power from him.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_GHP_010: So, that means if Jin can get his hands on that power...!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_LZD_010: No time to smell the roses, fellas.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_LZD_020: We need to put our faith in Jin and do what we can.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_DER_010: Is that my family tree?! When the heck did you get your hands on that?!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_010: Isn't it sad that the panda is left out of the group?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_DER_030: I got it, lemme get some breathing room, why don't you!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_DER_040: So this Jun lady is Jin's mom?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_HMS_010: Indeed. Although, the main branch of the Kazama clan was wiped out seven years ago, when Yakushima came under assault.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_HMS_020: Jun Kazama was never heard from again...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_020: It killed my mother, burned the forest, and took everything from me.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_HMS_030: Come, everyone. It's time we head for Yakushima.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_DER_050: We split up as soon as we land, right?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_HMS_040: Asuka and I shall run reconnaissance on the G Corp forces.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_DER_060: Xiaoyu, Panda, you're gonna have Jin's back.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_030: Riddle me this, Jin. What'd you wanna grow up to be when you were little?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_040:
My dream was to open a big ole amusement park,
and run the whole show!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_050: That way, I could bring happiness to people from all over the world.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_030: Everyone in the world, huh? That's some ambition you've got there.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_040: Still, I could get behind that.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_050: Me? Can't say I really ever had a dream.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_060: Protecting my mother and the beauty of Yakushima, that was enough.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_080: Mother and I always sparred together here.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_090:
After practice we'd sit together
and eat the packed lunch my mom made...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_080: ...Say, Jin. How about a sparring match of our own?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_090: Zafina said you had to go back to where this all began, right? If this'll help, then...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_100: Sometimes exchanging blows works better than exchanging words.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_110: I thought you'd changed so much these past few years... Freaks me out just thinking about it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_130: You're still the same Jin I've always known and loved.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_140: Just don't lose sight of the things you wanna protect. Okay?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_AML_010: (There is an ogre on this island.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_AML_020: (When the ogre appears, you must hide.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_170: Mother... She used to sing it to me.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_RAT_150: Jin...? Is something up with that tree?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_AML_030: (Shall we ask the god of the mountain?)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT08_ANT_120: Where it all began... Could there be a clue up ahead?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_WLF_010: The G Corp forces likely have two goals.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_WLF_020: First: the capture of Jin Kazama. Second: the annihilation of his allies—namely, us.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_LZD_010: This is how we predict G Corp will deploy their forces.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_LZD_020: We'll split into platoons, and crush the main forces in each area.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_ZBR_010: Ahaha, it's ten of them for every one of us!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_MNT_010: Even so, we cannot afford to lose Jin.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_WLF_030: I've received word of the corporation hiring combatants from the tournament.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_LZD_030: Be that as it may, we'll protect Jin 'til the end. We have to.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_LZD_040: Besides, our backup is nothing to sneeze at.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_RAT_010: He'll be back. He even promised this time!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_CRW_010: Jin Kazama will have to face great difficulties.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_CRW_020: When the time comes, you must protect him.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_RAT_050: You're not laying a single finger on Jin, and that's final!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_AML_020: Listen up, Jin. The Kazama Style exists to protect those precious to you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_S03_020: Got it! Then I'll just protect you!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT09_ANT_030: Where in the world am I?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_S12_010: The newest suppression weapon is nearly ready!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_GRF_010: I can't let Kazuya go about doing whatever he wants.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_JLY_010: And I want to offer Jin my help.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_020: Allow me to thank you all again.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_030: I'm pleased to fight by your side.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_WLF_010: The UN forces are already here.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LON_010: Just in time for the party.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_050: We are about to engage in a battle against G Corp.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_060: The difference in numbers is overwhelming. It goes without saying, this will be a desperate struggle.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_070: Even so, I refuse to submit to a future under the thumb of evil!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LON_020: The fate of the world rests on your shoulders!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_100: Area secured! On to the next one!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_WLF_030: Allow me to show you the capabilities of our new Violet Suits.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_BBN_010: It's time to get serious, Lee.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_030: What's this? I figured we were done here.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_GHP_050: You're Azucena, of the Ortiz Farm!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_050:
It was an easy choice.
G Corp makes for better brand optics!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_060: I mean, what better way to achieve world peace than a fresh brew?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_070: If it's for world peace, I'll smack you down!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_110: Say, how'd you know about me anyway?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_GHP_100: I mean hey, there isn't a single coffee lover out there who hasn't heard of you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_120: Well, well! Thought I caught a whiff of a fellow javaphile.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_130: Where are you from, anyway? No wait, let me guess! Lessee, now...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_131: I figure you for a Kilimanjaro guy...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_134: Germany, maybe? How off am I?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_GHP_110: Haha, well yes, I hail from Germany.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_137: No way, I got it in one guess?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_140:
Right, then! You've gotta try our new product,
the Azucena Morning Blend!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_CAT_150: I'll ship some by express mail to Germany, then!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_GHP_120: What in the world was she after, I wonder?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_GRF_020: Law... Why are you with G Corporation?!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_PIG_020: It's your fault I'm standing here right now!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_PIG_030: You promised we'd split the tournament prize, remember?!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_RBT_010: (Paul's being a real nudnik, as always.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_RBT_020: (I know, I can use this brouhaha to take him out of the picture!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_HRS_010: Sergei Dragunov commands this squad, does he?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LON_030: Leave him to me. We've got some unfinished business, he and I.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_PGN_010: (Take him down, and the chain of command grinds to a halt!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_BSN_010: I can cause a commotion and try to distract them.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_PGN_020: (This is the might of the King!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_BSN_020: I'll leave the rest to you!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LON_055: Looks like this is the last number for this twisted dance of ours.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LON_070: Always ready to cut and run.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LON_080: This is Victor. Mission accomplished. How's it going over yonder, Lars?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_110: This is Lars. We're pinned down by the sheer number of enemy reinforcements.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_010: Lars! Scan of the island complete!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_120: Have you located Jin and the others?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_020: Affirmative. Xiaoyu is protecting Jin from G Corp forces.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_030: However, Jin is displaying abnormal readings in his consciousness level.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_040: Something appears to be disturbing him.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_130: Alisa, Lee... Can I leave the rest of the enemies here to you?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_140: Alisa, I need you to send Jin's location to my terminal.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_050: I anticipated such a response, and have already sent the transmission.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_LZD_150: ...Thank you. I leave the rest in your capable hands.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_KLW_010: All I want is the vindication of my honor: no more, no less!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_KLW_020: I won't condone a second defeat!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_S12_020: Suppression weapon Jack-8, ready for deployment!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_ZBR_010: Are you sure you still wanna be on this island?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_KAL_030: It seems you're very well informed.
KAL_Other_014: So, tell me more about yourself.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_ZBR_040: ...So you've figured me out, haven't you?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_KAL_070: My job with G Corporation is finished. I'm done here.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_ZBR_050: How about this...why not work for me?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_KAL_065: I'm willing to negotiate...if it's after my vacation.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_060: I shall deal with this unit. Everyone, you must make your escape at once!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_HMS_030: It would seem we're right on time.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_080: Affirmative. I must thank the two of you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_MNT_090: Subjugation of all G Corp forces confirmed in this area!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_XXB_020: This place shall be your grave!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_ZBR_060: Come on then, try and kill me!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_XXB_025: Nothing left but to clean up the trash.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT10_XXB_040: Jin Kazama. I shall put you out of your misery.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_RAT_030: I won't let them hurt you!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_RAT_070: Please, buy us some time! Just until Jin wakes up!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_030: You won't be getting through me!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_050: Sure, we might be weak compared to you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_070: When we work together... Support each other...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_080: We can build a future with our own hands!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_XXB_030: You... A shameful failure if I've ever seen one.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_130: Every minute, every single second the lot of us can buy...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_140: ...will mean all the difference for the world ahead!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT11_LZD_160: (You're the only one who can do this!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_020: You couldn't protect your own mother. All because you are powerless.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_040: Just how many precious things have slipped through your fingers up until now?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_060: Steep your very being in anger and hatred...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_070: Walk a path dedicated solely to vengeance.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_060: I have to thank you, you know.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_080: Your arrogance engulfed the world in war, ravaged it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_090: Everywhere you go, anger and hatred follow.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_100: How are you any different from Kazuya Mishima?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_110: You must live with your sins. You will only find atonement through solitude.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_070: The awareness of my sins and my duty gave me the will to move forward. And yet...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_080: Atonement won't come from fighting on my own.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_090: I'll live on, together with my sins.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_120: It looks like you've faced yourself, and overcome your past.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_100: You're right. We've been at the mercy of our anger, and our hatred.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_130: Precisely, shouldering that sin and duty have made us strong.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_110: All of this has led me to become the man I am today.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_120: I've come here to accept it all and take ownership of my past.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_130: And when I leave here, it'll be to welcome a better tomorrow.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_140: I won't reject you—reject myself any longer.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_150: I need you to break them...these chains that bind me.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_170: The chains that bound you are no more. What is it you truly desire?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_190: I want to protect those important to me, even if it costs me my life.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_200: Toward that end, I need your strength.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_SWL_200: If that is your wish, then I accept it wholeheartedly.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_230: You've always been protecting me, haven't you?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_240: You have my thanks, and my apologies.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT12_ANT_250: Take a look. This time, I'll be the one to protect them all.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_XXB_010: Commendable persistence. Still, that's as far as it'll take you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_LZD_010: Sure took your time, my trump card.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_SWL_010: Sorry for all I've put you through.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_RAT_020: It's weird, y'know? Looking at you now, I'm not scared. Not even with all the pointy bits.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_RAT_030: Just don't die on me, okay?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_SWL_030: I'm going to finish this, once and for all!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_XXB_060: What do you hope to accomplish, having rejected the nature of the devil's blood?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_XXB_070: Such power may have stood a chance against me before...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_XXB_080: But now, all you can do is fall!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_XXB_090: Bear witness to the end of everything!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_SWL_090: You mean to wipe this island off the map?!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_SWL_110: (What's the point of having this power if I can't stop him here?)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_SWL_120: (I don't care if it kills me... I'm taking him down!)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_010: Jin... Don't give up on yourself.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_020: You've grown so strong, my son.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_ANT_040: then my existence has no meaning!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_030: You're a kind boy. Always putting yourself second, I imagine.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_040: The Kazama Style exists to protect the well-being of those precious to you.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_050: But you know that also runs the risk of causing pain to others.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_060: Your own life is well worth protecting. Don't you forget it.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_ANT_050: Mother... Do I have the right to desire life?
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_070: A Kazama's power fosters life, and cleanses evil.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_AML_080: Use that power to save yourself...and Kazuya.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT13_XXB_135: My strength... I can feel it fading away!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT14_XXA_090: I'll protect what's precious to me, and pave the way to our future!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT14_XXA_100: That's what this power is for!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_010: We've lost the devil's power. We're nothing but a couple of humans now, you and I.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_010: What of it? That was nothing but one means to an end.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_020: In that case... I'll stop you, here and now!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_020: If you stand before me, you die. Doesn't matter who you are.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_165: That's who I am now. Bring it on!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_180: Anyone who tries to dictate how I live...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_CRW_010: You will be a shining star of hope...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_230: You just don't know when to quit!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_250: (Those feelings gave me the courage to survive.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_270: If it means living on with everyone...
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_280: I'll get back on my feet as many times as it takes!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_260: Your refusal to quit is almost admirable. Even so, this match has already been decided!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_290: No longer will I deny my past.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_310: No longer will I deny how much I love fighting.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_330: No longer will I deny my comrades and our bonds.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ANT_385: (With that, the devil's blood is gone from the world.)
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_ZBR_020: On my life, I swear I'll—!
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_330: Even without my devil form, I'll fight to the end.
TEXT_000_VO_MAIN_ACT15_GRL_340: In this world, power controls everything.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_010: Living on Yakushima seven years ago, Jin and I
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_020: were assaulted by the entity known as Ogre.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_040: But Jin took on Ogre to protect me, and he fell...
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_050: (I must save Jin, no matter the cost!)
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_060: Grasping a faint hope, I led Ogre to a certain location.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_070: It was a mystical ground passed down in the Kazama family for generations.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_080: Drawing on the power of that holy ground, I barely managed to defeat the Ogre.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_100: What I heard while gravely wounded was the Kazama family lullaby.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_110: Guided by a mysterious power, I lay down to sleep on the ancient altar.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_AML_AML_150: Please, let them both be unharmed...
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_011: I loved my father... Since the day I heard of his death,
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_021: I've lived only to protect my mother.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_031: But one year ago, while conducting research for G Corp,
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_041: she was killed in what was made to look like an accident.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_051: I have nobody left to protect.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_061: One day, as I was lost in grief, a message reached me.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_071: "If you want to know the truth..."
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_081: "Recover the data left in G Corp's Institute for the Study of Prehistoric Civilizations."
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_101: She arranged to send the letter on the eve of her death.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_111: Even if it's a trap, I have nothing else to lose.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_121: I decided right then to infiltrate G Corp. Then...
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_NIK_030: Just in the nick of time, eh, Leo.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_NIK_040: What? Have I got something on my face?
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_NIK_050: Yes, I truly am your father, Niklas Kliesen.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_GHP_100: If she was alive, why didn't she contact me until now?
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_NIK_060: I really am sorry, but I'll tell you the details later.
TEXT_000_VO_SIDE_GHP_NIK_070: I have your mother's data. Now, let's get out of here!

TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_6_LZD_010: With the tournament under way, we tracked Jin to some ruins in the Middle East,
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_6_LZD_020: where we witnessed the resurrection of the ancient demon known as Azazel.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_6_LZD_030: Waging war by his own hand, he filled the world with negative emotions and resurrected Azazel...
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_6_LZD_040: He would save the world through his and Azazel's mutual destruction.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_6_LZD_060: But was that really the right course of action?
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_010: Heihachi, who replaced the missing Jin as the head of the Mishima Zaibatsu,
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_020: announced the opening of The King of Iron Fist Tournament to lure in Kazuya, who possessed devil power.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_030: Behind the scenes, we managed to locate and rescue Jin.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_040: We laid low in our hideout, waiting for a chance to go on the offensive.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_050: Before long, the war between the Mishima Zaibatsu and G Corp grew more intense,
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_060: and the time came to end the conflict between Heihachi and Kazuya.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_GRL_010: I'll take everything back from you!
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_GRL_020: A fight is about who's left standing.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_080: But after destroying the Mishima Zaibatsu, Kazuya carried out an invasion of the entire world.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_LZD_090: After Heihachi's death, only we can stop Kazuya.
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_ANT_010: Yes, the devil's blood runs through my veins...
TEXT_000_VO_DIGEST_7_ANT_020: So it's up to me to kill Kazuya.

Looks like it finally rolled out the brand-new TEKKEN 8 today.

Many players who believe in playing with integrity gather here, without worrying about their opponents.
A somewhat unusual TEKKEN 8 machine seems to be located here.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_074:
This arcade is a renowned hot spot for TEKKEN.
It holds regular tournaments, and it's a training ground where players prove their mettle.
There's a major tournament going on now, so the players are even stronger than usual.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_075:
This is the venue for the event which people have been waiting for: the TEKKEN WORLD TOUR!
Elite players who've fought their way up through regional tournaments gather here.
The battle to decide the strongest of them all is about to start...
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_079:
Run the tutorial?
(You can run it later, even if you skip it now.)
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_082:
A mysterious facility decked out with heavy security.
The cries of battle ring out here night after night.
Apparently you can battle your own clone here created using the latest AI technology.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_084:
All right, here we go.
I can't wait to see how tough the challengers are gonna be!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_085:
We've finally made it.
I can't lose until I run into you!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_086:
This is the last battle.
I just know you're gonna kick their ass!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_SYSTEM_089: You can change things like titles and the Health Gauge!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_013: First off, just try attacking with any button.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_013_XB: First off, just try attacking with any button.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_014: Nice! That's it! Now try the other buttons.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_014_XB: Nice! That's it! Now try the other buttons.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_015: In TEKKEN, attack buttons are linked to a character's arms or legs. So, for example, you can press to perform a left punch, and for a right kick.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_015_XB: In TEKKEN, attack buttons are linked to a character's arms or legs. So, for example, you can press to perform a left punch, and for a right kick.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_016: I can teach you a few recommended moves once you pick a character.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_018: Let's try moving around now! Use {btn_Arrow_All} to move your character.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_020:
Now, let's try some movement techniques that'll you need in real matches.
Try inputting this command.

Nice!
Now try inputting this command.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_022:
Great!
Now try inputting this command.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_023:
Excellent!
Now try inputting this command.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_024:
Looking sharp!
I reckon you're good to go now!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_025:
In TEKKEN, a match is decided by health!
See that Health Gauge at the top of the screen? Reduce your opponent's health to zero to win!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_026: Naturally, that means losing your own health is bad, got it?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_027: You can stop your opponent's attacks by blocking. So, if it looks like an attack is incoming, just keep pressing !
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_029: That's it! Looks like you've got this.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_031: All right! Not bad at all!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_032: Just hold until your opponent's attack connects.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_033: Looks like you're pressing instead of .
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_034: Looks like you're pressing instead of .
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_036:
Now, I know what you're thinking...
If you just stand there and block everything, you'll never lose, right?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_037: Well, there's the little issue of low attacks and throws. These can't be blocked using a standing block.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_038: So, if you think a low attack or a throw is coming your way, you can use a crouching block to avoid taking any damage.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_039: Hold to do a crouching block.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_040: Try to block a low attack!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_041: That's it! Looks like you've got this.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_043: All right! Not bad at all!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_044: Just hold until your opponent's attack connects.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_045: Looks like you're pressing instead of .
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_046: You dodged that attack by jumping? Pretty smart!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_047:
Solid blocking!
Great work out there!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_049: You can reduce your opponent's health by hitting them with attacks. To prevent getting hit by attacks, hold for a standing block, or for a crouching block.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_050: Both you and your opponent trade blows until one of you reaches zero health and a winner is decided!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_051: All right! Try to break through your opponent's block and reduce their health to zero!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_052: There are some attacks that can't be blocked with crouching block; these are called mid attacks.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_053: Nice! You hit them with a mid attack while they were in a crouching block!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_054: Good! You hit them with a low attack while they were in a standing block!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_055: Amazing! You used a throw to deal damage to an opponent in a standing block. Good thinking!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_056: Great! You're getting the hang of this!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_057: They're using a standing block, so a low attack would be more effective here!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_058: Use a mid attack against opponents that are in a crouching block!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_059: Okay! Now you can dish out a beating, no problem!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_060:
There's a move I think you'd be interested in!
Wanna try your hand at a Heat Engager?
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_061:
When you manage to land a powerful attack, your character will take on a blue aura.
People call this aura Heat.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_062: While you're in Heat state, your opponent will take damage from your attacks even when blocking.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_063: The key to victory is to attack aggressively and take them down before your Heat ends.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_064: There are also moves that are only available when Heat is activated. Try busting out a Heat Smash now!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_065: Press {gui_bank0_heat} if you're finding the move a little tricky at first. That'll let you easily perform a Heat Smash.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_066:
Oh yeah! That's your Heat Smash!
It's a heavy hitter, and an essential move for scoring those Ws!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_067: When you're in a tight spot, your Health Gauge and character will glow red. We call this Rage, and it boosts your attack damage!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_068: When you're in the Rage state, you can unleash a high-damage Rage Art!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_069: Press {gui_bank0_rage} if you're finding the move a little tricky at first. That'll let you easily perform a Rage Art.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_070:
Brutal! Look at that damage!
And that's a Rage Art!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_093: Please visit the official website for Recommended Move Lists. (Only available during the closed beta period.)

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_095_XB: Each attack button corresponds to a limb of the character.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_096: For example, press to perform a left punch and for a right kick. Combine these with {btn_Arrow_All} to perform different attacks!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_098: Nice! Next, let's try some important command inputs that you'll often use.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_105_XB: When a button with a white arrow is displayed, press that arrow and button at the same time, rather than in sequence.

TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_124:
Heat Smash isn't the only good thing about Heat state.
You also get the added bonus of chip damage with all your moves!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_125: The Heat Smash is a powerful move, so your Heat will end when you use it.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_126: TEKKEN is all about air combos. If you can do what we practice here, you can do air combos no problem!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_129: Try getting your opponent airborne and then unleashing Heat!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_130:
Close!
Next time just keep pressing {gui_bank0_heat}.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_131:
Great!
When you use a Heat Smash this way, you're guaranteed to land it!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_132:
The command for combo starters is different for each character.
Once you launch an opponent, just keep pressing{gui_bank0_heat}!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_137: You can also activate Heat by landing certain moves unique to each character. If you do that, you'll recover health and create an opening for a one-sided attack!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_138: {gui_bank0_heat} is fine and all for activating Heat, but now try using a move to activate it!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_139:
When the move hits and Heat is activated, you will run towards the opponent.
Your opponent has no choice but to defend, so it is your chance to attack!
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_140:
Next is a handy move when your opponent is pressuring you!
You can use a Power Crush to attack your opponent while also absorbing their attacks.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_142:
With Power Crushes, you can attack while blocking!
For starters, try using a Power Crush when you're in a tough spot and you'll get by okay.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_143: Oh, nice! You know how to use a low parry? That's also a viable option, for sure.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_146: Now I'm going to teach you about Heat, a super-important battle system.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_147:
Did you notice that you have another gauge besides the Health Gauge?
That's the Heat Timer.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_148:
When you have a Heat Timer, it means you're able to activate Heat.
You start every round in this state.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_149:
Heat activated!
You can see the Timer looks different now.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_150:
Your character is stronger with Heat activated.
However, there is a time limit, so you don't stay stronger forever.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_151:
Your Heat state ends when time runs out.
You can only use it once per round, so timing is key.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_152:
You've nailed the basics!
Now let's take a look at the battle system.
TEXT_000_UI_AQ_TUTORIAL_153:
Okay, you've mastered the battle system!
Next, you just have to pick a character and get fighting!
