TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_001:
Despite its long history, there are still many mysteries surrounding the Mishima clan. The clan is thought to have distinguished itself during the Nara Period, and there remain numerous literary works and paintings depicting its feats of demon extermination between the Heian and Kamakura periods. The clan's legacy of success continued throughout the Sengoku period as they founded the unique Mishima-Style of fighting—a style that was originally based around sword use, but later focused on open-handed techniques. Mishima Heavy Industries was established during the Industrial Revolution and played a significant role in modernizing Japan, providing the clan with astronomical wealth.
After defeating his father Jinpachi, who placed more importance on martial strength than social status or power, Heihachi Mishima focused on expanding the company's presence in the arms industry, a decision which eventually led to the founding of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
In time, Heihachi sought to gather persons of outstanding talent from all over the world, those who fought using their own strength instead of relying on weapons; and so, he organized the first The King of Iron Fist Tournament. The tournament has continued to this day, albeit under different organizers with their own motives. In recent years, it has become a critical event that often foretells which way the fate of the world shall sway.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_002:
After becoming the new leader of the Mishima clan, Heihachi Mishima founded the Mishima Zaibatsu. During the Industrial Revolution, Mishima Heavy Industries significantly aided Japan's modernization and laid the foundation for the Zaibatsu with its manufacture of boats, automobiles, planes, and other vehicles.
Although Mishima Heavy Industries was actively involved in the arms industry, its leader at the time, the renowned martial artist Jinpachi Mishima, made attempts to reduce the company's exploits in this field. However, once he fell by his son's hands, Heihachi Mishima took over and redoubled efforts in weapon manufacturing. After coming out on top of a fierce battle against its domestic competitor and Japan's second-largest organization, the Nakamura Zaibatsu, the Mishima Zaibatsu paved its way to becoming one of the most powerful organizations in the world.
With its own private military known as the Tekken Force at its beck and call, some said the Mishima Zaibatsu had gained greater influence than even some nations.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_003:
With the Mishima Zaibatsu having ascended to the status of a new global power, its leader Heihachi Mishima announced The King of Iron Fist Tournament, an inaugural fighting competition to name the strongest martial artist in the world. Fighters from all corners of the globe gathered to compete; some fought for the unprecedented prize money, others for power, and a few for the simple pleasure of proving their skills against the greatest.
Among the fighters, though, was one who bore a deep hatred for the tournament's organizer and came in search of vengeance—Heihachi's son, Kazuya Mishima. 
After emerging victorious, Kazuya exacted his revenge for the years of mental and physical abuse he had suffered at his father's hands by dropping him off a cliff—the same cliff Heihachi had thrown him from when he was only five years old. 
As he watched his father's body plummet to the ground, a satisfied smile crept over Kazuya's face.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_004:
In the two years that have passed since the first The King of Iron Fist Tournament, Kazuya Mishima has taken over the Mishima Zaibatsu from his father and formed his own private military. He also seized control of Japan's second-largest island, Hokkaido, in order to create his own independent nation.
In a bid to realize his long-held goal of "a world ruled by the strong," Kazuya hosted the second The King of Iron Fist Tournament. This served both to fortify his army, and to eliminate anyone who stood in his way.
Facing him in the finals, however, was none other than the man he had defeated in the previous tournament—Heihachi Mishima, back from the dead. Upon beating his son, Heihachi cast Kazuya into a volcano and claimed leadership of the Zaibatsu once more.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_005:
The Kazama family has lived in Yakushima for over a thousand years, and I as part of that heritage have always been able to sense things that others cannot. Growing up, I never realized that my power was special, but the people who saw me talking to thin air grew scared of me, and I spent many years isolated and alone. I felt that the only time I could be myself was around animals, who are pure of heart and free from negative thoughts.
In the end, I felt suffocated on the island, so I decided to move to Tokyo to study at a university there. However, after spending a number of years in a big city surrounded by people who cared little for one another, I began to lose interest in the supernatural elements of the world, too.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_006:
However, one night, I had a dream that my father—whom I had not seen in a while—came and bid me farewell. Soon after, I received a message that he had passed away. This event stirred something inside me, and I started to remember all those animals whom I had once been so close to in Yakushima. I decided that I wanted to protect those precious lives, and so became a wildlife surveillance officer at the W.W.W.C., an animal conservation group.
Through my work, I received information that suggested an organization called the Mishima Zaibatsu was involved in the smuggling of endangered animals. Its leader at the time, Kazuya Mishima, was the man behind this cruelty.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_007:
So, I entered The King of Iron Fist Tournament in an attempt to bring Kazuya in. The moment I met him, however, I sensed a mystical and evil power exuding from him. I immediately understood that this man was the same as me—misunderstood because of our powers, and forced to endure a life of loneliness because of it. I knew I was one of the only people in the world who could empathize with him, who could save him from his solitude. And so, I approached Kazuya without any fear in my heart.
Gradually, we became very close, and brief though our time together was, we were happy. And then, we conceived a child. However, fate tore us apart when Kazuya was defeated by his father, Heihachi, and disappeared without a trace.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_008:
Around this time, a strange figure bearing Kazuya's resemblance appeared before me. It was the evil presence that had been possessing him which we now call "Devil." I could sense that it wanted the soul of the child that grew inside me, so I had no choice but to fight it for the sake of our baby.
However, Devil's power was too great, and I was quickly overpowered. The only thought running through my mind was that of protecting the life inside me. As I prayed for some kind of miracle, I began to feel a strange sensation course through me.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_009:
A brilliant, bright light flowed from my body, giving me tremendous strength. With it, I was able to defeat Devil.
When the light subsided, my body reverted to normal, as if it knew that my task was complete. I still cannot fully comprehend what happened to me, but I believe the Kazama blood that runs through my veins reacted with Kazuya's blood to cause the miracle that I had prayed for.
After that, I returned to Yakushima and gave birth to our child. I wanted him to treat others with kindness and to always have a tender heart, and so I named him "Jin"—compassion.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_010:
Having reclaimed his rightful place as head of the Mishima Zaibatsu, Heihachi decided that he would settle the world's many conflicts to build a good reputation. Under this premise, he deployed special troops called the "Tekken Force" into every corner of the world. Fifteen years later, a whole squad of these elite soldiers was wiped out by a fighting god while investigating archaeological ruins in Central America. Witnessing this destructive power, Heihachi became convinced that if he could find a way to bring such extraordinary strength under his control, then he could easily achieve his plans of world domination. However, the god had other plans, and instead started attacking martial artists around the world. Jin and Jun Kazama, residing in Yakushima, fell victim to this fierce entity, which ended in Jun's disappearance.
After speaking with Jin, Heihachi realized that the god was drawn to those who were strong of spirit. Thus, he decided to personally train his grandson for four years before holding the third The King of Iron Fist Tournament. While Jin emerged victorious against the fighting god, Heihachi's betrayal awoke his devil power. This culminated in Jin sprouting wings before taking off into the night.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_011: A mysterious creature of unknown origins found amongst the ruins of an ancient civilization in Central America. Local legend says that it is a powerful fighting weapon left behind by beings who descended from beyond the heavens in ancient times. It is also said to be capable of absorbing life from any creature and stealing their strength. After being resurrected, it went on the hunt for even stronger fighters to beat, which led it to ambushing Jin at Yakushima. Jun, who was with Jin, was able to draw upon the power of the Kazama Sanctum to escape.It subsequently assumed control of Nina Williams, who had been in cryosleep, and joined the third The King of Iron Fist Tournament as her four years later. After losing against Paul Phoenix in the final match, it evolved into its true, vengeful form. However, Jin managed to defeat the creature, triggering the process that would awaken his devil power.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_012:
Two years have passed since the last tournament, and during that time, Heihachi has had his best scientists researching the cells of the fighting god in hopes of creating a new life-form. After learning that the Devil Gene is needed to incorporate the deity's DNA into another organism, Heihachi began tracking down his grandson's whereabouts. In the meantime, a new company called G Corp rose to the forefront. When Heihachi discovered they were studying Kazuya's body, he ordered the Tekken Force to retrieve his son's remains; however, Kazuya, then restored to full health, fended off his father's soldiers.
Thus, in order to lure both Jin and Kazuya to his side, Heihachi held the fourth The King of Iron Fist Tournament. While he succeeded in trapping Jin, he fell in the final fight against Kazuya. As promised, Heihachi took him back to the Mishima estate. However, the awakened Jin quickly defeated both his grandfather and father before once again fleeing the scene.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_013:
What was once a small munitions venture company soon transformed into a next-gen biotechnology innovator and became a leader in its field. The driving force behind such a change was the acquisition of a winged man found with burns covering his entire body. The corporation lost no time in analyzing his DNA and attempting to use it to create a new life-form. With the addition of biologist Emma Kliesen to their team, they made outstanding advancements in their research, leading G Corp to become a conglomerate with power rivaling that of some nations.
Shortly thereafter, however, countless G Corp executives were met with untimely deaths until every last one had been replaced. Under the new leadership, G Corp carried out an attack against the Mishima Zaibatsu, then headed by Jin. Such a victory received praise the world over; however, G Corp had little intention of stopping there, and instead turned its sights towards invading the rest of the world.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_014:
Following the end of the last tournament, Heihachi and Kazuya were ambushed by a team of Jack-4s sent by G Corp, which ended in a violent explosion at the Mishima estate. With reports of Heihachi's death circulating worldwide, it was thought to be the end of the Mishima Zaibatsu. However, his father, Jinpachi Mishima, who had been imprisoned underneath the Mishima estate for over 40 years, was finally set free thanks to the attack. He quickly assumed leadership of the Zaibatsu and restored it to its normal operations as if nothing had ever happened.
However, Jinpachi's imprisonment had fostered in him decades of deep-seated hatred, awakening within him something not quite human. So, he called the fifth The King of Iron Fist Tournament in search of anyone who might put him out of his misery. While Jin succeeded in bringing down his great-grandfather in the final match, his mind had already been subsumed by the power of the Devil Gene...
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_015:
Now head of the Mishima Zaibatsu, Jin began a campaign of misinformation as well as countless operations using the power of the Tekken Force. The world descended into chaos shortly thereafter, and as nations fell, the Mishima Zaibatsu declared its independence and intention to wage all-out war. However, as the Zaibatsu continued its meteoric rise, G Corp stood in opposition.
Having recognized the deep evil that had taken root in Jin, G Corp placed a handsome price on his head for his capture. But, as soon as news of the bounty was out, Jin responded by announcing that he would be holding the sixth The King of Iron Fist Tournament. Amongst rising tensions worldwide, Jin left for the Middle East to visit an abandoned temple in the desert. There, he faced the recently resurrected demon Azazel, and in an act of mutually assured destruction, he dragged the demon into the temple's depths.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_016:
With Jin's disappearance, the Mishima Zaibatsu was left leaderless and vulnerable to attacks by G Corp on every front, meaning the war quickly shifted in G Corp's favor. Heihachi, thought dead by the world, rose again to reclaim his position at the top of the Mishima Zaibatsu. With the goal of exposing Kazuya's true form to the world, Heihachi held the seventh The King of Iron Fist Tournament.
However, Heihachi was forced to change his plans when a mysterious, powerful fighter named Akuma arrived, claiming to know Heihachi's late wife Kazumi Mishima. Though the tournament was put on hold, Heihachi succeeded in showing Kazuya's devil form to the world and winning over public opinion. However, that support quickly evaporated when a Zaibatsu satellite weapon came crashing down to earth. After father and son went head-to-head in a final fight, Kazuya bested Heihachi and killed him. He then took his father's lifeless body and unceremoniously tossed it into the mouth of a volcano.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_017:
Millennia ago, Zafina's ancestors, charged with the protection of an imperial tomb, sealed away the demon Azazel. The ruler's servants were likewise felled, but as it so happened, there existed descendants of a devil that had escaped Azazel's rule long, long before Azazel's sealing came to pass. These descendants had fled to safety in the Far East, forming the clan of Hachijo.
The devil's blood spilled from one generation over to the next, carrying with it a sacred power dating back to antiquity that was both feared and revered. Understanding the threat it posed to the world, the Hachijo clan carefully controlled history from the shadows, erasing any trace of the power's existence for centuries on end.
However, everything changed when Kazumi Hachijo was killed by her husband Heihachi after she infiltrated the Mishima household to act as an informant. In his wrath at having been forced to kill his own wife, Heihachi slaughtered every last member of the Hachijo household...save for one. Though the Hachijo name would be lost to time, there was yet a baby girl whom Heihachi permitted to live...
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_018:
To fight back against G Corp's relentless takeover, Lidia Sobieska and the Union of Nations banded together and formed a resolution to sanction the ruthless company—a move to which an international congress agreed. However, G Corp refused to take such a move lying down. To illustrate this fact, Reina leaked confidential information that showed G Corp's plans to occupy New York City on the day they were to be officially sanctioned.
In response, the plan "Operation Lightning" was devised. Jin Kazama, now allied with the rebel army Yggdrasil, would be central to its success, directly taking down his father Kazuya; Lidia and the UN forces, meanwhile, would provide backup and run interference on G Corp's forces. While the team met with success when it came to eliminating G Corp's military, Jin was unable to stop Kazuya from wreaking havoc on New York.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_019:
I am now a former biological researcher for the Mishima Zaibatsu. Instead, G Corp has become my new home, and I am to conduct research on the remains of a mysterious life-form found at the foot of a volcano. Given the label of "Devil," it turned out that this creature is none other than Kazuya Mishima. There is nothing that piques my curiosity more than a mystery—particularly that of a heretofore unknown organism. So, I have been practically living at the lab, not seeing my family for months at a time.
However, the moment I did, I immediately came back to myself. Would my family be proud of me if they knew the kind of work I was really doing? Is what I am doing now so different from the repulsive human experimentation I was doing for the Mishima Zaibatsu? Belated as this realization is, I am starting to fully understand just how dangerous this devil power is...
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_020:
I have begun work in secret on devising a means of counteracting the Devil Gene. By searching for the power's source, I believe I may be able to find a way to mitigate the damage it causes. In pursuit of my research, I founded the Institute for the Study of Prehistoric Civilizations and have begun investigations of ancient ruins.
After countless disappointments, I have found a written account carved into a stone that when translated reads, "The avaricious of humankind were transformed by their greed into wicked demons who reigned over their fellow man."
I have long suspected that the devil power is connected in some manner to human desire and hunger. During a regularly scheduled examination, I asked Kazuya to speak about what he desired. When he did, his cells suddenly started dancing, their activity spiking as it had never done before. Before I could develop more tests, Kazuya's body returned to its former condition. Nowadays, his voice is carrying more and more weight within G Corp.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_021:
His desires know no end. If I turn a blind eye and step away now, things will quickly reach a point of no return... At a top-secret research facility in Nepal, I have been rushing to conduct highly secretive research on how to weaken the Devil Gene. Before I could complete my research, however, the facility was suddenly attacked by the Mishima Zaibatsu, the research data taken, and the building itself turned to rubble.
Apparently, the Nebraska facility where Kazuya is being kept was also attacked, but he was able to take out the attackers singlehandedly. Due to this, the majority of the higher-ups in G Corp are saying that Kazuya is a problem that needs to be "dealt with." With the fourth The King of Iron Fist Tournament on the horizon, it seems they plan to use that as their chance to rid themselves of him.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_022:
Recently, a swarm of Jack-4s descended upon the Mishimas' main estate. These units that were intended for deployment on the front lines in real battle caused a massive explosion, all according to plan. However, Kazuya managed to escape thanks to his devil transformation, and he is now exacting revenge on G Corp's executives. I fear that I, too, will be caught and killed in some sort of "unfortunate accident." All I can do now is to entrust you with what little research on the Devil Gene has survived. I have no doubt that you, with your adventurous spirits, have reached this research facility and are reading these journal entries.
And to my dearest Leo: I am sorry I let my research take priority over you. I am thankful that you have become so much like your father—loyal, true, and full of spirit.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_023: After receiving a message with instructions to infiltrate G Corp's Institute for the Study of Prehistoric Civilizations, Leo set off in search of the truth.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_024:
The Kazama Clan has resided in Yakushima for over a thousand years. Descending from the same ancestral roots as Zafina who sealed Azazel away, members of the Kazama clan possess remarkable spiritual abilities, and the sacred power that flows through their veins served them well during their time as exorcists in the Imperial Court. For generations, they have enshrined a place of great spiritual energy in the recesses of Yakushima's mountains, dubbing it the "Kazama Sanctum."
However, as the world has rapidly changed and abandoned practices from the old world, so too has the Kazama family lost its traditions. When the main Kazama household was destroyed in Ogre's attack, Jun was left as the only member who knew of the Sanctum's existence. Other Kazamas have spread elsewhere, such as Asuka Kazama and her father—distant relatives of Jin—who operate a dojo that teaches Kazama-Style Traditional Martial Arts in Osaka.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_025: Having awakened in Kazama Sanctum, Jun sensed that Jin is in grave danger. To save her son, Jun borrowed power from the sanctum and sent out a small, white bird made of light to enter Jin's mind.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_026:
Once known for its use in exterminating demons, the formerly sword-based Mishima-Style steadily grew more and more power-hungry as its users lusted for control. However, there remained a faction that wished to continue honing the Mishima-Style purely as a martial art. In order to preserve a true form of the style for future generations, the dissidents formed a Buddhist faction, adopting the name "The Tekken Monks," and have spent generations practicing the Mishima-Style in secret.
Centuries passed, and the monks watched as Heihachi defeated his father and renowned fighter Jinpachi before forming the Mishima Zaibatsu and spiraling down a path of darkness. The monks stood by their belief that the Mishima-Style is a true and pure form of martial arts, and its power should be used for just means. They deemed that not only Heihachi, but Kazuya and Jin as well were unfit as successors to the true Mishima-Style, given the evil power they held. So instead, they implemented a new plan—a final resort in which they would use a forbidden incantation to seal away Heihachi's wicked memories and reshape him into a martial artist who was pure of heart.
TEXT_008_UI_DLC_STORY_TIPS_027:
It is rumored that at the beginning of the Edo period, there existed a great warrior who stood above all others—a master who had learned the Mishima-Style ultimate technique and awakened the Warrior's Instinct, surpassing even the most famous dual-wielding swordsman of legend. However, details about the alleged technique have been long since lost to time, and the identity of the warrior remains cloaked in mystery.
The sole hope for the secret technique's revival lay in the legend told by the Tekken Monks—the Star Crusher Trial. According to the tale, the secret technique can be acquired by pulverizing one of the meteorites that fall in the exact same location once every 200 years. However, only those trained in the Mishima-Style who had gained mastery over mind, body, and technique and were free of any wicked thoughts could learn the technique. Having learned of the fabled spot's exact location, the Tekken Monks decided to make it a training ground as they prepared for their next chance.
TEXT_008_UI_UNLOCK_REWARD_DETAIL_SECRET_: Finish Unforgotten Echoes with the specified conditions.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_GRL_010: Hmph. Is that all you got?
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_010: But I still haven't gotten revenge or atoned for my sins...!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_CML_010: (Eddy, you cried out in your sleep. Is all well?)
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S29_010: The rebel army's flying boat is inbound!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_CML_020: (Are you prepared to show them your might, Eddy?)
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_041: I am. I can't disappoint Lidia—I owe her my life.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_050: No matter what hardships people face, they can always rise again...huh?
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_LZD_010: I heard your army's bringing in any Tekken Force soldiers with a conscience to stop G Corp.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_060: You heard right. Everyone's ready to atone for their past sins.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_LZD_020: In that case, you might make a good ally. Show me just how ready you are, then.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_LZD_030: You've just finished negotiations and you're right on to the next mission. You don't waste time.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_090: We still need a lot more allies if we're going to win.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_LZD_040: Before you get going, there's someone you should meet.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_LZD_051: He's the key to Operation Lightning and the ace up our sleeves...
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_100: The last time we spoke was the day you told me of my master's death.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_ANT_030: I made you do Tekken Force's dirty work, and yet, I still couldn't save him.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_ANT_060: Regardless, let me apologize... I'm sorry.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_160: No matter what hardships people face, they can always rise again.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_170: Those are the words of the person who changed my life.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_191: Let's fight for the future, as friends.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_220: Efforts to establish cooperation with the rebel army have been successful.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_CBR_020: Proceed to the Mishima Zaibatsu base in South America for negotiations with the Tekken Force there.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_260: Not even a thanks, Lidia? You sure know how to run your men ragged.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_CBR_031: That's how you treat someone who saved you?
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_CBR_040: No, wait. We're receiving a warning signal!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_CBR_050: The Mishima Zaibatsu base in South America is under attack by G Corp!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_290: Damn... I'll head over there right now!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S31_011: Remnant dogs of the Mishima Zaibatsu.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S32_010: Captain Eddy?! I thought you left the Tekken Force…
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_300: That story's for another time. Evacuate, and leave the rest to me!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_311: Nina. You're with G Corp now?
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_312: No rest for the wicked, huh?
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_372: Thought you didn't believe in doing more than what you've been paid for?
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_KAL_060: Look, I got the data I needed. No need to take this further.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_400: The crimes we've committed will never fade.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_410: No matter what hardships people face, they can always rise again.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_421: I ask that you all follow me on this journey
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_422: to reach out to those in need.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_KAL_080: Oh, Eddy, I forgot I had a special present for you!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_440: Damn it... Not on my watch!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S33_011: No...! It can't be... The captain can't be...!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_452: I won't go down... till the world is at peace!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_460: I was able to ally myself with the South American Tekken Force.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_470: But there's one thing that caught my eye in their database…
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_DOG_490: A group known as the Tekken Monks have been taking out remnants of the Mishima Zaibatsu...
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_050: (An unjust power is grinding all I hold most dear into the dirt.)
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S39_010: Polish Prime Minister Lidia Sobieska, who was first to call for sanctions on G Corp,
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S39_020: led UN forces into New York and freed the city from chaos,
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S39_030: earning her the moniker "The Warrior Prime Minster" and gratitude from people worldwide.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_DC_S39_040: World leaders have praised her courage and ability and stated that…
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S38_010: Lidia, my girl, you must not let your father's death be in vain.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S38_020: The pain you felt in your left eye is the pain of your people. You mustn't bend your knee to unjust power.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_060: And still, we were unable to prevent Kazuya Mishima's rampage...
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_DOG_010: Lidia... On that fateful day when I was ready to die, your words saved me.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_070: No matter what hardships people face, they can always rise again.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_DOG_020: That goes for our Tekken Force comrades, too. That's why we have to keep pushing forward.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_080: Thank you, Eddy. All of you.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S29_001: We're reaching the rendezvous point with the target.
TEXT_008_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S00_035: Time remaining until Asian B Block Preliminaries
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_020: Seems you put that G Corp leak to good use.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_090: Yes. Thanks to your information, we were able to save New York without major casualties.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_100: Now, would you tell me who you are and what it is you want?
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_030: I assume you've read the letter from Heihachi Mishima?
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_110: How do you...? No one else is supposed to know about that.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_050: Looks like we've got guests. Good timing.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_020: You are the warrior we Tekken Monks have been seeking!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_030: But first, we must ensure that you are worthy!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_050: You have great potential in all three disciplines of mind, body, and technique!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_080: The Tekken Monks are a secret organization that even the Mishima Zaibatsu doesn't have records on.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_090: All that's known about them is that they see the Mishimas as a threat,
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_100: and they've had the nerve to disrupt every attempt to look for Heihachi Mishima.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_180: But that monk also said they were in search of a "peerless warrior."
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_190: Do you mean for me to make contact with them and uncover their identity?
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_110: I thought you would be capable of such a task. Think of it as the fee for my intel.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_120: Good luck out there, Prime Minister.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_ZBR_130: And I'll keep sending you more info on G Corp forces!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S37_010: Ms. Sobieska, we have been waiting for you. Please, this way.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_080: I trust you have come prepared, Lidia Sobieska!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_200: (Grandfather... I will show the world how to use power justly.)
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_210: I accept any and all challenges. Osu!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_090: I am Tekken High Priest Seiryu.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_100: Allow me to test your body and technique!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S35_120: Now, I shall conduct a test of your Iron fist!
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_010: There are few who could subdue Seiryu in combat.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_020: However, how does your mind fair, I wonder...
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_030: I, Tekken High Priest Suzaku, shall test your mettle.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_040: I sense you seek answers for how to use your power.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_050: Yet, those who yield to unjust power cannot hope to prove their own righteousness.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_CBR_230: On my father's name, on my country, and on my honor, I swear I shall not give in to the unjust.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_060: That was most impressive, Ms. Sobieska.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_070: You are a model of perfect equilibrium between the three disciplines: mind, body, and technique.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_080: I believe you have what it takes.
TEXT_002_VO_YELLOWBOOK_CC_S36_090: There is someone I would like you to meet.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_SYS_020:
The Mishima-Style, a fighing style used to exterminate demons, was the source of conflict between two clans
that were fighting each other to become the legitimate successor.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_SYS_021: After facing defeat, one clan devoted itself to the Buddhist teachings and withdrew from the world.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_SYS_025: That clan was known as the Tekken Monks!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_SYS_030: As decades turned into centuries, they continued their pursuit of martial arts in seclusion.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_SYS_040: The Tekken Monks have but one vow...
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_SYS_050: To master the ultimate technique lost to time and restore the Mishima-style to its former purity.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_010: It has been half a year now since you saved my life.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_020: Yet, only two days remain until the Star Crusher Trial. I fear I am running out of time.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_030: Do I truly have what it takes to acquire the Mishima-style's ultimate technique?
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_030: To attain such power, your mind, body, and technique must be in perfect balance. First, you must know yourself.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_040: Allow me to test what you have learned in these six months!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_050: You sure have the potential to lead the Tekken Monks...!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_060: What a pleasant surprise, Ms. Sobieska.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_CBR_020: Looks like his training for the trial is going well.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_060: It is. Brother Heihachi has honed his body and technique exquisitely.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_070: Yet the mind is wavering—causing an imbalance in "mind", "body", and "technique."
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_080: The Heihachi Mishima of the past is no longer.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_010: After losing his memories, Heihachi has spent his days perfecting the Mishima-style with a pure heart.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_CBR_030: Could that have some connection to his memory loss?
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_100: All for the sake of our desperate vow...
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S00_020: - One Day before the Star Crusher Trial -
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S00_021: Time remaining until the Star Crusher Trial
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_110: Our vow is to acquire the long-lost ultimate technique.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_120: Only Mishima-style warriors who are pure of heart may undergo this trial.
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_DOG_010: The old Heihachi was pure evil. His current amnesia's something of a blessing.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_020: That is why you must achieve balance in your mind for tomorrow's task.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_030: But time is not on our side, so we must resort to a forbidden technique.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_040: (I fear what effect it may have on his memories, but we have no other choice!)
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_050: Face the darkness within! Expel it!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_060: You have attained a mind worthy of a true warrior.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_070: Acquire the ultimate technique, and restore the Mishima-style to its former purity!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_070: Ms. Sobieska, let me thank you for aiding me in tomorrow's training.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S00_030: - Day of the Star Crusher Trial -
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_DOG_020: He'll need control over his mind, body, and technique to overcome this final training.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_130: Very good. Mirror Ms. Sobieska, and you shall overcome this.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_CBR_045: Now, let's see what you can do!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S35_140: In the Star Crusher Trial, you must smash a meteorite that falls only once every 200 years.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_080: The time of my trial has finally come.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_CBR_050: Before that, may I ask one favor of you?
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_CBR_060: Once the trial is over, would you join us in our fight against Kazuya Mishima?
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_080: Kazuya Mishima corrupts the Mishima-style and prevents its return to its former purity.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_S36_090: If he acquires the ultimate technique, we shall have a means to fight against the power you call the "devil gene."
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_091: (What was... No, pay it no mind.)
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_100: Y-Yes! I will put that Kazuya Mishima back on the straight and narrow!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_110: Now, let us head to the Star Crusher Trial!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_180: I should thank you for providing me with a new technique to play with!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_CBR_080: A disaster like this... It can only be...!
TEXT_001_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_DOG_040: That damn Heihachi... So, he's back to his old self again!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_190: Your petty efforts to seal away my memories were in vain!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_200: I'll show you cretins exactly what it means to possess true power!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_210: You were nice guinea pigs for my new technique!
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_220: As promised, I'll put Kazuya back in his place.
TEXT_003_VO_YELLOWBOOK_BC_BEE_230: Then, once their blood awakens, everything will fall into place.

TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_02_000: I'm back from the depths of hell and stronger than ever!
TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_00_vr00_000: I am the one left standing. Me!
TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_02_vr00_000: Reina, you must awaken the devil blood within you.
TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_00_vr01_000: In this world, power is the ultimate justice!
TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_02_vr01_000: You did well. Now die and leave the rest to me!
TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_02_vr02_000: Never stood a chance against the invincible King of Iron Fist!
TEXT_VO_008_bee_win_00_vr03_000: You're the best sparring partner a man could have, Kuma!
TEXT_VO_008_grl_win_00_vr03_000: I'll kill you for good this time.
TEXT_VO_008_zbr_win_00_vr00_000: That was so much fun! Let's spar again soon, Father!
TEXT_VO_008_cbr_win_00_vr03_000: The Mishima Zaibatsu must never find its way back to power.
TEXT_VO_008_ant_win_00_vr02_000: I will put an end to the Mishima clan's curse!
TEXT_VO_008_rbt_win_00_vr06_000: (Training just isn't the same without you, Old Man Heihachi!)
TEXT_VO_008_lzd_win_02_vr01_000: Your reign of terror is over. Give up already!
TEXT_VO_008_bbn_win_00_vr00_000: I will see you in hell.
TEXT_VO_008_fate_bee_beevszbr_00_000: Training starts now. My plan depends on you awakening your devil blood.
TEXT_VO_008_fate_zbr_beevszbr_10_000: Yes, Father. I know what I must do!
TEXT_VO_008_fate_bee_cbrvsbee_10_000: Your ideals of justice mean nothing!
TEXT_VO_008_fate_bee_beevscbr_10_000: Your ideals of justice mean nothing!
TEXT_VO_008_fate_bee_grlvsbee_10_000: You thought some measly lava could kill me!
TEXT_VO_008_BEE_Ragearts_Atk_001: I'll grind you to dust and scatter you to the wind!
TEXT_VO_008_BEE_Ragearts_Fin_001: You're not as tough as you talk.
TEXT_VO_008_BEE_Ragearts_Atk_002: Your delusions of grandeur finally end here!
TEXT_VO_008_BEE_Ragearts_Fin_002: The devil's power is no match for me!
TEXT_VO_008_BEE_Ragearts_Atk_003: You'll rue the day you crossed me!
TEXT_VO_008_BEE_Ragearts_Fin_003: I've no need for you anymore.
TEXT_VO_008_LZD_RageArts_YELLOW_024: Go back to hell and stay there!
TEXT_VO_008_SWL_RageArts_YELLOW_006: Heihachi Mishima! You die here and now!
TEXT_VO_008_AML_RageArts_Line_019: I shall do whatever it takes to protect Jin!

TEXT_008_UI_ONLINE_PRACTICE_022:
In Online Practice, you can practice with other players in the lounge.
Online Practice can be accessed via the machines in the Tekken Dojo.

The machines are set up as pairs, so sit next to the person you wish to match with.
TEXT_008_UI_ONLINE_PRACTICE_023:
In Online Practice, one player will take the role of Leader {cmd_flag} and the other as Partner.
Only the Leader {cmd_flag} will be able to adjust the settings for the practice itself.
The Partner can change some settings such as display settings.
A red flag icon will appear next to the name of whomever is appointed Leader.
TEXT_008_UI_ONLINE_PRACTICE_024:
Some practice settings cannot be changed.
The Leader will select the stage.
Changing any display settings will only affect your screen.
Restart Position settings are shared by both players.
Status Record settings are shared by both players.

Replay and Ghost data will not be created in this mode.
The session will automatically end if either player quits.
TEXT_008_UI_ONLINE_PRACTICE_028:
In the Tekken Dojo, you can play in Online Practice Mode.
In this mode, you can practice inputs and combos without the pressure of
a match weighing you down. It's the perfect place to challenge yourself to play
characters you aren't familiar with yet.
TEXT_008_UI_ONLINE_PRACTICE_030:
On the Online Practice machines, you can practice with another player.
Sit down with a friend on neighboring machines to train together.
Recommended for strategizing or research that's hard to pull off by yourself.
Though the machines may differ in appearance, their functionality is the same.
TEXT_008_UI_ONLINE_PRACTICE_031:
On the Training machines, you can practice by yourself.
Practice moves while looking at the Move List, or take on combo challenges.
You can also set the CPU to remember a string of commands to repeatedly perform for you to train against.
Though the machines may differ in appearance, their functionality is the same.

TEXT_008_UI_PRACTICE_780: Player's Heat will not activate even if you fulfill the usual conditions.
TEXT_008_UI_PRACTICE_781: Opponent's Heat will not activate even if they fulfill the usual conditions.
TEXT_008_UI_PRACTICE_782: Restart allows you to practice from a set position, direction, or status.For example, if you want to practice wall combos, you can set Restart Position to Wall for more efficient practice sessions.You can also Restart using {gui_view}+{gui_right} to begin on the right wall, or {gui_view}+{gui_left} to begin on the left wall.
TEXT_008_UI_PRACTICE_783:
You can restart with your back against a wall by setting the Restart Position to
Wall, enabling Switch Positions, then setting Camera Position to Opposite Side.
You can Restart using {gui_view}+{gui_left} when playing on the left, or {gui_view}+{gui_right} when playing on the right.
TEXT_008_UI_PRACTICE_784:
You can use Status Record to restart from a particular moment in time.
You can Remember a situation you want to start from with {gui_rsb}, and then Reproduce
it with {gui_lsb}, restarting you in that situation.
When {gui_lsb} or {gui_rsb} is mapped in Controller Settings, the controls will be {gui_view}+{gui_rt}, {gui_view}+{gui_lt}.
TEXT_008_UI_PRACTICE_784_XB:
You can use Status Record to restart from a particular moment in time.
You can Remember a situation you want to start from with {gui_rsb}, and then Reproduce
it with {gui_lsb}, restarting you in that situation.
When {gui_lsb} or {gui_rsb} is mapped in Controller Settings, the controls will be {gui_view}+{gui_rt}, {gui_view}+{gui_lt}.

TEXT_VO_010_okm_sta_00_000: On this, my sword, I swear. To shield the firebird's flame forevermore.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_sta_01_000: I'm here to even the odds. Any objections?
TEXT_VO_010_okm_sta_00_vr00_000: And so I must face myself again.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_sta_02_vr01_000: Half man, half coeurl...and all trouble.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_sta_02_vr02_000: Hunt or be hunted, eh Torgal?
TEXT_VO_010_swl_sta_00_vr01_000: Let yourself be consumed by the madness...!
TEXT_VO_010_zbr_sta_02_vr03_000: Well, well... Now, that's a high-quality cosplay. I like it.
TEXT_VO_010_pgn_sta_02_vr04_000: (Warrior from a land afar, I challenge you!)
TEXT_VO_010_rbt_sta_02_vr03_000: (A new threat to the Mishima Zaibatsu?!)
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_00_000: Well done, Torgal. You're a fine hound.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_01_000: Wait for me Joshua... Jill... I'll find my way home.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_02_000: These flames... They shall ever guide me.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_02_vr00_000: We'll save ourselves. And we'll do it on our own terms.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_01_vr00_000: I may have underestimated this place. I won't do so again.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_01_vr01_000: Perhaps Harpocrates will know more about this "cosplay".
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_02_vr01_000: There is only one Clive Rosfield, and it is *me*.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_01_vr02_000: Mask or no, he had the bite of a coeurl.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_00_vr00_000: Something was controlling that beast, Torgal. We mustn't let it control us.
TEXT_VO_010_okm_win_00_vr01_000: If that wasn't an echo, boy...what was it?
TEXT_VO_010_zbr_win_01_vr02_000: You got into character perfectly. Keep working on it so you don't lose your edge.
TEXT_VO_010_pgn_win_01_vr01_000: (No one is a match for the undisputed champion!)
TEXT_VO_010_rbt_win_00_vr07_000: (Do you want to join the Tekken Force?)
TEXT_VO_010_OKM_Ragearts_Fin_001: Denying the inevitable...as we always have and always will.
TEXT_VO_010_OKM_Ragearts_Pre_002: The only fantasy here is yours!
TEXT_VO_010_OKM_Ragearts_Atk_002: And we shall be its final witness!

TEXT_012_UI_BP_DIALOG_LARGE_TEXT_001:
– Premium Pass and Premium Pass Plus upgrades can only be used for the round in which they were purchased.
– The rewards that can be earned through the Premium Pass and Premium Pass Plus are the same.
– Once your Fight Pass reaches Lv. {v0}, you cannot purchase the Premium Pass Plus.
– Once you have purchased the Premium Pass, you cannot purchase the Premium Pass Plus.
– The duration of the Fight Pass and the sales period for the Premium Pass and Premium Pass Plus are subject to change without notice.
– Due to the nature of this product, refunds or cancellations cannot be provided.
TEXT_012_UI_BP_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001:
Congratulations on reaching Lv.{v0} on the Tekken Fight Pass!

However, this is hardly the end of your Fight Pass journey. By leveling past Lv.{v0}, you can now earn additional rewards from bonus levels.

Please note that you will not be able to purchase Fight Pass levels once you reach the bonus levels.

TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_002:
No Ghosts available to fight.
Ghosts can be made in Arcade Quest or by fighting in online matches.
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_003: This player does not have a Ghost available to fight.
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_012:
Your Ghost will go all out on offense!
You don't win rounds by holding back!
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_014:
Have your Ghost fight aggressively most of the time.
Victories come from chances taken!
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_016:
Let your Ghost decide how it wants to fight.
Trust in your other self's fighting spirit!
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_018:
Your Ghost will play defensively and sometimes focus on spacing.
A strong offense alone does not pave the path to victory.
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_020:
Your Ghost will play very defensively and focus on spacing.
Watch opponents' futile attempts to break your turtle shell!
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_001:
In Ghost vs Ghost, you can pit your Ghost (a copy of yourself) against another Ghost.
Train up your Ghost and watch them grow stronger!
You won't be able to control your Ghost directly, but you can choose which fighting strategy they adopt.
(Note: Your Ghost will not use any data from this mode to learn).
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_002: To have your Ghost fight someone else's, simply speak to another player's avatar in the Tekken Fight Lounge and select "Ghost vs Ghost."
TEXT_013_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_003:
You can choose a strategy when selecting a Ghost.
The same Ghost will fight differently based off the strategy you choose, so try out a variety of tactics and see what happens!

(Your chosen strategy will be visible on the battle screen.)
TEXT_013_UI_HELPDIALOG_TITLE_01_001: Ghost vs Ghost has been added!
TEXT_013_UI_HELPDIALOG_01_001:
The Ghost vs Ghost feature has been added.
In this mode, you can pit your Ghost (a copy of yourself) against another player's Ghost. Train up your second self and test their mettle against other trainers' Ghosts!

Check the Help section in the Lounge Menu for details.
TEXT_013_UI_HELPDIALOG_TITLE_02_001: Ghost vs Ghost has been added!
TEXT_013_UI_HELPDIALOG_02_001:
The Ghost vs Ghost feature has been added.
Train up your Ghosts and watch them grow stronger!
You won't be able to control your Ghost directly, but you can choose which fighting strategy they adopt.
Train up your second self and test their mettle against other trainers' Ghosts!
TEXT_013_UI_CHARACTERCUSTOMIZE_HELP_TEXT:
You can save a character customization to a customization slot. 
There are two types of slots: Character-Specific Slots and Shared Slots.
Each character has their own Character-Specific Slots where only their customizations can be saved.

Shared Slots can be used to save customizations for any character you like.
By using Shared Slots, you can create more customizations even after you've used all the Character-Specific Slots.
From the sub-menu ({gui_detail}), you can copy, swap, and erase slots.
If you add a slot to your Favorites ({gui_use}), then that slot will be shown first when selecting a customization.

Press {gui_use} on the character select screen to use that customization.
Press {gui_up}{gui_down} to switch between Presets, Character-Specific Slots, and Shared Slots.

TEXT_200_UI_TEKKENBALL_INFO_019: No need to worry about handball penalties in TEKKEN BALL! Strike back with an iron fist!

TEXT_UI_200_PL_ShogoPlate_0005: Anna Plate ()
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_00_00_000: Come over here. Let me talk to ya real close.
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_01a_00_000: I'm only interested in my "inferior half."
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_02_00_000: Lovely Tom's craving for a good time.
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_00_vr00_00_000: Well, hello, you silver fox. Looking for a good time?
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_02_vr00_00_000: I'll make you regret choosing Nina as my replacement.
TEXT_200_grl_sta_02_vr05_00_000: Any who resist me will suffer for their transgressions.
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_02_vr04_00_000: Too bad for Jane, but I'm gonna have to dismantle you part by part.
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_02_vr01_00_000: ...You know, something about you just rubs me the wrong way.
TEXT_200_kgr_sta_00_vr02_00_000: I hear you're quite the gourmet. How about a pre-meal workout?
TEXT_200_cbr_sta_01_vr05_00_000: I've been looking forward to this. Let's go!
TEXT_200_kgr_win_00_00_000: That was fun. Let's play again sometime.
TEXT_200_kgr_win_01_00_000: Oh, I even amaze myself sometimes.
TEXT_200_kgr_win_02_vr00_00_000: You're done now, you dirty rat.
TEXT_200_kal_win_01_vr01_00_000: Let's play again sometime, little kitty.
TEXT_200_kgr_win_01_vr00_00_000: Maybe next time I'll whip you up a little something.
TEXT_200_lon_win_00_vr04_00_000: How would you like some tea after this?
TEXT_200_lon_win_01_vr03_00_000: How would you like some tea after this?
TEXT_200_kgr_win_02_vr01_00_000: Do you finally see that you picked the wrong sister?
TEXT_200_kgr_win_01_vr01_00_000: You've come a long way with these JACKs, Jane, but they still need work.
TEXT_200_kgr_win_00_vr02_00_000: I’d love for you to taste my cooking sometime.
TEXT_200_cbr_win_01_vr03_00_000: I'll take you to one of my favorite restaurants as thanks for the training.
TEXT_200_fate_kgr_kgrvskal_00_00_000: I'm going to make you pay!
TEXT_200_fate_kgr_kgrvskal_10_00_000: Feeling's mutual. I love that we're so close, little sis.
TEXT_200_VO_KGR_RageArt_Pre_001: Well, time for a little fun.
TEXT_200_VO_KGR_RageArt_Pre_002: It's your turn to shine, baby.
TEXT_200_VO_KGR_RageArt_Atk_002: You thought you could escape me?
TEXT_200_VO_KGR_RageArt_Pre_003: I'm sick of that face of yours!
TEXT_200_VO_KGR_RageArt_Atk_003: Hmph, serves you right! ...Time to say goodbye!

Go to the Store?
TEXT_200_UI_DAN_RANK_001: This is the first time you've been promoted to {v0}, so your other characters whose online rankings were below {v1} have been promoted to {v1}.
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001:
In celebration of the kickoff of Season 2, every single TEKKEN character has received brand-new moves! What's more, existing moves have also seen significant changes to their performance!
Master new techniques and make your rivals regret the day they challenged you!
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_002:
The battle system is now new and improved!
Get a better grasp on your situation in the heat of battle with a fresh, new feature: In-Battle Status!
Experience even more explosive action!
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_003:
The background music "Unstoppable Urge / TEKKEN 8" for the Character Selection screen has been added.
Note: If you are using "My Playlist 1" to "My Playlist 3" on the Jukebox, you will need to reset the Character Selection music first to hear it.
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_004:
Practice makes perfect, so to make your practice more perfect, we've added these new features!
A huge practice stage as well as tools to support your training are now available at your fingertips!
Jump into Practice Mode and polish your prowess!
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_005:
New ranks beyond God of Destruction have been unleashed!
Do you have what it takes to battle head-to-head against the strongest fighters out there?
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_006:
Matching has been changed so that players can battle others with a closer skill level.

- Added "Same Rank Only" and "±1 or lower" conditions in the Rank Restriction Filter.
*Tekken Prowess will now be excluded from matching conditions.
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_007:
V-sync settings are now available.
Go to Options > Graphics Settings to adjust your settings.
*Turning off V-sync will improve responsiveness but may result in screen tearing.
TEXT_200_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_008:
Introducing new moves and balancing updates for all characters, additional Practice Mode features, and improvements to Ranked Matches.
Enjoy the new-and-improved fights awaiting you in Season 2 of TEKKEN 8!
TEXT_200_UI_RANKMATCH_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_00:
While playing in Ranked Match, you can either gain or lose Rank Points depending on the match's result.
Lose too many Rank Points, and you will be demoted. Win enough Rank Points, however, and you will earn a promotion.
Ranks are assigned to characters individually.

The number of Rank Points at stake depends on the difference in rank between you and your opponent.
The ranks beyond "God of Destruction" are only for the most dedicated fighters out there.

In some cases, you can even earn bonus Rank Points.

- On your first promotion to a new rank.
- After a certain number of consecutive wins. (Note: The consecutive win bonus does not apply to the rank "Mighty Ruler" or higher.)
When your highest-ranked character reaches certain ranks for the first time, all your other characters will also rise to a predetermined rank.
TEXT_200_UI_MATCHING_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001:
In Ranked Match and Quick Match, matching will be based off rank and network connection quality.
Once matching begins, you will be matched with players that share a similar rank and region as you; however, if an opponent is not found, the search conditions will broaden.
TEXT_200_UI_MATCHING_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_002:
- Rank Restrictions
Choose the rank range for matching.

- Connection Quality
Filter opponents based on network environment.

- Platform Restrictions
Set whether or not to allow cross-platform play.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_898: A Heat Engager is a technique that will activate Heat only if it hits your opponent. - Successful Heat activation will then move you in close to the opponent. You will also regain some of your recoverable health. - After moving in closer, you will have a significant advantage in when you can move again compared to your opponent. - By using or or before running at your opponent, you can slowly draw nearer and move into a crouch.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_899: Heat Dash is an action that can be used in combos and offensive sequences. - Activate it by inputting (or {gui_bank0_heat}) until your Heat Engager connects with your opponent. - Heat Dash will not activate against a downed opponent. - Using Heat Dash will consume all of your Heat Timer. - You will also regain some of your recoverable health. - Using Heat Dash will change some interactions with your opponent upon hit or being blocked. - When blocked, you will be able to move before your opponent. - When blocked, you will deal additional chip damage.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_901:
Landing a Heat Engager and performing a Heat Dash will cause the following changes to occur.

- Interactions with your opponent will change, and you will be able to use follow-up attacks that normally cannot be performed.
- Combos that use Heat Dash will not knock your opponent as far back as they normally do.
  However, damage scaling will be increased.
  All damage incurred will remain as recoverable health.
- If both a Heat Burst and Heat Dash are incorporated into the same combo, then the combo will be treated as a follow-up against a downed opponent.
  Any air combos used after will become more difficult to continue.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_902:
Heat provides the following properties allowing for a more aggressive playstyle.

- All attacks will deal chip damage on block.
- The amount of recoverable health regained upon hitting with or having an attack blocked will increase.
- When attacked by an opponent, it becomes easier to retain recoverable health.
- When attacked while airborne or downed, the amount of recoverable health that you receive will increase.
  When attacked while standing on the ground, you will also be able to recover health.
- Each character also receives other enhancements to specific techniques and actions.

See the character Move Lists for more details.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_903:
Recoverable health appears as part of the Health Gauge when damage is inflicted under certain conditions.
Responding with certain actions will allow this type of health to be restored.

- Some damage taken while airborne or downed will remain as recoverable health.
  (Any damage taken during Heat will remain as recoverable health.)
- When standing on the ground, being hit by the opponent's attacks will reduce some of your recoverable health.
  (During Heat, your recoverable health will not decrease, and some of the damage taken will remain as recoverable health.)
- Recoverable health can be restored by landing your own attacks or by having them blocked.
The amount of recoverable health gained with each hit increases in relation to attack damage, however there is a limit.
  You cannot recover any health if your attack misses your opponent.
  During Heat, the amount of recoverable health gained with each hit and recoverable health limit increases, making it easier to restore health.
- Certain other attacks will generate recoverable health when they hit or are blocked.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_905:
Depending on how an attack hits the opponent, its damage can increase, among other added benefits.

- Hitting an opponent as they are performing an attack will result in a counter hit.
  Attacks landed as counter hits will deal increased damage.
  Depending on the move, you will be able to perform a follow-up combo that is not possible on regular hit, or have proceeding attacks in a string become a natural combo.
- Hitting an opponent after they have performed an unsafe move will result in a punish hit.
  This requires the opponent to perform a move that leaves them vulnerable after being blocked, or for you to land a hit when they whiff (miss) a move.
- Certain moves have a clean hit property when they hit at close range.
  This can increase the move's damage or allow you to perform a follow-up combo.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_906:
Throws are powerful attacks that cannot be blocked.

- Standard throws will only connect with standing opponents.
- After a throw connects, you can input a certain command to escape it called a throw escape.
- The commands for throw escapes differ depending on the throw, and can be viewed from the Move List.
- Even after a successful throw break, the player escaping the throw will take some recoverable damage. The player who performed the throw will recover a small amount of recoverable health.
- If a throw connects during a Power Crush or attack reversal, then you cannot perform a throw escape.
- Performing a counter hit throw will reduce the time allowed to input the throw escape.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_907: Sidestep / Side Walk - Input or to move your character into the background or foreground. This type of movement is called a sidestep. - Perform an attack during a sidestep to unleash an attack unique to your character. - A well-timed sidestep will allow you to evade linear attacks. - Input and hold or and you will continue to move in that direction. This type of movement is called side walking. Homing Attacks - Attacks that cannot be evaded by sidestepping or side walking. - Some attacks will only have homing properties for one side.
TEXT_200_UI_PRACTICE_908:
Train up with the "Practice Stage"—a stage that stretches over a vast area.
To use the Practice Stage, set "Practice Stage" as the Restart Position and restart.
{gui_view}+{gui_up} can also be used to restart.

TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_004:
In Online Ghost Battle, 2 players can pit their Ghosts against each other's in real time.
Online Ghost Battle can be played on the machines in the Tekken Ghost Showdown area.
TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_005:
In the Tekken Ghost Showdown area, 2 players can pit their Ghosts against each other's in real time.
Talk to Max to access various functions regarding your Ghosts such as sparring with or deleting Ghosts.
TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_006:
Select your Ghost in Super Ghost Battle to spar with them and make them stronger.
Ghosts will learn from your movements and combos.
Super Ghost Battle will unlock after completing Arcade Quest: Chapter 1.
TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_007:
Spar with your own Ghost to make them stronger.
Ghosts will learn from your movements and combos.
The more you spar, the more they'll learn!
You can even create Ghosts of characters you haven't already just through sparring!
TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_008:
You can choose whether or not your Ghost saves the behavior that it has learned.
If you don't want your Ghost to learn anything from a particular session, simply turn Ghost AI learning off.
TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_009:
You can view replays by speaking to Max.
Replays are saved to the "My Replay & Tips" tab. Note that tips will not be shown during replays.
TEXT_201_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_010:
By talking to Max, you can also erase any Ghosts you have trained.
If you erase a Ghost, then it will forget all the training data it has learned and be restored to its default state. However, be careful, as Ghosts cannot be recovered once they have been erased.

TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_011:
During the battle, you can give 6 types of commands to your Ghosts in real time.
Press the corresponding button to make your Ghost move as instructed.
Command your Ghost by using 1 megaphone located at the bottom of the screen.
Observe your Ghost's movement and give them an instruction at the right time to grasp victory as a team!
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_011_XB:
During the battle, you can give 6 types of commands to your Ghosts in real time.
Press the corresponding button to make your Ghost move as instructed.
Command your Ghost by using 1 megaphone located at the bottom of the screen.
Observe your Ghost's movement and give them an instruction at the right time to grasp victory as a team!
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_012:
You can gain 1 bonus megaphone if certain conditions are fulfilled during the battle.
Increase the command count with the following conditions:
- K.O. an opponent ghost with Rage Arts
- At the beginning of the Final Round (given to both players)
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_013:
There are 4 types of commands that can be used throughout the course of battle.
- {gui_detail}: Go for an air combo!
- {gui_decide}: Hit them with lows!
- {gui_use}: Pressure them with throws!
- {gui_cancel}: Strike back with Power Crushes!
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_014:
The following commands are only available under certain conditions:
- {gui_rb}: (During Heat) Use Heat Smash!
- {gui_rt}: (During Rage) Use Rage Art!
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_015:
If your ghost has not learned a specific move, the command may be grayed out and not available to use.
If you cannot command your ghost to do an action, help them learn by undergoing Ghost Sparring and focus on particular moves like Power Crushes, throws, or whatever you want it to learn.
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_016:
By telling your Ghost, "Nice!" or, "Don't do that!" you can evaluate your Ghost's actions.
Ghosts will adjust their behavior based on your feedback.
Rating an action as "Nice!" will increase how often your Ghost performs that action, while "Don't do that!" will decrease it.
Note: Action feedback is only available when fighting another player's Ghost.
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_017:
If your Ghost stops mid-combo or stands still in the middle of a fight, it's possible that they do not have enough training data.
When that happens, try fighting in more online battles or training in Ghost Sparring against a variety of characters on different stages!
TEXT_202_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_018:
On the character selection screen for Ghost Sparring, you can see which characters have Ghosts created for them.
If you don't see a Ghost icon on the bottom right of a character, then that means you cannot use them in Ghost vs Ghost mode yet.

TEXT_203_tgr_sta_00_00_000: I will kill anyone to ensure my family's safety.
TEXT_203_grl_sta_02_vr06_00_000: Why do you follow the orders of those weaklings?
TEXT_203_tgr_sta_00_vr00_00_000: A dead man has no reason to know.
TEXT_203_tgr_sta_00_vr01_00_000: I have no intention to work for G Corp.
TEXT_203_kal_sta_02_vr02_00_000: Well then, allow me to make you an offer you can't refuse.
TEXT_203_tgr_sta_00_vr02_00_000: A new toy from G Corp? I'll turn you into scrap.
TEXT_203_tgr_sta_00_vr03_00_000: Look how desperately you cling to that puny weapon.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_00_00_000: It's your luck you should curse, not me.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_01b_00_000: I would walk the fires of hell.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_02_vr00a_00_000: You're nothing more than a mad dog without a leash.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_00_vr00_00_000: And so, the scales of conflict hang in balance.
TEXT_203_grl_win_02_vr04b_00_000: In this world where power controls everything.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_00_vr01_00_000: I will crush whatever is in my way.
TEXT_203_kal_win_01_vr03_00_000: I could guarantee your family's safety, you know.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_01_vr00_00_000: A soulless piece of junk could never crack my resolve.
TEXT_203_tgr_win_01_vr01_00_000: Without your weapon, you are nothing.
TEXT_203_VO_TGR_RageArt_Atk_001: May you also know lightning's wrath.
TEXT_203_VO_TGR_RageArt_Pre_002: You will taste my wrath now!
TEXT_203_VO_TGR_RageArt_Atk_002: I don't have another second to waste on you.

TEXT_203_COMMENT_BOARD_HELP_001:
The message board feature has been added.

You can post free-form text, set phrases, or stickers on the message board.

By setting a message, you will be able to display it at any time while you are in the Tekken Fight Lounge.

Use it however you like—whether it's to search for Group Match opponents or find new friends!
TEXT_203_COMMENT_BOARD_HELP_002:
Message board is a function in which you can pin a message above your avatar's head.
Use {gui_view}+{gui_use} to enter writing mode where you can write a sentence or use a set phrase or sticker.
Any posted message boards can be taken down with {gui_view}+{gui_use}.
Message boards can be free-form text, set phrases, or stickers.
TEXT_203_COMMENT_BOARD_HELP_003:
If a message board is set, an icon will appear above the avatar's head.

Approach an avatar with an icon above their head to see their message board.
TEXT_203_COMMENT_BOARD_HELP_004:
In the Players in the Lounge list, you can see message boards of players currently in the Tekken Fight Lounge.

If you find a message board you're interested in, select the player from the list and warp to them!
TEXT_203_COMMENT_BOARD_HELP_005:
- You will not see message boards of players you have blocked.
- The message board function is not available for those who have communication restrictions.
TEXT_203_COMMENT_BOARD_HELP_005_XB:
- You will not see message boards of players you have blocked.
- The message board function is not available for those who have communication restrictions.
TEXT_203_UI_ONLINEREPLAY_003:
View the automatically saved replays and tips of matches played online.

There is a limit to the number of replays that can be saved and replays not added to favorites will be deleted from the oldest one first in order to save new ones.

Replays will be saved for the following match types:

- Ranked Match / Quick Match

- Player Match / Group Match

- Arcade Quest / Super Ghost Battle

- VS Battle (excluding CPU vs CPU)

- Tekken Ball (tips unavailable)

- Ghost vs Ghost (tips unavailable)
TEXT_204_UI_PHOTO_002: Fill in the character's background with a color of your choice.
TEXT_204_UI_PRACTICE_880:
In this mode, you can select from one of four difficulties to practice throw escapes.

If you're a beginner who's still getting the hang of throw escapes, Easy will be a good fit for you.
Once you've got a handle on the controls, try challenging yourself to Medium.

Hard is best tackled by advanced players who have built up confidence in their throw escapes. In Hard, you will have to watch your opponent's movement carefully to determine the correct throw escape command.

For expert players who want to master TEKKEN 8 inside and out, Ultra Hard offers a chance to see how many throw escapes you can successfully perform in a row.
TEXT_204_UI_PRACTICE_881a:
Easy
- You will receive a command tip for the throw escape before your opponent attacks.
- Time slows down when it is time to perform a throw escape.
- Opponent will use the same technique until a throw escape is successfully performed.

Medium
- Throw escapes must be performed at the same speed as in a real battle.
- All other features are the same as Easy mode.
TEXT_204_UI_PRACTICE_881b:
Hard
- Opponent will perform throw techniques at random.
- Throw escape tips will be shown after a throw escape was possible.

Ultra Hard
- Opponent's attacks will be treated as counter hits. As a result, the window for which a throw escape is possible will be shortened.
- All other features are the same as Hard mode.
TEXT_204_UI_PRACTICE_910:
Throws are powerful attacks that cannot be blocked.

- Standard throws will only connect with standing opponents.
- After a throw connects, you can input a command to escape with a "throw escape."
- The commands for throw escapes differ depending on the throw and can be viewed from the Move List.
- Even after a successful throw break, the player who performed the throw will recover a small amount of recoverable health.
- If a throw connects during a Power Crush or attack reversal, you cannot perform a throw escape.
- Performing a counter hit throw will reduce the time allowed to input the throw escape.
TEXT_204_UI_PRACTICE_912: Ki Charge is a Special Move that increases the damage of the first hit while it is in effect. - Ki Charge can be activated using . - You cannot block while performing a Ki Charge, and any attacks that land will be treated as counter hits. - While in Practice mode, you can hold {gui_view} to activate Ki Charge for your opponent.
TEXT_204_UI_PRACTICE_886:
Two new features have been added to Practice Mode: Throw Escape Training, where you can hone your throw breaking skills, and a Ki Charge shortcut for your opponent.

Check the Help section in the Practice Menu for details.

TEXT_VO_206_knk_sta_00_vr01_000: (This man... I think my brother fought him in the past.)
TEXT_VO_206_knk_sta_01_vr00_000: (You're about the right size to practice on. Bring it!)
TEXT_VO_206_knk_sta_00_vr02_000: (I will pulverize that arrogance of yours until there's nothing left.)
TEXT_VO_206_knk_sta_01_vr01_000: (Hmph. I see that hungry determination in your eyes.)
TEXT_VO_206_zbr_sta_00_vr01_000: Weren't you supposed to be dead?
TEXT_VO_206_bsn_sta_00_vr03_000: I'll show you just how scary boxing can be.
TEXT_VO_206_knk_win_02_vr00_000: (I'll do whatever it takes, no matter how low I sink. That is the path of evil I walk.)
TEXT_VO_206_knk_win_00_vr00_000: (Each punch hit like a wrecking ball. You've got guts, if nothing else.)
TEXT_VO_206_knk_win_02_vr01_000: (Nothing more than an oversized punching bag. That was barely even a warm up.)
TEXT_VO_206_knk_win_00_vr01_000: (Turn tail and run like the weakling you are.)
TEXT_VO_206_zbr_win_02_vr05_001: Hmph. You're more interesting than I thought you'd be.
TEXT_VO_206_zbr_win_02_vr05_002: Maybe it's time to find out who's behind the mask?
TEXT_VO_206_tgr_win_02_vr01_002: You're a far cry from true evil.
TEXT_VO_206_pgn_win_01_vr01_000: (You must find a way to shatter this never-ending chain of grief.)
TEXT_VO_206_fate_knk_knkvspgn_00_000: (No one will stand in the way of my revenge!)
TEXT_VO_206_fate_pgn_knkvspgn_10_000: (I will put a stop to you, no matter what it takes!)

TEXT_UI_208_CharaPanel_wkz_FUJ: Miary Zo, illustration by Wolf Marker
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_00_000: Pointing at a chameleon'll bring ya bad luck!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_01_000: Sure, I could tell ya I have the power of a fighting god...
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_01_001: Or I could just show ya—with my fists!
TEXT_VO_208_kgr_sta_02_vr05_001: Do they know about the cryosleep?
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_01_vr01_000: I never thought I'd get to fight an animal that could do martial arts! I'm so lucky!
TEXT_VO_000_ttr_sta_01_vr04_000: (Okay. I'll show you how a panda fights.)
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_02_vr01_000: You've got some kinda strange power, don't ya? That much I can tell!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_02_vr02_000: I'm Miary Zo, a fighting god reborn!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_02_vr02_001: Hit me with everything you got!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_sta_00_vr00_000: You'll end up cursed if ya point at the chameleon like that!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_00_000: Hey! C'mon, Vanilla! Knock it off!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_00_001: My nana said that, in a battle, it's the loser that stands to gain the most.
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_00_002: So, in a way, you're the winner!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_01_000: That was so much fun. Let's fight again sometime!
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_02_001: Goin' blow for blow with all we've got—we're battle friends forever now.
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_01_vr00_000: It's like you've been in hibernation or something! So cool!
TEXT_VO_208_kgr_win_02_vr02_000: This is what happens when you know too much.
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_01_vr01_000: I could just watch the way animals move all day...
TEXT_VO_208_wkz_win_01_vr02_000: I dunno why, but something about your power feels familiar...
TEXT_VO_208_fate_wkz_wkzvscrw_10_000: Whoa! What? We have the same power?!
TEXT_VO_208_ttr_win_00_vr05_000: (I think you and Xiaoyu would get on so well.)
