TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001:
Balancing updates have been implemented, and online ranks have been reset.

The first new playable character of Season 3, Kunimitsu, is planned for release in late Spring 2026. Check your notifications for more details.
TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_002:
Battles have undergone rebalancing just in time for the kickoff of Season 3!
Adjustments have been made across the board to better highlight each character's abilities. Now, you can enjoy strategies that make even more use of characters' unique traits as well as richer tactical gameplay.
Whip up your own inventive strategies and crush your rivals in the new season!
TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_003:
The background music "Iron Pulse / TEKKEN 8" for the Character Selection screen has been added.
Note: If you are using "My Playlist 1" through "My Playlist 3" on the Jukebox, you will need to reset the Character Selection music first to hear it.
TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_004:
Player customizations can now be saved to slots and swapped out. Take full advantage of this feature by switching customizations based on the character you're using, or even your mood!

Additionally, the Health Gauge you have chosen will now be displayed during spectating and replays. Health Gauge display settings can be changed from Options.
TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TITLE_005: Shared Slots expanded to a total of 30 slots!
TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_005:
An additional 10 slots have been added to Shared Slots in Character Customization for a total of 30 usable Shared Slots.
Create all kinds of different looks for your characters!
TEXT_300_UI_FS_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_006:
A new shortcut ({gui_view}+{gui_down}) to switch positions with your opponent has been added to Practice Mode.
Check the Help section in the Practice Menu for details.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_004: Your default player customization has been updated.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_005: You cannot delete the slot that is being used for your default player customization.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_007: Choose which player customization to use for matches.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_008: Display Health Gauges of other players (Replay)
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_009: During replays, each player's chosen Health Gauge will be displayed.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_010: Display Health Gauges of other players (Spectating)
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_011: While spectating, each player's chosen Health Gauge will be displayed.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_HELP_TITLE_001: Slot Screen and Default Player Customization
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_HELP_TEXT_001: Your player customizations will be saved in slots. Whichever player customization you set as your default player customization will be the one displayed before and during battles.
TEXT_300_UI_CS01_HELP_TEXT_002:
Player customization slots can be selected by using {gui_detail} on the Character Selection screen. Changing the player customization slot to use will establish that slot as the default.
*This is not supported in VS Battle or Tekken Ball.
TEXT_300_UI_PLAYERCUSTOMIZE_TUTORIAL_000:
In Player Customization, you can customize the information and certain UI design elements displayed during and before battles. You can also restrict character movement following a K.O. in the battle.

Please note that some elements will take effect on your screen only and will not be visible to your opponent.
TEXT_300_UI_RANKRESET_001: All online ranks have been reset to mark the beginning of the new season.
TEXT_300_UI_RANKRESET_002: Check Play Data to see your other characters' online ranks.
TEXT_300_UI_RANKMATCH_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_00:
In Ranked Match, your online rank will change based on the match's results.
Online rank is tied to each character and is determined by the amount of Rank Points you have: achieving above a certain value will earn you a promotion, while reaching below a certain value will get you demoted.
Get ready to battle your heart out and aim for the top rank!

The ranks from God of Destruction onward can only be reached by the most dedicated of fighters. It is even more difficult to get promoted compared to the ranks leading up to God of Destruction.
If you are God of Destruction or higher, the rank immediately above and below your own will count as equal to your rank during matching. This allows you to search for a wider range of opponents than normal.

Bonus Rank Points can be earned by fulfilling certain conditions when winning a Ranked Match.

- Promotion Bonus
Earned after being promoted to a higher online rank.

- Consecutive Win Bonus
Earned once a certain win streak has been met.

- Revenge Bonus
Earned when winning a rematch against an opponent you were just defeated by.

Note: Each bonus only applies to specific online ranks.
When your highest-ranked character reaches certain online ranks for the first time, all your other characters will also rise to a predetermined online rank depending on the highest rank achieved.
TEXT_300_UI_RANKMATCH_HELPDIALOG_TITLE_0: Ranks from God of Destruction Onward
TEXT_300_UI_RANKMATCH_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_00:
After a Ranked Match concludes, your Rank Points will be calculated. The number of Rank Points at stake depends on the difference in online rank between you and your opponent.
If your opponent is ranked higher than you, then you will earn more points if you win, but lose fewer if you are defeated. However, if your opponent is ranked lower than you, the opposite is true.
Remember, though, that it's possible to win bonus points if you fulfill certain conditions!
TEXT_300_UI_SEARCH_017: Set the desired range for the difference in online rank between you and your opponent. If the range is narrow, it may take a longer time to match.
TEXT_300_UI_SEARCH_019: Set the desired network environment of your opponent. If the range is narrow, it may take a longer time to match.
TEXT_300_UI_SEARCH_056: Set whether or not to allow cross-platform matching. If this is enabled, more opponents will be available for you to match with.
TEXT_300_UI_MATCHING_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001: In Ranked Match and Quick Match, matching will be based off online rank and network connection quality.
TEXT_300_UI_MATCHING_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_002:
- Rank Restrictions
Set the desired range for the difference in online rank between you and your opponent. If the range is narrow, it may take a longer time to match.

- Connection Quality
Set the desired network environment of your opponent. If the range is narrow, it may take a longer time to match.

- Platform Restrictions
Set whether or not to allow cross-platform matching. If this is enabled, more opponents will be available for you to match with.
TEXT_300_UI_PRACTICE_HELP_TEXT_001:
Restart ({gui_view}+{gui_decide}) allows you to start practice from the position, direction, or status that was specified in Restart Settings.

Mix and match different settings to reenact various types of situations.
TEXT_300_UI_PRACTICE_HELP_TEXT_003:
Set the restart position to "Practice Stage" in Restart Settings to restart in a stage that stretches over a vast area.

{gui_view}+{gui_up} can also be used to take you to the practice stage.
*When this input is used to restart in the practice stage, you can use the standard restart controls ({gui_view}+{gui_decide}) to return you to the original stage.
TEXT_300_UI_PRACTICE_HELP_TEXT_004:
Select "Switch Positions" in Restart Settings to restart and swap character positions.

{gui_view}+{gui_down} can also be used to restart in swapped positions after choosing to "Restart," "Restart at Wall," or "Restart in Practice Stage."
TEXT_300_UI_PRACTICE_HELP_TEXT_005:
You can use Status Record to restart from a particular moment in time. You can Remember a situation you want to start from with {gui_rsb}, then Reproduce it with {gui_lsb}, restarting you in that situation.
When {gui_lsb} or {gui_rsb} is mapped in Controller Settings, the controls will be {gui_view}+{gui_rt}, {gui_view}+{gui_lt}.
TEXT_300_UI_GHOST_VS_GHOST_HELP_020:
Check Ghost Updates to see how many times your Ghost has acquired knowledge. This number will increase as you play online matches or spar with your ghost while AI learning is enabled.

*Ghost Updates will be reset if the ghost is deleted.
TEXT_300_UI_TEKKENBALL_INFO_027: It's time to play ball and hit this one out of the park! Get into full swing and aim for a home run!
TEXT_300_UI_TEKKENBALL_INFO_028: Don't be afraid to touch it—it won't burn you! Send it back across the court in a blaze of red-hot heat!

TEXT_UI_301_CharaPanel_cbr_BNS01: Lidia, illustration by Saifful Johan Foo
TEXT_301_VO_ker_sta_01_vr01_001: The blade belongs to me, now.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_sta_01_vr02_000: Are you here about student council?
TEXT_301_VO_ker_sta_01_vr02_001: I have no interest in the weak.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_sta_01_vr03_000: What business does a UN military man have with me?
TEXT_301_VO_ker_sta_01_vr04_000: Did my little tip help you out?
TEXT_301_VO_ker_sta_02_000: I'll show you my evolved Ninjutsu arts!
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_00_000: If you need a thief, I'm your woman.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_00_vr00_000: It'd be in your best interest to get my father to train you again.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_00_vr02_000: Here's to the beginning of a beautiful friendship.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_00_vr04_000: You should think twice before cozying up to the Manji Clan.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_01_000: Rin Pyoh Toh Sha Kai Jin Retsu Zai...
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_02_000: It's about time we wrap this up.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_win_02_vr00_001: You're such a nuisance...like a mosquito.
TEXT_301_VO_fate_ker_kervsbbn_00_000: You must be the one who trained under my father.
TEXT_301_VO_fate_bbn_kervsbbn_00_000: Let's see if you're worthy to be called a ninja.
TEXT_301_VO_fate_bbn_kervsbbn_10_000: Let's see if you're worthy to be called a ninja.
TEXT_301_VO_bbn_win_02_vr04_000: You have proved worthy of the title of ninja.
TEXT_301_VO_cml_sta_01_vr07_000: (This sword is most dangerous... I will not give it to you.)
TEXT_301_VO_cml_win_01_vr07_000: (I must take responsibility of my sword.)
TEXT_301_VO_zbr_sta_01_vr01_001: What, are you recruiting me, Miss Vice President?
TEXT_301_VO_zbr_win_01_vr03_001: Hope you enjoy the taste of obedience.
TEXT_301_VO_lon_sta_01_vr06_000: I'm not trying to stop you, but don't overdo it.
TEXT_301_VO_lon_win_01_vr04_000: Your father took care of my followers.
TEXT_301_VO_lon_win_01_vr04_001: Tell him thank you for me.
TEXT_301_VO_cbr_sta_01_vr06_000: Now, would you tell me who you are and what it is you want?
TEXT_301_VO_cbr_win_01_vr06_000: I trust you will continue to use your ninjutsu abilities for good.
TEXT_301_VO_ker_RageArt_Pre_000: Allow me to pluck the petals of your life.
TEXT_301_UI_TEKKENBALL_INFO_029: A custom golf ball made for Lee. K.O. with an elegant explosion! Excellent!
TEXT_301_UI_TEKKENBALL_INFO_030: An oh-so-adorable ball that's just bursting with love! Aim right for their heart, cupid!
TEXT_301_UI_GAMEOPTIONS_002: Show status information such as counter hits in Arcade Battle, VS Battle, Arcade Quest, and online matches.
TEXT_301_UI_EMOTE_003: Flame Dance of the Twin Blades (Kunimitsu)
TEXT_301_UI_REMATCH_HELPDIALOG_TITLE_001: New Rematch Feature Added to Online Battles!
TEXT_301_UI_REMATCH_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001:
After finishing Ranked Matches, Quick Matches, Group Matches, or Online Ghost Battles, the players who have lost will now be able to choose "Rematch with Random Stage" from the results screen.

Once all players involved have agreed to a rematch, you will proceed to the match on the next stage.
TEXT_UI_RS01_003:
Randomize which side you play on?
(The side you are playing on will automatically switch at specific times.)
TEXT_UI_RS01_004: Randomize which side you play on?
TEXT_UI_RS01_HELPDIALOG_TEXT_001:
You can now randomize which side you play on with {gui_detail} in Side Selection.

When set to RANDOM, the side you are playing on will automatically switch at specific times.
